title: Multi-Step First: A Lightweight Deep Reinforcement Learning Strategy for Robust Continuous Control with Partial Observability
title_zh: 多步优先：具有部分可观测性的鲁棒连续控制的轻量级深度强化学习策略
comment: 21 pages, 12 figures. Published in Neural Networks, Vol. 199, 2026
comments: 21 pages, 12 figures. Published in Neural Networks, Vol. 199, 2026
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has made considerable advances in simulated and physical robot control tasks, especially when problems admit a fully observed Markov Decision Process (MDP) formulation. When observations only partially capture the underlying state, the problem becomes a Partially Observable MDP (POMDP), and performance rankings between algorithms can change. We empirically compare Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3), and Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) on representative POMDP variants of continuous-control benchmarks. Contrary to widely reported MDP results where TD3 and SAC typically outperform PPO, we observe an inversion: PPO attains higher robustness under partial observability. We attribute this to the stabilizing effect of multi-step bootstrapping. Furthermore, incorporating multi-step targets into TD3 (MTD3) and SAC (MSAC) improves their robustness. These findings provide practical guidance for selecting and adapting DRL algorithms in partially observable settings without requiring new theoretical machinery.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has made considerable advances in simulated and physical robot control tasks, especially when problems admit a fully observed Markov Decision Process (MDP) formulation. When observations only partially capture the underlying state, the problem becomes a Partially Observable MDP (POMDP), and performance rankings between algorithms can change. We empirically compare Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3), and Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) on representative POMDP variants of continuous-control benchmarks. Contrary to widely reported MDP results where TD3 and SAC typically outperform PPO, we observe an inversion: PPO attains higher robustness under partial observability. We attribute this to the stabilizing effect of multi-step bootstrapping. Furthermore, incorporating multi-step targets into TD3 (MTD3) and SAC (MSAC) improves their robustness. These findings provide practical guidance for selecting and adapting DRL algorithms in partially observable settings without requiring new theoretical machinery.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (DRL) 在模拟和物理机器人控制任务中取得了相当大的进步，特别是当问题承认完全观察到的马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 公式时。当观察仅部分捕获底层状态时，问题就变成部分可观察 MDP (POMDP)，并且算法之间的性能排名可能会发生变化。我们在连续控制基准的代表性 POMDP 变体上根据经验比较了近端策略优化 (PPO)、双延迟深度确定性策略梯度 (TD3) 和 Soft Actor-Critic (SAC)。与广泛报道的 MDP 结果相反，其中 TD3 和 SAC 通常优于 PPO，我们观察到一个反转：PPO 在部分可观察性下获得了更高的鲁棒性。我们将此归因于多步引导的稳定效果。此外，将多步目标合并到 TD3 (MTD3) 和 SAC (MSAC) 中可以提高它们的稳健性。这些发现为在部分可观察的环境中选择和调整 DRL 算法提供了实用指导，而无需新的理论机制。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了深度强化学习算法在部分可观测环境下的表现，比较了PPO、TD3和SAC算法的鲁棒性，并提出多步引导策略以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习算法在完全可观测的MDP任务中表现优异，但在部分可观测的POMDP场景下性能可能下降，需探索适应性更强的算法策略。
AI.method: 通过实验对比PPO、TD3和SAC在POMDP变体基准任务中的表现，并引入多步目标机制改进TD3（MTD3）和SAC（MSAC）算法。
AI.result: PPO在部分可观测场景下表现出更高的鲁棒性，而多步引导策略显著提升了TD3和SAC的稳定性与性能。
AI.conclusion: 多步引导机制是提升部分可观测环境下DRL算法鲁棒性的有效方法，PPO在该场景下更具优势，为实际应用提供算法选择依据。

authors_text: Zhenrui Yue,Huimin Zeng,Ziyi Kou,Lanyu Shang,Dong Wang
title: Domain Adaptation for Question Answering via Question Classification
title_zh: 通过问题分类进行问答的领域适应
comment: Accepted to COLING 2022
comments: Accepted to COLING 2022
abstract: Question answering (QA) has demonstrated impressive progress in answering questions from customized domains. Nevertheless, domain adaptation remains one of the most elusive challenges for QA systems, especially when QA systems are trained in a source domain but deployed in a different target domain. In this work, we investigate the potential benefits of question classification for QA domain adaptation. We propose a novel framework: Question Classification for Question Answering (QC4QA). Specifically, a question classifier is adopted to assign question classes to both the source and target data. Then, we perform joint training in a self-supervised fashion via pseudo-labeling. For optimization, inter-domain discrepancy between the source and target domain is reduced via maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) distance. We additionally minimize intra-class discrepancy among QA samples of the same question class for fine-grained adaptation performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work in QA domain adaptation to leverage question classification with self-supervised adaptation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed QC4QA with consistent improvements against the state-of-the-art baselines on multiple datasets.
summary: Question answering (QA) has demonstrated impressive progress in answering questions from customized domains. Nevertheless, domain adaptation remains one of the most elusive challenges for QA systems, especially when QA systems are trained in a source domain but deployed in a different target domain. In this work, we investigate the potential benefits of question classification for QA domain adaptation. We propose a novel framework: Question Classification for Question Answering (QC4QA). Specifically, a question classifier is adopted to assign question classes to both the source and target data. Then, we perform joint training in a self-supervised fashion via pseudo-labeling. For optimization, inter-domain discrepancy between the source and target domain is reduced via maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) distance. We additionally minimize intra-class discrepancy among QA samples of the same question class for fine-grained adaptation performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work in QA domain adaptation to leverage question classification with self-supervised adaptation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed QC4QA with consistent improvements against the state-of-the-art baselines on multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 问答 (QA) 在回答定制领域的问题方面取得了令人瞩目的进展。尽管如此，领域适应仍然是 QA 系统最难以捉摸的挑战之一，特别是当 QA 系统在源域中进行训练但部署在不同的目标域中时。在这项工作中，我们研究了问题分类对于 QA 领域适应的潜在好处。我们提出了一个新颖的框架：问答的问题分类（QC4QA）。具体来说，采用问题分类器将问题类别分配给源数据和目标数据。然后，我们通过伪标签以自我监督的方式进行联合训练。为了优化，源域和目标域之间的域间差异通过最大平均差异 (MMD) 距离来减少。我们还最小化了同一问题类别的 QA 样本之间的类内差异，以实现细粒度的适应性能。据我们所知，这是 QA 领域适应中第一个利用问题分类和自监督适应的工作。我们证明了所提出的 QC4QA 的有效性，并针对多个数据集上的最新基线进行了一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于问题分类的问答系统领域适应框架QC4QA，解决源领域训练模型在目标领域部署时的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有问答系统在跨领域场景下表现不佳，传统领域适应方法难以有效对齐不同领域的语义分布，需探索新的适应策略。
AI.method: 构建问题分类器对源/目标数据进行伪标签分类，通过自监督联合训练减少领域间MMD距离，同时最小化同类问题的内部差异以提升细粒度适应效果。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证QC4QA方法，相较现有最优基线模型实现持续性能提升，证明了问题分类引导的自监督适应有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次将问题分类与自监督适应结合，通过双维度差异最小化策略显著提升问答系统的跨领域适应能力。

authors_text: Biao Qian,Yang Wang,Hongzhi Yin,Richang Hong,Meng Wang
title: Switchable Online Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 可切换的在线知识蒸馏
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, accepted by ECCV 2022
comments: 16 pages, 7 figures, accepted by ECCV 2022
abstract: Online Knowledge Distillation (OKD) improves the involved models by reciprocally exploiting the difference between teacher and student. Several crucial bottlenecks over the gap between them -- e.g., Why and when does a large gap harm the performance, especially for student? How to quantify the gap between teacher and student? -- have received limited formal study. In this paper, we propose Switchable Online Knowledge Distillation (SwitOKD), to answer these questions. Instead of focusing on the accuracy gap at test phase by the existing arts, the core idea of SwitOKD is to adaptively calibrate the gap at training phase, namely distillation gap, via a switching strategy between two modes -- expert mode (pause the teacher while keep the student learning) and learning mode (restart the teacher). To possess an appropriate distillation gap, we further devise an adaptive switching threshold, which provides a formal criterion as to when to switch to learning mode or expert mode, and thus improves the student's performance. Meanwhile, the teacher benefits from our adaptive switching threshold and keeps basically on a par with other online arts. We further extend SwitOKD to multiple networks with two basis topologies. Finally, extensive experiments and analysis validate the merits of SwitOKD for classification over the state-of-the-arts. Our code is available at https://github.com/hfutqian/SwitOKD.
summary: Online Knowledge Distillation (OKD) improves the involved models by reciprocally exploiting the difference between teacher and student. Several crucial bottlenecks over the gap between them -- e.g., Why and when does a large gap harm the performance, especially for student? How to quantify the gap between teacher and student? -- have received limited formal study. In this paper, we propose Switchable Online Knowledge Distillation (SwitOKD), to answer these questions. Instead of focusing on the accuracy gap at test phase by the existing arts, the core idea of SwitOKD is to adaptively calibrate the gap at training phase, namely distillation gap, via a switching strategy between two modes -- expert mode (pause the teacher while keep the student learning) and learning mode (restart the teacher). To possess an appropriate distillation gap, we further devise an adaptive switching threshold, which provides a formal criterion as to when to switch to learning mode or expert mode, and thus improves the student's performance. Meanwhile, the teacher benefits from our adaptive switching threshold and keeps basically on a par with other online arts. We further extend SwitOKD to multiple networks with two basis topologies. Finally, extensive experiments and analysis validate the merits of SwitOKD for classification over the state-of-the-arts. Our code is available at https://github.com/hfutqian/SwitOKD.
abstract_zh: 在线知识蒸馏（OKD）通过相互利用教师和学生之间的差异来改进所涉及的模型。它们之间的差距存在几个关键瓶颈——例如，为什么以及何时较大的差距会损害表现，尤其是对于学生而言？如何量化老师和学生之间的差距？ ——接受过有限的正式研究。在本文中，我们提出可切换在线知识蒸馏（SWitOKD）来回答这些问题。 SwitOKD 的核心思想不是关注现有技术在测试阶段的准确率差距，而是通过专家模式（暂停教师，同时保持学生学习）和学习模式（重新启动教师）两种模式之间的切换策略，自适应地校准训练阶段的差距，即蒸馏差距。为了拥有适当的蒸馏间隙，我们进一步设计了自适应切换阈值，它提供了何时切换到学习模式或专家模式的正式标准，从而提高了学生的表现。同时，老师受益于我们的自适应切换阈值，与其他在线艺术基本持平。我们进一步将 SwitOKD 扩展到具有两种基本拓扑的多个网络。最后，大量的实验和分析验证了 SwitOKD 在分类方面优于最先进技术的优点。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hfutqian/SwitOKD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可切换的在线知识蒸馏方法（SwitOKD），通过动态调整教师模型与学生模型间的训练阶段差距来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有在线知识蒸馏方法未充分研究教师与学生模型间差距的量化及对性能的影响，导致学生模型性能受限。
AI.method: 设计了专家模式（暂停教师模型）与学习模式（重启教师模型）的切换策略，并引入自适应阈值控制训练阶段的差距。
AI.result: 在多个分类任务中，SwitOKD优于现有在线知识蒸馏方法，且教师模型性能保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: SwitOKD通过动态校准训练阶段差距，有效解决了在线知识蒸馏中的关键瓶颈问题。

search_text: Switchable Online Knowledge Distillation 可切换的在线知识蒸馏 Online Knowledge Distillation (OKD) improves the involved models by reciprocally exploiting the difference between teacher and student. Several crucial bottlenecks over the gap between them -- e.g., Why and when does a large gap harm the performance, especially for student? How to quantify the gap between teacher and student? -- have received limited formal study. In this paper, we propose Switchable Online Knowledge Distillation (SwitOKD), to answer these questions. Instead of focusing on the accuracy gap at test phase by the existing arts, the core idea of SwitOKD is to adaptively calibrate the gap at training phase, namely distillation gap, via a switching strategy between two modes -- expert mode (pause the teacher while keep the student learning) and learning mode (restart the teacher). To possess an appropriate distillation gap, we further devise an adaptive switching threshold, which provides a formal criterion as to when to switch to learning mode or expert mode, and thus improves the student's performance. Meanwhile, the teacher benefits from our adaptive switching threshold and keeps basically on a par with other online arts. We further extend SwitOKD to multiple networks with two basis topologies. Finally, extensive experiments and analysis validate the merits of SwitOKD for classification over the state-of-the-arts. Our code is available at https://github.com/hfutqian/SwitOKD. 在线知识蒸馏（OKD）通过相互利用教师和学生之间的差异来改进所涉及的模型。它们之间的差距存在几个关键瓶颈——例如，为什么以及何时较大的差距会损害表现，尤其是对于学生而言？如何量化老师和学生之间的差距？ ——接受过有限的正式研究。在本文中，我们提出可切换在线知识蒸馏（SWitOKD）来回答这些问题。 SwitOKD 的核心思想不是关注现有技术在测试阶段的准确率差距，而是通过专家模式（暂停教师，同时保持学生学习）和学习模式（重新启动教师）两种模式之间的切换策略，自适应地校准训练阶段的差距，即蒸馏差距。为了拥有适当的蒸馏间隙，我们进一步设计了自适应切换阈值，它提供了何时切换到学习模式或专家模式的正式标准，从而提高了学生的表现。同时，老师受益于我们的自适应切换阈值，与其他在线艺术基本持平。我们进一步将 SwitOKD 扩展到具有两种基本拓扑的多个网络。最后，大量的实验和分析验证了 SwitOKD 在分类方面优于最先进技术的优点。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hfutqian/SwitOKD 获取。 本文提出了一种可切换的在线知识蒸馏方法（SwitOKD），通过动态调整教师模型与学生模型间的训练阶段差距来提升模型性能。 Biao Qian,Yang Wang,Hongzhi Yin,Richang Hong,Meng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Fábio Mendonça,Sheikh Shanawaz Mostafa,Fernando Morgado-Dias,Antonio G. Ravelo-García
title: Variational Autoencoder Kernel Interpretation and Selection for Classification
title_zh: 用于分类的变分自编码器内核解释和选择
comment: 20 pages, 7 Figures
comments: 20 pages, 7 Figures
abstract: This work proposed kernel selection approaches for probabilistic classifiers based on features produced by the convolutional encoder of a variational autoencoder. Particularly, the developed methodologies allow the selection of the most relevant subset of latent variables. In the proposed implementation, each latent variable was sampled from the distribution associated with a single kernel of the last encoder's convolution layer, as an individual distribution was created for each kernel. Therefore, choosing relevant features on the sampled latent variables makes it possible to perform kernel selection, filtering the uninformative features and kernels. Such leads to a reduction in the number of the model's parameters. Both wrapper and filter methods were evaluated for feature selection. The second was of particular relevance as it is based only on the distributions of the kernels. It was assessed by measuring the Kullback-Leibler divergence between all distributions, hypothesizing that the kernels whose distributions are more similar can be discarded. This hypothesis was confirmed since it was observed that the most similar kernels do not convey relevant information and can be removed. As a result, the proposed methodology is suitable for developing applications for resource-constrained devices.
summary: This work proposed kernel selection approaches for probabilistic classifiers based on features produced by the convolutional encoder of a variational autoencoder. Particularly, the developed methodologies allow the selection of the most relevant subset of latent variables. In the proposed implementation, each latent variable was sampled from the distribution associated with a single kernel of the last encoder's convolution layer, as an individual distribution was created for each kernel. Therefore, choosing relevant features on the sampled latent variables makes it possible to perform kernel selection, filtering the uninformative features and kernels. Such leads to a reduction in the number of the model's parameters. Both wrapper and filter methods were evaluated for feature selection. The second was of particular relevance as it is based only on the distributions of the kernels. It was assessed by measuring the Kullback-Leibler divergence between all distributions, hypothesizing that the kernels whose distributions are more similar can be discarded. This hypothesis was confirmed since it was observed that the most similar kernels do not convey relevant information and can be removed. As a result, the proposed methodology is suitable for developing applications for resource-constrained devices.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了基于变分自动编码器的卷积编码器产生的特征的概率分类器的核选择方法。特别是，所开发的方法允许选择最相关的潜在变量子集。在所提出的实现中，每个潜在变量都是从与最后一个编码器卷积层的单个内核相关的分布中采样的，因为为每个内核创建了单独的分布。因此，在采样的潜在变量上选择相关特征使得可以执行核选择，过滤掉无信息的特征和核。这导致模型参数数量的减少。包装器和过滤器方法都针对特征选择进行了评估。第二个特别相关，因为它仅基于内核的分布。它是通过测量所有分布之间的 Kullback-Leibler 散度来评估的，假设分布更相似的内核可以被丢弃。这一假设得到了证实，因为观察到最相似的内核不传达相关信息并且可以被删除。因此，所提出的方法适用于开发资源受限设备的应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于变分自编码器卷积编码器特征的概率分类器核选择方法，通过筛选关键潜在变量减少模型参数。
AI.motivation: 为满足资源受限设备需求，需开发参数更少且保持分类性能的高效模型，传统方法未充分结合潜在变量分布特性进行核选择。
AI.method: 通过单个卷积核分布采样潜在变量，结合KL散度度量核间分布相似性，过滤冗余核；采用过滤法与包装法对比验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验验证相似核确实不携带有效信息，参数量显著减少且分类性能保持稳定，适用于嵌入式等资源受限场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过潜在变量分布分析实现核选择，在保证模型精度的同时降低复杂度，为轻量化应用提供可行方案。

title: People detection and social distancing classification in smart cities for COVID-19 by using thermal images and deep learning algorithms
title_zh: 使用热图像和深度学习算法在智慧城市中针对 COVID-19 进行人员检测和社交距离分类
comment: 2 pages, 2 figures , conference (ICT for Smart Cities)
comments: 2 pages, 2 figures , conference (ICT for Smart Cities)
abstract: COVID-19 is a disease caused by severe respiratory syndrome coronavirus. It was identified in December 2019 in Wuhan, China. It has resulted in an ongoing pandemic that caused infected cases including some deaths. Coronavirus is primarily spread between people during close contact. Motivating to this notion, this research proposes an artificial intelligence system for social distancing classification of persons by using thermal images. By exploiting YOLOv2 (you look at once), a deep learning detection technique is developed for detecting and tracking people in indoor and outdoor scenarios. An algorithm is also implemented for measuring and classifying the distance between persons and automatically check if social distancing rules are respected or not. Hence, this work aims at minimizing the spread of the COVID-19 virus by evaluating if and how persons comply with social distancing rules. The proposed approach is applied to images acquired through thermal cameras, to establish a complete AI system for people tracking, social distancing classification, and body temperature monitoring. The training phase is done with two datasets captured from different thermal cameras. Ground Truth Labeler app is used for labeling the persons in the images. The achieved results show that the proposed method is suitable for the creation of a smart surveillance system in smart cities for people detection, social distancing classification, and body temperature analysis.
summary: COVID-19 is a disease caused by severe respiratory syndrome coronavirus. It was identified in December 2019 in Wuhan, China. It has resulted in an ongoing pandemic that caused infected cases including some deaths. Coronavirus is primarily spread between people during close contact. Motivating to this notion, this research proposes an artificial intelligence system for social distancing classification of persons by using thermal images. By exploiting YOLOv2 (you look at once), a deep learning detection technique is developed for detecting and tracking people in indoor and outdoor scenarios. An algorithm is also implemented for measuring and classifying the distance between persons and automatically check if social distancing rules are respected or not. Hence, this work aims at minimizing the spread of the COVID-19 virus by evaluating if and how persons comply with social distancing rules. The proposed approach is applied to images acquired through thermal cameras, to establish a complete AI system for people tracking, social distancing classification, and body temperature monitoring. The training phase is done with two datasets captured from different thermal cameras. Ground Truth Labeler app is used for labeling the persons in the images. The achieved results show that the proposed method is suitable for the creation of a smart surveillance system in smart cities for people detection, social distancing classification, and body temperature analysis.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 是一种由严重呼吸综合征冠状病毒引起的疾病。它于 2019 年 12 月在中国武汉被发现。它导致了一场持续的大流行，导致感染病例，包括一些死亡。冠状病毒主要通过密切接触在人与人之间传播。为了激发这一概念，本研究提出了一种人工智能系统，通过使用热图像对人员进行社交距离分类。通过利用 YOLOv2（一次性查看），开发了一种深度学习检测技术，用于检测和跟踪室内和室外场景中的人员。还实现了一种算法来测量和分类人与人之间的距离，并自动检查是否遵守社交距离规则。因此，这项工作旨在通过评估人们是否以及如何遵守社交距离规则来最大限度地减少 COVID-19 病毒的传播。该方法应用于通过热像仪获取的图像，建立一个完整的人工智能系统，用于人员跟踪、社交距离分类和体温监测。训练阶段使用从不同热像仪捕获的两个数据集完成。 Ground Truth Labeler 应用程序用于标记图像中的人物。所取得的结果表明，该方法适用于在智慧城市中创建智能监控系统，用于人员检测、社交距离分类和体温分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用热成像与深度学习技术，在智慧城市中实现人群检测及社会距离分类，以应对COVID-19传播。
AI.motivation: 由于新冠病毒主要通过密切接触传播，需通过AI系统自动检测人群是否遵守社会距离规则，减少病毒扩散风险。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv2算法检测追踪人群，结合热成像数据集训练模型，通过算法计算人员间距并分类社会距离合规性，同时监测体温。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效实现人群检测、距离分类及体温监测，适用于构建智慧城市智能监控系统。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可有效支持疫情防控，通过自动化监控社会距离与体温，为智慧城市管理提供技术方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用热成像与深度学习技术，在智慧城市中实现人群检测及社会距离分类，以应对COVID-19传播。
ai_content.motivation: 由于新冠病毒主要通过密切接触传播，需通过AI系统自动检测人群是否遵守社会距离规则，减少病毒扩散风险。
ai_content.method: 采用YOLOv2算法检测追踪人群，结合热成像数据集训练模型，通过算法计算人员间距并分类社会距离合规性，同时监测体温。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法能有效实现人群检测、距离分类及体温监测，适用于构建智慧城市智能监控系统。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提方法可有效支持疫情防控，通过自动化监控社会距离与体温，为智慧城市管理提供技术方案。

search_text: People detection and social distancing classification in smart cities for COVID-19 by using thermal images and deep learning algorithms 使用热图像和深度学习算法在智慧城市中针对 COVID-19 进行人员检测和社交距离分类 COVID-19 is a disease caused by severe respiratory syndrome coronavirus. It was identified in December 2019 in Wuhan, China. It has resulted in an ongoing pandemic that caused infected cases including some deaths. Coronavirus is primarily spread between people during close contact. Motivating to this notion, this research proposes an artificial intelligence system for social distancing classification of persons by using thermal images. By exploiting YOLOv2 (you look at once), a deep learning detection technique is developed for detecting and tracking people in indoor and outdoor scenarios. An algorithm is also implemented for measuring and classifying the distance between persons and automatically check if social distancing rules are respected or not. Hence, this work aims at minimizing the spread of the COVID-19 virus by evaluating if and how persons comply with social distancing rules. The proposed approach is applied to images acquired through thermal cameras, to establish a complete AI system for people tracking, social distancing classification, and body temperature monitoring. The training phase is done with two datasets captured from different thermal cameras. Ground Truth Labeler app is used for labeling the persons in the images. The achieved results show that the proposed method is suitable for the creation of a smart surveillance system in smart cities for people detection, social distancing classification, and body temperature analysis. COVID-19 是一种由严重呼吸综合征冠状病毒引起的疾病。它于 2019 年 12 月在中国武汉被发现。它导致了一场持续的大流行，导致感染病例，包括一些死亡。冠状病毒主要通过密切接触在人与人之间传播。为了激发这一概念，本研究提出了一种人工智能系统，通过使用热图像对人员进行社交距离分类。通过利用 YOLOv2（一次性查看），开发了一种深度学习检测技术，用于检测和跟踪室内和室外场景中的人员。还实现了一种算法来测量和分类人与人之间的距离，并自动检查是否遵守社交距离规则。因此，这项工作旨在通过评估人们是否以及如何遵守社交距离规则来最大限度地减少 COVID-19 病毒的传播。该方法应用于通过热像仪获取的图像，建立一个完整的人工智能系统，用于人员跟踪、社交距离分类和体温监测。训练阶段使用从不同热像仪捕获的两个数据集完成。 Ground Truth Labeler 应用程序用于标记图像中的人物。所取得的结果表明，该方法适用于在智慧城市中创建智能监控系统，用于人员检测、社交距离分类和体温分析。 本文提出利用热成像与深度学习技术，在智慧城市中实现人群检测及社会距离分类，以应对COVID-19传播。 Abdussalam Elhanashi,Sergio Saponara,Alessio Gagliardi cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Explainable Image Quality Assessments in Teledermatological Photography
title_zh: 远程皮肤病学摄影中可解释的图像质量评估
comment: Accepted at the Telemedicine and eHealth Journal
comments: Accepted at the Telemedicine and eHealth Journal
abstract: Image quality is a crucial factor in the effectiveness and efficiency of teledermatological consultations. However, up to 50% of images sent by patients have quality issues, thus increasing the time to diagnosis and treatment. An automated, easily deployable, explainable method for assessing image quality is necessary to improve the current teledermatological consultation flow. We introduce ImageQX, a convolutional neural network for image quality assessment with a learning mechanism for identifying the most common poor image quality explanations: bad framing, bad lighting, blur, low resolution, and distance issues. ImageQX was trained on 26,635 photographs and validated on 9,874 photographs, each annotated with image quality labels and poor image quality explanations by up to 12 board-certified dermatologists. The photographic images were taken between 2017 and 2019 using a mobile skin disease tracking application accessible worldwide. Our method achieves expert-level performance for both image quality assessment and poor image quality explanation. For image quality assessment, ImageQX obtains a macro F1-score of 0.73 +- 0.01, which places it within standard deviation of the pairwise inter-rater F1-score of 0.77 +- 0.07. For poor image quality explanations, our method obtains F1-scores of between 0.37 +- 0.01 and 0.70 +- 0.01, similar to the inter-rater pairwise F1-score of between 0.24 +- 0.15 and 0.83 +- 0.06. Moreover, with a size of only 15 MB, ImageQX is easily deployable on mobile devices. With an image quality detection performance similar to that of dermatologists, incorporating ImageQX into the teledermatology flow can enable a better, faster flow for remote consultations.

abstract_zh: 图像质量是远程皮肤科咨询效果和效率的关键因素。然而，高达50%的患者发送的图像存在质量问题，从而增加了诊断和治疗的时间。为了改善当前的远程皮肤病咨询流程，需要一种自动化、易于部署、可解释的图像质量评估方法。我们介绍 ImageQX，这是一种用于图像质量评估的卷积神经网络，具有用于识别最常见的图像质量差的解释的学习机制：不良取景、不良照明、模糊、低分辨率和距离问题。 ImageQX 在 26,635 张照片上进行了训练，并在 9,874 张照片上进行了验证，每张照片都由最多 12 名经过委员会认证的皮肤科医生注释了图像质量标签和图像质量较差的解释。这些照片是在 2017 年至 2019 年期间使用全球可访问的移动皮肤病追踪应用程序拍摄的。我们的方法在图像质量评估和不良图像质量解释方面都达到了专家级的性能。对于图像质量评估，ImageQX 获得的宏观 F1 分数为 0.73 ± 0.01，这使其处于成对评估者间 F1 分数 0.77 ± 0.07 的标准偏差内。对于较差的图像质量解释，我们的方法获得介于 0.37 ± 0.01 和 0.70 ± 0.01 之间的 F1 分数，类似于介于 0.24 ± 0.15 和 0.83 ± 0.06 之间的评估者间成对 F1 分数。此外，ImageQX 的大小仅为 15 MB，可以轻松部署在移动设备上。凭借与皮肤科医生相似的图像质量检测性能，将 ImageQX 纳入远程皮肤病流程可以实现更好、更快的远程会诊流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ImageQX的卷积神经网络，用于皮肤病远程会诊中的图像质量评估与解释。
AI.motivation: 患者上传的皮肤病图像中约50%存在质量问题，导致诊断效率下降，亟需自动化、可解释的图像质量评估方法。
AI.method: 基于26,635张由皮肤科医生标注的图像训练CNN模型，识别模糊、光照不足等五类常见质量问题，并优化模型至15MB以便移动端部署。
AI.result: 图像质量评估的宏F1得分为0.73（与专家间评分标准差内），质量解释任务F1得分0.37-0.70（与人类标注者相近）。
AI.conclusion: ImageQX可集成至远程会诊流程，以接近专家水平的性能提升诊断效率。

authors_text: Yunxiao Guo,Xinjia Xie,Runhao Zhao,Chenglan Zhu,Jiangting Yin,Han Long
title: Cooperation and Competition: Flocking with Evolutionary Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 合作与竞争：进化多智能体强化学习的蜂拥而至
comment: We misplaced Fig.5 (b) on Page 11 ( This figure is from early experiments with poor results). We failed to resubmit, so we want to revise the whole paper by this chance
comments: We misplaced Fig.5 (b) on Page 11 ( This figure is from early experiments with poor results). We failed to resubmit, so we want to revise the whole paper by this chance
abstract: Flocking is a very challenging problem in a multi-agent system; traditional flocking methods also require complete knowledge of the environment and a precise model for control. In this paper, we propose Evolutionary Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (EMARL) in flocking tasks, a hybrid algorithm that combines cooperation and competition with little prior knowledge. As for cooperation, we design the agents' reward for flocking tasks according to the boids model. While for competition, agents with high fitness are designed as senior agents, and those with low fitness are designed as junior, letting junior agents inherit the parameters of senior agents stochastically. To intensify competition, we also design an evolutionary selection mechanism that shows effectiveness on credit assignment in flocking tasks. Experimental results in a range of challenging and self-contrast benchmarks demonstrate that EMARL significantly outperforms the full competition or cooperation methods.
summary: Flocking is a very challenging problem in a multi-agent system; traditional flocking methods also require complete knowledge of the environment and a precise model for control. In this paper, we propose Evolutionary Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (EMARL) in flocking tasks, a hybrid algorithm that combines cooperation and competition with little prior knowledge. As for cooperation, we design the agents' reward for flocking tasks according to the boids model. While for competition, agents with high fitness are designed as senior agents, and those with low fitness are designed as junior, letting junior agents inherit the parameters of senior agents stochastically. To intensify competition, we also design an evolutionary selection mechanism that shows effectiveness on credit assignment in flocking tasks. Experimental results in a range of challenging and self-contrast benchmarks demonstrate that EMARL significantly outperforms the full competition or cooperation methods.
abstract_zh: 集群是多智能体系统中一个非常具有挑战性的问题；传统的植绒方法还需要对环境的完整了解和精确的控制模型。在本文中，我们提出了群体任务中的进化多智能体强化学习（EMARL），这是一种将合作与竞争结合在一起的混合算法，几乎不需要先验知识。在合作方面，我们根据boids模型设计了代理对集群任务的奖励。而为了竞争，将适应度高的智能体设计为高级智能体，将适应度低的智能体设计为初级智能体，让初级智能体随机继承高级智能体的参数。为了加剧竞争，我们还设计了一种进化选择机制，该机制显示了集群任务中信用分配的有效性。一系列具有挑战性和自我对比基准的实验结果表明，EMARL 显着优于完全竞争或合作方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合合作与竞争的进化多智能体强化学习（EMARL）方法，用于解决群体智能中的群集问题。
AI.motivation: 传统群集算法需要完整的环境知识和精确模型，而实际场景中这些条件往往难以满足，因此需要一种依赖先验知识较少的新型算法。
AI.method: 基于boids模型设计合作奖励机制，通过进化选择机制区分高适应性（高级）与低适应性（初级）智能体，允许初级智能体随机继承高级智能体参数以强化竞争。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的基准测试中，EMARL显著优于纯竞争或纯合作方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合合作与竞争机制的EMARL为多智能体群集问题提供了新思路，证明了进化策略在复杂环境中的潜力。

search_text: Cooperation and Competition: Flocking with Evolutionary Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 合作与竞争：进化多智能体强化学习的蜂拥而至 Flocking is a very challenging problem in a multi-agent system; traditional flocking methods also require complete knowledge of the environment and a precise model for control. In this paper, we propose Evolutionary Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (EMARL) in flocking tasks, a hybrid algorithm that combines cooperation and competition with little prior knowledge. As for cooperation, we design the agents' reward for flocking tasks according to the boids model. While for competition, agents with high fitness are designed as senior agents, and those with low fitness are designed as junior, letting junior agents inherit the parameters of senior agents stochastically. To intensify competition, we also design an evolutionary selection mechanism that shows effectiveness on credit assignment in flocking tasks. Experimental results in a range of challenging and self-contrast benchmarks demonstrate that EMARL significantly outperforms the full competition or cooperation methods. 集群是多智能体系统中一个非常具有挑战性的问题；传统的植绒方法还需要对环境的完整了解和精确的控制模型。在本文中，我们提出了群体任务中的进化多智能体强化学习（EMARL），这是一种将合作与竞争结合在一起的混合算法，几乎不需要先验知识。在合作方面，我们根据boids模型设计了代理对集群任务的奖励。而为了竞争，将适应度高的智能体设计为高级智能体，将适应度低的智能体设计为初级智能体，让初级智能体随机继承高级智能体的参数。为了加剧竞争，我们还设计了一种进化选择机制，该机制显示了集群任务中信用分配的有效性。一系列具有挑战性和自我对比基准的实验结果表明，EMARL 显着优于完全竞争或合作方法。 本文提出了一种结合合作与竞争的进化多智能体强化学习（EMARL）方法，用于解决群体智能中的群集问题。 Yunxiao Guo,Xinjia Xie,Runhao Zhao,Chenglan Zhu,Jiangting Yin,Han Long cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.RO

title: Pay Attention to Hard Trials
title_zh: 注重艰苦的考验
abstract: Performance of speaker recognition systems is evaluated on test trials. Although as crucial as rulers for tailors, trials have not been carefully treated so far, and most existing benchmarks compose trials by naive cross-pairing. In this paper, we argue that the cross-pairing approach produces overwhelming easy trials, which in turn leads to potential bias in system and technique comparison. To solve the problem, we advocate more attention to hard trials. We present an SVM-based approach to identifying hard trials and use it to construct new evaluation sets for VoxCeleb1 and SITW. With the new sets, we can re-evaluate the contribution of some recent technologies. The code and the identified hard trials will be published online at http://project.cslt.org.
summary: Performance of speaker recognition systems is evaluated on test trials. Although as crucial as rulers for tailors, trials have not been carefully treated so far, and most existing benchmarks compose trials by naive cross-pairing. In this paper, we argue that the cross-pairing approach produces overwhelming easy trials, which in turn leads to potential bias in system and technique comparison. To solve the problem, we advocate more attention to hard trials. We present an SVM-based approach to identifying hard trials and use it to construct new evaluation sets for VoxCeleb1 and SITW. With the new sets, we can re-evaluate the contribution of some recent technologies. The code and the identified hard trials will be published online at http://project.cslt.org.
abstract_zh: 说话人识别系统的性能通过测试进行评估。尽管试验对于裁缝来说与标尺一样重要，但迄今为止还没有得到仔细对待，而且大多数现有基准都是通过简单的交叉配对来组成试验的。在本文中，我们认为交叉配对方法产生了压倒性的简单试验，这反过来又导致系统和技术比较中的潜在偏差。解决这个问题，我们提倡更加注重艰苦的尝试。我们提出了一种基于 SVM 的方法来识别困难试验，并使用它为 VoxCeleb1 和 SITW 构建新的评估集。通过新的集合，我们可以重新评估一些最新技术的贡献。代码和确定的硬试验将在线发布：http://project.cslt.org。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过识别困难测试样本来改进说话人识别系统的评估方法，并构建新的评估集以减少现有基准的偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人识别系统评估中，交叉配对方法生成的测试样例过于简单，导致系统和技术比较存在潜在偏差。
AI.method: 采用基于支持向量机（SVM）的方法识别困难测试样例，并用于构建VoxCeleb1和SITW的新评估集。
AI.result: 通过新评估集重新验证了近期技术的有效性，揭示了部分技术在困难样例下的真实表现。
AI.conclusion: 关注困难测试样例能更准确评估系统性能，未来需在更多数据集中应用该方法以提升评估公平性。

authors_text: Mahdi Rahmani,Melika Sabaghian,Seyyede Mahila Moghadami,Mohammad Mohsen Talaie,Mahdi Naghibi,Mohammad Ali Keyvanrad
title: IR-LPR: Large Scale of Iranian License Plate Recognition Dataset
title_zh: IR-LPR：大规模伊朗车牌识别数据集
comment: This is the final draft for the paper submitted to the 12th International Conference on Computer and Knowledge Engineering (ICCKE 2022), Ferdowsi University of Mashhad, Iran
comments: This is the final draft for the paper submitted to the 12th International Conference on Computer and Knowledge Engineering (ICCKE 2022), Ferdowsi University of Mashhad, Iran
abstract: Object detection has always been practical. There are so many things in our world that recognizing them can not only increase our automatic knowledge of the surroundings, but can also be lucrative for those interested in starting a new business. One of these attractive objects is the license plate (LP). In addition to the security uses that license plate detection can have, it can also be used to create creative businesses. With the development of object detection methods based on deep learning models, an appropriate and comprehensive dataset becomes doubly important. But due to the frequent commercial use of license plate datasets, there are limited datasets not only in Iran but also in the world. The largest Iranian dataset for detection license plates has 1,466 images. Also, the largest Iranian dataset for recognizing the characters of a license plate has 5,000 images. We have prepared a complete dataset including 20,967 car images along with all the detection annotation of the whole license plate and its characters, which can be useful for various purposes. Also, the total number of license plate images for character recognition application is 27,745 images.
summary: Object detection has always been practical. There are so many things in our world that recognizing them can not only increase our automatic knowledge of the surroundings, but can also be lucrative for those interested in starting a new business. One of these attractive objects is the license plate (LP). In addition to the security uses that license plate detection can have, it can also be used to create creative businesses. With the development of object detection methods based on deep learning models, an appropriate and comprehensive dataset becomes doubly important. But due to the frequent commercial use of license plate datasets, there are limited datasets not only in Iran but also in the world. The largest Iranian dataset for detection license plates has 1,466 images. Also, the largest Iranian dataset for recognizing the characters of a license plate has 5,000 images. We have prepared a complete dataset including 20,967 car images along with all the detection annotation of the whole license plate and its characters, which can be useful for various purposes. Also, the total number of license plate images for character recognition application is 27,745 images.
abstract_zh: 物体检测一直很实用。我们的世界上有如此多的事物，认识它们不仅可以增加我们对周围环境的自动了解，而且对于那些有兴趣开展新业务的人来说也可以有利可图。这些有吸引力的物体之一是车牌（LP）。除了车牌检测的安全用途之外，它还可以用于创建创意业务。随着基于深度学习模型的目标检测方法的发展，适当且全面的数据集变得更加重要。但由于车牌数据集的商业使用频繁，不仅在伊朗，而且在全球范围内，数据集都有限。伊朗最大的车牌检测数据集有 1,466 张图像。此外，伊朗最大的车牌字符识别数据集包含 5,000 张图像。我们准备了一个完整的数据集，包括 20,967 张汽车图像以及整个车牌及其字符的所有检测注释，可用于各种目的。此外，用于字符识别应用的车牌图像总数为27,745张图像。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个大规模的伊朗车牌识别数据集IR-LPR，包含20,967张汽车图像及27,745张车牌图像，提供完整的检测与字符标注。
AI.motivation: 现有伊朗车牌数据集规模有限（检测1,466张，字符识别5,000张），难以满足深度学习模型训练需求，需构建更全面的数据集推动相关研究与商业应用。
AI.method: 通过收集20,967张汽车图像，标注完整车牌位置及字符信息，生成27,745张字符识别专用图像，构建包含检测与字符标注的综合数据集。
AI.result: 发布当前伊朗最大规模车牌识别数据集，包含20,967张带检测标注的汽车图像和27,745张字符识别图像，可支持多种应用场景。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了伊朗在车牌识别领域的大规模数据空白，为学术研究与商业应用提供了高质量资源，促进相关技术发展。

title: Growing a Random Maximal Independent Set Produces a 2-approximate Vertex Cover
title_zh: 增长随机最大独立集会产生 2 近似顶点覆盖
abstract: This paper presents a fast and simple new 2-approximation algorithm for minimum weighted vertex cover. The unweighted version of this algorithm is equivalent to a well-known greedy maximal independent set algorithm. We prove that this independent set algorithm produces a 2-approximate vertex cover, and we provide a principled new way to generalize it to node-weighted graphs. Our analysis is inspired by connections to a clustering objective called correlation clustering. To demonstrate the relationship between these problems, we show how a simple Pivot algorithm for correlation clustering implicitly approximates a special type of hypergraph vertex cover problem. Finally, we use implicit implementations of this maximal independent set algorithm to develop fast and simple 2-approximation algorithms for certain edge-deletion problems that can be reduced to vertex cover in an approximation preserving way.
summary: This paper presents a fast and simple new 2-approximation algorithm for minimum weighted vertex cover. The unweighted version of this algorithm is equivalent to a well-known greedy maximal independent set algorithm. We prove that this independent set algorithm produces a 2-approximate vertex cover, and we provide a principled new way to generalize it to node-weighted graphs. Our analysis is inspired by connections to a clustering objective called correlation clustering. To demonstrate the relationship between these problems, we show how a simple Pivot algorithm for correlation clustering implicitly approximates a special type of hypergraph vertex cover problem. Finally, we use implicit implementations of this maximal independent set algorithm to develop fast and simple 2-approximation algorithms for certain edge-deletion problems that can be reduced to vertex cover in an approximation preserving way.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种快速、简单的新的最小加权顶点覆盖 2 近似算法。该算法的未加权版本相当于众所周知的贪婪最大独立集算法。我们证明了这种独立集算法产生了 2 近似顶点覆盖，并且我们提供了一种原则性的新方法将其推广到节点加权图。我们的分析受到与称为相关聚类的聚类目标的联系的启发。为了演示这些问题之间的关系，我们展示了用于相关聚类的简单枢轴算法如何隐式逼近特殊类型的超图顶点覆盖问题。最后，我们使用这种最大独立集算法的隐式实现来为某些边缘删除问题开发快速且简单的 2 近似算法，这些问题可以以近似保留的方式简化为顶点覆盖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速且简单的2-近似算法用于解决最小加权顶点覆盖问题，其无权版本等价于经典的贪心极大独立集算法。
AI.motivation: 现有顶点覆盖近似算法可能在效率或复杂度上存在不足，需寻找更高效且适用于加权图的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于随机极大独立集增长算法，并结合相关聚类问题的分析，提出隐式近似超图顶点覆盖的Pivot算法，推广至加权图场景。
AI.result: 证明该算法可生成2-近似顶点覆盖，且能有效扩展至加权图；开发了针对特定边删除问题的快速近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过连接独立集与顶点覆盖问题，提出新分析框架，为相关组合优化问题提供了简洁高效的近似方法。

search_text: Growing a Random Maximal Independent Set Produces a 2-approximate Vertex Cover 增长随机最大独立集会产生 2 近似顶点覆盖 This paper presents a fast and simple new 2-approximation algorithm for minimum weighted vertex cover. The unweighted version of this algorithm is equivalent to a well-known greedy maximal independent set algorithm. We prove that this independent set algorithm produces a 2-approximate vertex cover, and we provide a principled new way to generalize it to node-weighted graphs. Our analysis is inspired by connections to a clustering objective called correlation clustering. To demonstrate the relationship between these problems, we show how a simple Pivot algorithm for correlation clustering implicitly approximates a special type of hypergraph vertex cover problem. Finally, we use implicit implementations of this maximal independent set algorithm to develop fast and simple 2-approximation algorithms for certain edge-deletion problems that can be reduced to vertex cover in an approximation preserving way. 本文提出了一种快速、简单的新的最小加权顶点覆盖 2 近似算法。该算法的未加权版本相当于众所周知的贪婪最大独立集算法。我们证明了这种独立集算法产生了 2 近似顶点覆盖，并且我们提供了一种原则性的新方法将其推广到节点加权图。我们的分析受到与称为相关聚类的聚类目标的联系的启发。为了演示这些问题之间的关系，我们展示了用于相关聚类的简单枢轴算法如何隐式逼近特殊类型的超图顶点覆盖问题。最后，我们使用这种最大独立集算法的隐式实现来为某些边缘删除问题开发快速且简单的 2 近似算法，这些问题可以以近似保留的方式简化为顶点覆盖。 本文提出了一种快速且简单的2-近似算法用于解决最小加权顶点覆盖问题，其无权版本等价于经典的贪心极大独立集算法。 Nate Veldt cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Ross Murphy,Sergey Mosesov,Javier Leguina Peral,Thymo ter Doest
title: Ask Before You Act: Generalising to Novel Environments by Asking Questions
title_zh: 行动前先询问：通过提出问题推广到新环境
abstract: Solving temporally-extended tasks is a challenge for most reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms [arXiv:1906.07343]. We investigate the ability of an RL agent to learn to ask natural language questions as a tool to understand its environment and achieve greater generalisation performance in novel, temporally-extended environments. We do this by endowing this agent with the ability of asking "yes-no" questions to an all-knowing Oracle. This allows the agent to obtain guidance regarding the task at hand, while limiting the access to new information. To study the emergence of such natural language questions in the context of temporally-extended tasks we first train our agent in a Mini-Grid environment. We then transfer the trained agent to a different, harder environment. We observe a significant increase in generalisation performance compared to a baseline agent unable to ask questions. Through grounding its understanding of natural language in its environment, the agent can reason about the dynamics of its environment to the point that it can ask new, relevant questions when deployed in a novel environment.
summary: Solving temporally-extended tasks is a challenge for most reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms [arXiv:1906.07343]. We investigate the ability of an RL agent to learn to ask natural language questions as a tool to understand its environment and achieve greater generalisation performance in novel, temporally-extended environments. We do this by endowing this agent with the ability of asking "yes-no" questions to an all-knowing Oracle. This allows the agent to obtain guidance regarding the task at hand, while limiting the access to new information. To study the emergence of such natural language questions in the context of temporally-extended tasks we first train our agent in a Mini-Grid environment. We then transfer the trained agent to a different, harder environment. We observe a significant increase in generalisation performance compared to a baseline agent unable to ask questions. Through grounding its understanding of natural language in its environment, the agent can reason about the dynamics of its environment to the point that it can ask new, relevant questions when deployed in a novel environment.
abstract_zh: 解决时间扩展的任务对于大多数强化学习 (RL) 算法来说都是一个挑战 [arXiv:1906.07343]。我们研究了 RL 代理学习提出自然语言问题的能力，将其作为理解其环境的工具，并在新颖的、时间扩展的环境中实现更好的泛化性能。我们通过赋予该代理向无所不知的 Oracle 提出“是/否”问题的能力来做到这一点。这允许代理获得有关手头任务的指导，同时限制对新信息的访问。为了研究此类自然语言问题在时间扩展任务背景下的出现，我们首先在迷你网格环境中训练我们的代理。然后，我们将训练有素的智能体转移到一个不同的、更困难的环境中。我们观察到，与无法提问的基线智能体相比，泛化性能显着提高。通过将其对自然语言的理解建立在其环境中，代理可以推理其环境的动态，以便在部署到新环境中时可以提出新的相关问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究通过让强化学习代理向全知Oracle提问以提升其在新环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 解决时序扩展任务对大多数强化学习算法具有挑战性，传统方法难以适应新环境，需探索新型交互方式提升泛化性能。
AI.method: 设计可提问的强化学习代理，在Mini-Grid环境中训练后迁移至更复杂环境，通过自然语言 grounding 与环境动态建模实现提问策略。
AI.result: 相比无法提问的基线代理，该方法在新环境中表现出显著的泛化性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过提问机制，代理能基于环境动态推理生成相关问题，从而有效适应未知环境。

title: An EPTAS for Budgeted Matroid Independent Set
title_zh: 预算拟阵独立集的EPTAS
abstract: We consider the budgeted matroid independent set problem. The input is a ground set, where each element has a cost and a non-negative profit, along with a matroid over the elements and a budget. The goal is to select a subset of elements which maximizes the total profit subject to the matroid and budget constraints. Several well known special cases, where we have, e.g., a uniform matroid and a budget, or no matroid constraint (i.e., the classic knapsack problem), admit a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme (FPTAS). In contrast, already a slight generalization to the multi-budgeted matroid independent set problem has a PTAS but does not admit an efficient polynomial-time approximation scheme (EPTAS). This implies a PTAS for our problem, which is the best known result prior to this work. Our main contribution is an EPTAS for the budgeted matroid independent set problem. A key idea of the scheme is to find a representative set for the instance, whose cardinality depends solely on $1/\varepsilon$, where $\varepsilon > 0$ is the accuracy parameter of the scheme. The representative set is identified via matroid basis minimization, which can be solved by a simple greedy algorithm. Our scheme enumerates over subsets of the representative set and extends each subset using a linear program. The notion of representative sets may be useful in solving other variants of the budgeted matroid independent set problem.
summary: We consider the budgeted matroid independent set problem. The input is a ground set, where each element has a cost and a non-negative profit, along with a matroid over the elements and a budget. The goal is to select a subset of elements which maximizes the total profit subject to the matroid and budget constraints. Several well known special cases, where we have, e.g., a uniform matroid and a budget, or no matroid constraint (i.e., the classic knapsack problem), admit a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme (FPTAS). In contrast, already a slight generalization to the multi-budgeted matroid independent set problem has a PTAS but does not admit an efficient polynomial-time approximation scheme (EPTAS). This implies a PTAS for our problem, which is the best known result prior to this work. Our main contribution is an EPTAS for the budgeted matroid independent set problem. A key idea of the scheme is to find a representative set for the instance, whose cardinality depends solely on $1/\varepsilon$, where $\varepsilon > 0$ is the accuracy parameter of the scheme. The representative set is identified via matroid basis minimization, which can be solved by a simple greedy algorithm. Our scheme enumerates over subsets of the representative set and extends each subset using a linear program. The notion of representative sets may be useful in solving other variants of the budgeted matroid independent set problem.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑预算拟阵独立集问题。输入是一个基础集，其中每个元素都有成本和非负利润，以及元素和预算的拟阵。目标是选择一个元素子集，在拟阵和预算约束下最大化总利润。几个众所周知的特殊情况，例如，我们有统一拟阵和预算，或没有拟阵约束（即经典的背包问题），都承认完全多项式时间近似方案（FPTAS）。相比之下，已经对多预算拟阵独立集问题进行了轻微推广，具有 PTAS，但不承认有效的多项式时间逼近方案（EPTAS）。这意味着我们的问题有一个 PTAS，这是这项工作之前最知名的结果。我们的主要贡献是针对预算拟阵独立集问题的 EPTAS。该方案的一个关键思想是找到实例的代表集，其基数仅取决于 $1/\varepsilon$，其中 $\varepsilon > 0$ 是该方案的精度参数。代表集是通过拟阵基最小化来识别的，这可以通过简单的贪心算法来求解。我们的方案枚举了代表性集合的子集，并使用线性程序扩展每个子集。代表性集的概念可能有助于解决预算拟阵独立集问题的其他变体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对预算化拟阵独立集问题的高效多项式时间近似方案（EPTAS）。
AI.motivation: 尽管预算化拟阵独立集问题的某些特例已有完全多项式时间近似方案（FPTAS），但其一般化形式仅存在多项式时间近似方案（PTAS），缺乏更高效的EPTAS。
AI.method: 通过构建仅依赖于精度参数ε的代表集，结合拟阵基最小化贪心算法与线性规划扩展子集的方法，实现近似解的高效枚举。
AI.result: 设计出首个针对预算化拟阵独立集问题的EPTAS，代表集的构造方法可能为其他问题变体提供解决思路。
AI.conclusion: 该成果填补了预算化拟阵独立集问题在近似算法效率上的空白，代表集方法具有潜在的广泛应用价值。

result: 设计出首个针对预算化拟阵独立集问题的EPTAS，代表集的构造方法可能为其他问题变体提供解决思路。
conclusion: 该成果填补了预算化拟阵独立集问题在近似算法效率上的空白，代表集方法具有潜在的广泛应用价值。
search_text: An EPTAS for Budgeted Matroid Independent Set 预算拟阵独立集的EPTAS We consider the budgeted matroid independent set problem. The input is a ground set, where each element has a cost and a non-negative profit, along with a matroid over the elements and a budget. The goal is to select a subset of elements which maximizes the total profit subject to the matroid and budget constraints. Several well known special cases, where we have, e.g., a uniform matroid and a budget, or no matroid constraint (i.e., the classic knapsack problem), admit a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme (FPTAS). In contrast, already a slight generalization to the multi-budgeted matroid independent set problem has a PTAS but does not admit an efficient polynomial-time approximation scheme (EPTAS). This implies a PTAS for our problem, which is the best known result prior to this work. Our main contribution is an EPTAS for the budgeted matroid independent set problem. A key idea of the scheme is to find a representative set for the instance, whose cardinality depends solely on $1/\varepsilon$, where $\varepsilon > 0$ is the accuracy parameter of the scheme. The representative set is identified via matroid basis minimization, which can be solved by a simple greedy algorithm. Our scheme enumerates over subsets of the representative set and extends each subset using a linear program. The notion of representative sets may be useful in solving other variants of the budgeted matroid independent set problem. 我们考虑预算拟阵独立集问题。输入是一个基础集，其中每个元素都有成本和非负利润，以及元素和预算的拟阵。目标是选择一个元素子集，在拟阵和预算约束下最大化总利润。几个众所周知的特殊情况，例如，我们有统一拟阵和预算，或没有拟阵约束（即经典的背包问题），都承认完全多项式时间近似方案（FPTAS）。相比之下，已经对多预算拟阵独立集问题进行了轻微推广，具有 PTAS，但不承认有效的多项式时间逼近方案（EPTAS）。这意味着我们的问题有一个 PTAS，这是这项工作之前最知名的结果。我们的主要贡献是针对预算拟阵独立集问题的 EPTAS。该方案的一个关键思想是找到实例的代表集，其基数仅取决于 $1/\varepsilon$，其中 $\varepsilon > 0$ 是该方案的精度参数。代表集是通过拟阵基最小化来识别的，这可以通过简单的贪心算法来求解。我们的方案枚举了代表性集合的子集，并使用线性程序扩展每个子集。代表性集的概念可能有助于解决预算拟阵独立集问题的其他变体。 本文提出了一种针对预算化拟阵独立集问题的高效多项式时间近似方案（EPTAS）。 Ilan Doron-Arad,Ariel Kulik,Hadas Shachnai cs.DS

title: Application of Machine Learning for Online Reputation Systems
title_zh: 机器学习在在线信誉系统中的应用
abstract: Users on the internet usually require venues to provide better purchasing recommendations. This can be provided by a reputation system that processes ratings to provide recommendations. The rating aggregation process is a main part of reputation system to produce global opinion about the product quality. Naive methods that are frequently used do not consider consumer profiles in its calculation and cannot discover unfair ratings and trends emerging in new ratings. Other sophisticated rating aggregation methods that use weighted average technique focus on one or a few aspects of consumers profile data. This paper proposes a new reputation system using machine learning to predict reliability of consumers from consumer profile. In particular, we construct a new consumer profile dataset by extracting a set of factors that have great impact on consumer reliability, which serve as an input to machine learning algorithms. The predicted weight is then integrated with a weighted average method to compute product reputation score. The proposed model has been evaluated over three MovieLens benchmarking datasets, using 10-Folds cross validation. Furthermore, the performance of the proposed model has been compared to previous published rating aggregation models. The obtained results were promising which suggest that the proposed approach could be a potential solution for reputation systems. The results of comparison demonstrated the accuracy of our models. Finally, the proposed approach can be integrated with online recommendation systems to provide better purchasing recommendations and facilitate user experience on online shopping markets.
summary: Users on the internet usually require venues to provide better purchasing recommendations. This can be provided by a reputation system that processes ratings to provide recommendations. The rating aggregation process is a main part of reputation system to produce global opinion about the product quality. Naive methods that are frequently used do not consider consumer profiles in its calculation and cannot discover unfair ratings and trends emerging in new ratings. Other sophisticated rating aggregation methods that use weighted average technique focus on one or a few aspects of consumers profile data. This paper proposes a new reputation system using machine learning to predict reliability of consumers from consumer profile. In particular, we construct a new consumer profile dataset by extracting a set of factors that have great impact on consumer reliability, which serve as an input to machine learning algorithms. The predicted weight is then integrated with a weighted average method to compute product reputation score. The proposed model has been evaluated over three MovieLens benchmarking datasets, using 10-Folds cross validation. Furthermore, the performance of the proposed model has been compared to previous published rating aggregation models. The obtained results were promising which suggest that the proposed approach could be a potential solution for reputation systems. The results of comparison demonstrated the accuracy of our models. Finally, the proposed approach can be integrated with online recommendation systems to provide better purchasing recommendations and facilitate user experience on online shopping markets.
abstract_zh: 互联网上的用户通常需要场所提供更好的购买推荐。这可以由处理评级以提供推荐的声誉系统来提供。评级聚合过程是声誉系统的主要组成部分，用于产生有关产品质量的全球意见。经常使用的简单方法在计算中不会考虑消费者概况，也无法发现不公平的评级和新评级中出现的趋势。其他使用加权平均技术的复杂评级聚合方法侧重于消费者档案数据的一个或几个方面。本文提出了一种新的声誉系统，利用机器学习从消费者档案中预测消费者的可靠性。特别是，我们通过提取一组对消费者可靠性有很大影响的因素来构建新的消费者档案数据集，作为机器学习算法的输入。然后将预测权重与加权平均方法相结合来计算产品声誉得分。所提出的模型已使用 10 倍交叉验证在三个 MovieLens 基准数据集上进行了评估。此外，所提出模型的性能已与之前发布的评级聚合模型进行了比较。获得的结果很有希望，这表明所提出的方法可能是声誉系统的潜在解决方案。比较结果证明了我们模型的准确性。最后，所提出的方法可以与在线推荐系统集成，以提供更好的购买推荐并促进在线购物市场的用户体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的在线声誉系统，通过预测消费者可靠性来改进产品评分计算方法。
AI.motivation: 传统评分聚合方法未考虑消费者画像信息，难以发现不公平评分和新兴趋势，需更精准的可靠性评估机制。
AI.method: 构建包含消费者画像关键因素的数据集，利用机器学习预测消费者可靠性权重，并将其与加权平均法结合计算产品声誉分。
AI.result: 在MovieLens数据集上通过10折交叉验证验证，模型准确性优于现有方法，实验结果具有显著提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效增强在线推荐系统，为电商平台提供更精准的购买建议和用户体验优化方案。

authors_text: Hans Dermot Doran,Prosper Leibundgut,Sami Qazimi,Roman Fritschi
title: Mixed Criticality Communication within an Unmanned Delivery Rotorcraft
title_zh: 无人配送旋翼机内的混合临界通信
comment: Presented at the 48th European Rotorcraft Forum (ERF,) Winterthur, 2022
comments: Presented at the 48th European Rotorcraft Forum (ERF,) Winterthur, 2022
abstract: Stand-alone functions additional to a UAV flight-controller, such as safety-relevant flight-path monitoring or payload-monitoring and control, may be SORA-required or advised for specific flight paths of delivery-drones. These functions, articulated as discrete electronic components either internal or external to the main fuselage, can be networked with other on-board electronics systems. Such an integration requires respecting the integrity levels of each component on the network both in terms of function and in terms of power-supply. In this body of work we detail an intra-component communication system for small autonomous and semi-autonomous unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs.) We discuss the context and the (conservative) design decisions before detailing the hardware and software interfaces and reporting on a first implementation. We finish by drawing conclusions and proposing future work.
summary: Stand-alone functions additional to a UAV flight-controller, such as safety-relevant flight-path monitoring or payload-monitoring and control, may be SORA-required or advised for specific flight paths of delivery-drones. These functions, articulated as discrete electronic components either internal or external to the main fuselage, can be networked with other on-board electronics systems. Such an integration requires respecting the integrity levels of each component on the network both in terms of function and in terms of power-supply. In this body of work we detail an intra-component communication system for small autonomous and semi-autonomous unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs.) We discuss the context and the (conservative) design decisions before detailing the hardware and software interfaces and reporting on a first implementation. We finish by drawing conclusions and proposing future work.
abstract_zh: 除了无人机飞行控制器之外的独立功能，例如安全相关的飞行路径监控或有效负载监控和控制，可能是 SORA 所要求的，或者建议针对送货无人机的特定飞行路径。这些功能作为分立电子元件连接在主机身内部或外部，可以与其他机载电子系统联网。这种集成需要尊重网络上每个组件在功能和电源方面的完整性级别。在本文中，我们详细介绍了小型自主和半自主无人机 (UAV) 的组件内通信系统。在详细介绍硬件和软件接口并报告首次实现之前，我们讨论了背景和（保守的）设计决策。我们最后得出结论并提出未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种适用于小型无人机的混合关键性通信系统，以确保安全相关功能与常规功能间的可靠通信。
AI.motivation: 无人机在集成安全关键功能（如飞行路径监控）与常规功能时，需满足不同安全等级的通信需求，现有系统难以兼顾功能完整性与电源隔离。
AI.method: 通过分析安全需求与电源隔离要求，设计硬件接口与软件协议，实现不同关键性等级组件间的通信隔离与资源分配，并完成原型验证。
AI.result: 成功构建了支持多安全等级通信的无人机通信系统，验证了其在功能隔离与电源管理方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统满足无人机混合关键性通信需求，未来可进一步优化资源分配策略并扩展至更多应用场景。

title: CoreDeep: Improving Crack Detection Algorithms Using Width Stochasticity
title_zh: CoreDeep：利用宽度随机性改进裂纹检测算法
abstract: Automatically detecting or segmenting cracks in images can help in reducing the cost of maintenance or operations. Detecting, measuring and quantifying cracks for distress analysis in challenging background scenarios is a difficult task as there is no clear boundary that separates cracks from the background. Developed algorithms should handle the inherent challenges associated with data. Some of the perceptually noted challenges are color, intensity, depth, blur, motion-blur, orientation, different region of interest (ROI) for the defect, scale, illumination, complex and challenging background, etc. These variations occur across (crack inter class) and within images (crack intra-class variabilities). Overall, there is significant background (inter) and foreground (intra-class) variability. In this work, we have attempted to reduce the effect of these variations in challenging background scenarios. We have proposed a stochastic width (SW) approach to reduce the effect of these variations. Our proposed approach improves detectability and significantly reduces false positives and negatives. We have measured the performance of our algorithm objectively in terms of mean IoU, false positives and negatives and subjectively in terms of perceptual quality.
summary: Automatically detecting or segmenting cracks in images can help in reducing the cost of maintenance or operations. Detecting, measuring and quantifying cracks for distress analysis in challenging background scenarios is a difficult task as there is no clear boundary that separates cracks from the background. Developed algorithms should handle the inherent challenges associated with data. Some of the perceptually noted challenges are color, intensity, depth, blur, motion-blur, orientation, different region of interest (ROI) for the defect, scale, illumination, complex and challenging background, etc. These variations occur across (crack inter class) and within images (crack intra-class variabilities). Overall, there is significant background (inter) and foreground (intra-class) variability. In this work, we have attempted to reduce the effect of these variations in challenging background scenarios. We have proposed a stochastic width (SW) approach to reduce the effect of these variations. Our proposed approach improves detectability and significantly reduces false positives and negatives. We have measured the performance of our algorithm objectively in terms of mean IoU, false positives and negatives and subjectively in terms of perceptual quality.
abstract_zh: 自动检测或分割图像中的裂缝有助于降低维护或运营成本。在具有挑战性的背景场景中检测、测量和量化裂纹以进行遇险分析是一项艰巨的任务，因为没有明确的边界将裂纹与背景分开。开发的算法应该能够应对与数据相关的固有挑战。一些感知上注意到的挑战是颜色、强度、深度、模糊、运动模糊、方向、缺陷的不同感兴趣区域 (ROI)、比例、照明、复杂和具有挑战性的背景等。这些变化发生在图像之间（类间裂纹）和图像内部（类内裂纹）。总体而言，存在显着的背景（间）和前景（类内）变异性。在这项工作中，我们试图减少这些变化在具有挑战性的背景场景中的影响。我们提出了一种随机宽度（SW）方法来减少这些变化的影响。我们提出的方法提高了可检测性并显着减少了误报和漏报。我们客观地测量了算法的平均 IoU、误报和漏报的性能，并主观地测量了感知质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于宽度随机性的方法（CoreDeep），旨在改进复杂背景下裂缝检测算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有裂缝检测算法在面对颜色、光照、背景复杂性等变化时，存在误检和漏检问题，需提升算法鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过引入宽度随机性（Stochastic Width, SW）策略，增强模型对裂缝尺度和背景变化的适应能力，减少误检与漏检。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在客观指标（如平均IoU）和主观感知质量上均优于现有方法，显著降低了假阳性和假阴性。
AI.conclusion: 宽度随机性方法有效缓解了裂缝检测中的背景与目标类内/类间变化问题，提升了检测准确性。

authors_text: Mohammad AL-Oudat,Saleh Alomari,Hazem Qattous,Mohammad Azzeh,Tariq AL-Munaizel
title: An Interactive Automation for Human Biliary Tree Diagnosis Using Computer Vision
title_zh: 使用计算机视觉进行人类胆管树诊断的交互式自动化
abstract: The biliary tree is a network of tubes that connects the liver to the gallbladder, an organ right beneath it. The bile duct is the major tube in the biliary tree. The dilatation of a bile duct is a key indicator for more major problems in the human body, such as stones and tumors, which are frequently caused by the pancreas or the papilla of vater. The detection of bile duct dilatation can be challenging for beginner or untrained medical personnel in many circumstances. Even professionals are unable to detect bile duct dilatation with the naked eye. This research presents a unique vision-based model for biliary tree initial diagnosis. To segment the biliary tree from the Magnetic Resonance Image, the framework used different image processing approaches (MRI). After the image's region of interest was segmented, numerous calculations were performed on it to extract 10 features, including major and minor axes, bile duct area, biliary tree area, compactness, and some textural features (contrast, mean, variance and correlation). This study used a database of images from King Hussein Medical Center in Amman, Jordan, which included 200 MRI images, 100 normal cases, and 100 patients with dilated bile ducts. After the characteristics are extracted, various classifiers are used to determine the patients' condition in terms of their health (normal or dilated). The findings demonstrate that the extracted features perform well with all classifiers in terms of accuracy and area under the curve. This study is unique in that it uses an automated approach to segment the biliary tree from MRI images, as well as scientifically correlating retrieved features with biliary tree status that has never been done before in the literature.

This study used a database of images from King Hussein Medical Center in Amman, Jordan, which included 200 MRI images, 100 normal cases, and 100 patients with dilated bile ducts. abstract_zh: 胆管树是连接肝脏和胆囊（肝脏正下方的器官）的管道网络。胆管是胆管树的主要管道。胆管扩张是人体出现更多重大问题的关键指标，例如结石和肿瘤，这些问题通常是由胰腺或胆乳头引起的。在许多情况下，胆管扩张的检测对于初学者或未经培训的医务人员来说可能具有挑战性。即使是专业人士也无法用肉眼发现胆管扩张。这项研究提出了一种独特的基于视觉的胆道树初始诊断模型。为了从磁共振图像中分割胆管树，该框架使用了不同的图像处理方法（MRI）。图像的感兴趣区域被分割后，对其进行大量计算以提取10个特征，包括长轴和短轴、胆管面积、胆管树面积、紧凑度和一些纹理特征（对比度、均值、方差和相关性）。这项研究使用了约旦安曼侯赛因国王医疗中心的图像数据库，其中包括 200 张 MRI 图像、100 个正常病例和 100 个胆管扩张患者。提取特征后，使用各种分类器来确定患者的健康状况（正常或扩张）。研究结果表明，提取的特征在准确性和曲线下面积方面对所有分类器都表现良好。这项研究的独特之处在于它使用自动化方法从 MRI 图像中分割胆管树，并科学地将检索到的特征与胆管树状态关联起来，这是文献中从未做过的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的自动化方法，用于从磁共振成像（MRI）中分割胆管树并诊断胆管扩张。
AI.motivation: 胆管扩张是胰腺或胆管乳头等问题的关键指标，但手动检测对非专业人员和专业人士均具挑战性，需开发自动化工具以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 通过图像处理技术从MRI中分割胆管树区域，提取10个特征（如面积、轴长、纹理特征等），并使用多种分类器判断患者状态（正常或扩张）。
AI.result: 实验使用约旦安曼侯赛因医学中心的200张MRI图像（100例正常，100例胆管扩张），所有分类器在准确率和曲线下面积（AUC）表现均良好。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次实现了MRI中胆管树的自动化分割，并科学关联了提取特征与胆管状态，为临床诊断提供了新方法。

title: Examining stability of machine learning methods for predicting dementia at early phases of the disease
title_zh: 检查机器学习方法在疾病早期预测痴呆症的稳定性
abstract: Dementia is a neuropsychiatric brain disorder that usually occurs when one or more brain cells stop working partially or at all. Diagnosis of this disorder in the early phases of the disease is a vital task to rescue patients lives from bad consequences and provide them with better healthcare. Machine learning methods have been proven to be accurate in predicting dementia in the early phases of the disease. The prediction of dementia depends heavily on the type of collected data which usually are gathered from Normalized Whole Brain Volume (nWBV) and Atlas Scaling Factor (ASF) which are normally measured and corrected from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRIs). Other biological features such as age and gender can also help in the diagnosis of dementia. Although many studies use machine learning for predicting dementia, we could not reach a conclusion on the stability of these methods for which one is more accurate under different experimental conditions. Therefore, this paper investigates the conclusion stability regarding the performance of machine learning algorithms for dementia prediction. To accomplish this, a large number of experiments were run using 7 machine learning algorithms and two feature reduction algorithms namely, Information Gain (IG) and Principal Component Analysis (PCA). To examine the stability of these algorithms, thresholds of feature selection were changed for the IG from 20% to 100% and the PCA dimension from 2 to 8. This has resulted in 7x9 + 7x7= 112 experiments. In each experiment, various classification evaluation data were recorded. The obtained results show that among seven algorithms the support vector machine and Naive Bayes are the most stable algorithms while changing the selection threshold. Also, it was found that using IG would seem more efficient than using PCA for predicting Dementia.

Although many studies use machine learning for predicting dementia, we could not reach a conclusion on the stability of these methods for which one is more accurate under different experimental conditions. Therefore, this paper investigates the conclusion stability regarding the performance of machine learning algorithms for dementia prediction. To accomplish this, a large number of experiments were run using 7 machine learning algorithms and two feature reduction algorithms namely, Information Gain (IG) and Principal Component Analysis (PCA). To examine the stability of these algorithms, thresholds of feature selection were changed for the IG from 20% to 100% and the PCA dimension from 2 to 8. This has resulted in 7x9 + 7x7= 112 experiments. In each experiment, various classification evaluation data were recorded. The obtained results show that among seven algorithms the support vector machine and Naive Bayes are the most stable algorithms while changing the selection threshold. Also, it was found that using IG would seem more efficient than using PCA for predicting Dementia.
abstract_zh: 痴呆症是一种神经精神性脑部疾病，通常在一个或多个脑细胞部分或完全停止工作时发生。在疾病的早期阶段诊断这种疾病是一项至关重要的任务，可以挽救患者的生命，使其免受不良后果的影响，并为他们提供更好的医疗保健。机器学习方法已被证明可以准确地预测疾病早期阶段的痴呆症。痴呆症的预测在很大程度上取决于收集的数据类型，这些数据通常是从标准化全脑体积 (nWBV) 和图谱缩放因子 (ASF) 中收集的，这些数据通常通过磁共振成像 (MRI) 进行测量和校正。其他生物学特征如年龄和性别也有助于痴呆症的诊断。尽管许多研究使用机器学习来预测痴呆症，但我们无法就这些方法的稳定性得出结论，在不同的实验条件下哪种方法更准确。因此，本文研究了痴呆症预测机器学习算法性能的结论稳定性。为了实现这一目标，使用 7 种机器学习算法和两种特征缩减算法（即信息增益 (IG) 和主成分分析 (PCA)）进行了大量实验。为了检查这些算法的稳定性，IG 的特征选择阈值从 20% 更改为 100%，PCA 维数从 2 更改为 8。这导致了 7x9 + 7x7= 112 次实验。在每个实验中，记录了各种分类评估数据。得到的结果表明，在改变选择阈值的情况下，7种算法中支持向量机和朴素贝叶斯是最稳定的算法。此外，还发现使用 IG 来预测痴呆症似乎比使用 PCA 更有效。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了七种机器学习算法在不同实验条件下预测早期痴呆的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 早期痴呆诊断对患者预后至关重要，但现有机器学习方法的稳定性尚未明确，需确定哪种算法在不同条件下表现更可靠。
AI.method: 使用7种机器学习算法与两种特征降维方法（信息增益IG和主成分分析PCA），通过调整特征选择阈值（IG:20%-100%；PCA维度:2-8）进行112次实验，记录分类评估数据。
AI.result: 支持向量机（SVM）和朴素贝叶斯（Naive Bayes）在阈值变化下最稳定，且信息增益（IG）比PCA更高效。
AI.conclusion: SVM和朴素贝叶斯适合痴呆预测，IG作为特征选择方法优于PCA。

search_text: Examining stability of machine learning methods for predicting dementia at early phases of the disease 检查机器学习方法在疾病早期预测痴呆症的稳定性 Dementia is a neuropsychiatric brain disorder that usually occurs when one or more brain cells stop working partially or at all. Diagnosis of this disorder in the early phases of the disease is a vital task to rescue patients lives from bad consequences and provide them with better healthcare. Machine learning methods have been proven to be accurate in predicting dementia in the early phases of the disease. The prediction of dementia depends heavily on the type of collected data which usually are gathered from Normalized Whole Brain Volume (nWBV) and Atlas Scaling Factor (ASF) which are normally measured and corrected from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRIs). Other biological features such as age and gender can also help in the diagnosis of dementia. Although many studies use machine learning for predicting dementia, we could not reach a conclusion on the stability of these methods for which one is more accurate under different experimental conditions. Therefore, this paper investigates the conclusion stability regarding the performance of machine learning algorithms for dementia prediction. To accomplish this, a large number of experiments were run using 7 machine learning algorithms and two feature reduction algorithms namely, Information Gain (IG) and Principal Component Analysis (PCA). To examine the stability of these algorithms, thresholds of feature selection were changed for the IG from 20% to 100% and the PCA dimension from 2 to 8. This has resulted in 7x9 + 7x7= 112 experiments. In each experiment, various classification evaluation data were recorded. The obtained results show that among seven algorithms the support vector machine and Naive Bayes are the most stable algorithms while changing the selection threshold. Also, it was found that using IG would seem more efficient than using PCA for predicting Dementia. 痴呆症是一种神经精神性脑部疾病，通常在一个或多个脑细胞部分或完全停止工作时发生。在疾病的早期阶段诊断这种疾病是一项至关重要的任务，可以挽救患者的生命，使其免受不良后果的影响，并为他们提供更好的医疗保健。机器学习方法已被证明可以准确地预测疾病早期阶段的痴呆症。痴呆症的预测在很大程度上取决于收集的数据类型，这些数据通常是从标准化全脑体积 (nWBV) 和图谱缩放因子 (ASF) 中收集的，这些数据通常通过磁共振成像 (MRI) 进行测量和校正。其他生物学特征如年龄和性别也有助于痴呆症的诊断。尽管许多研究使用机器学习来预测痴呆症，但我们无法就这些方法的稳定性得出结论，在不同的实验条件下哪种方法更准确。因此，本文研究了痴呆症预测机器学习算法性能的结论稳定性。为了实现这一目标，使用 7 种机器学习算法和两种特征缩减算法（即信息增益 (IG) 和主成分分析 (PCA)）进行了大量实验。为了检查这些算法的稳定性，IG 的特征选择阈值从 20% 更改为 100%，PCA 维数从 2 更改为 8。这导致了 7x9 + 7x7= 112 次实验。在每个实验中，记录了各种分类评估数据。得到的结果表明，在改变选择阈值的情况下，7种算法中支持向量机和朴素贝叶斯是最稳定的算法。此外，还发现使用 IG 来预测痴呆症似乎比使用 PCA 更有效。 该论文评估了七种机器学习算法在不同实验条件下预测早期痴呆的稳定性。 Sinan Faouri,Mahmood AlBashayreh,Mohammad Azzeh cs.LG,cs.AI

title: LSDNet: Trainable Modification of LSD Algorithm for Real-Time Line Segment Detection
title_zh: LSDNet：用于实时线段检测的 LSD 算法的可训练修改
comment: ef:IEEE Access. 2022 Apr 21;10:45256-65
comments: ef:IEEE Access. 2022 Apr 21;10:45256-65
abstract: As of today, the best accuracy in line segment detection (LSD) is achieved by algorithms based on convolutional neural networks - CNNs. Unfortunately, these methods utilize deep, heavy networks and are slower than traditional model-based detectors. In this paper we build an accurate yet fast CNN- based detector, LSDNet, by incorporating a lightweight CNN into a classical LSD detector. Specifically, we replace the first step of the original LSD algorithm - construction of line segments heatmap and tangent field from raw image gradients - with a lightweight CNN, which is able to calculate more complex and rich features. The second part of the LSD algorithm is used with only minor modifications. Compared with several modern line segment detectors on standard Wireframe dataset, the proposed LSDNet provides the highest speed (among CNN-based detectors) of 214 FPS with a competitive accuracy of 78 Fh . Although the best-reported accuracy is 83 Fh at 33 FPS, we speculate that the observed accuracy gap is caused by errors in annotations and the actual gap is significantly lower. We point out systematic inconsistencies in the annotations of popular line detection benchmarks - Wireframe and York Urban, carefully reannotate a subset of images and show that (i) existing detectors have improved quality on updated annotations without retraining, suggesting that new annotations correlate better with the notion of correct line segment detection; (ii) the gap between accuracies of our detector and others diminishes to negligible 0.2 Fh , with our method being the fastest.
summary: As of today, the best accuracy in line segment detection (LSD) is achieved by algorithms based on convolutional neural networks - CNNs. Unfortunately, these methods utilize deep, heavy networks and are slower than traditional model-based detectors. In this paper we build an accurate yet fast CNN- based detector, LSDNet, by incorporating a lightweight CNN into a classical LSD detector. Specifically, we replace the first step of the original LSD algorithm - construction of line segments heatmap and tangent field from raw image gradients - with a lightweight CNN, which is able to calculate more complex and rich features. The second part of the LSD algorithm is used with only minor modifications. Compared with several modern line segment detectors on standard Wireframe dataset, the proposed LSDNet provides the highest speed (among CNN-based detectors) of 214 FPS with a competitive accuracy of 78 Fh . Although the best-reported accuracy is 83 Fh at 33 FPS, we speculate that the observed accuracy gap is caused by errors in annotations and the actual gap is significantly lower. We point out systematic inconsistencies in the annotations of popular line detection benchmarks - Wireframe and York Urban, carefully reannotate a subset of images and show that (i) existing detectors have improved quality on updated annotations without retraining, suggesting that new annotations correlate better with the notion of correct line segment detection; (ii) the gap between accuracies of our detector and others diminishes to negligible 0.2 Fh , with our method being the fastest.
abstract_zh: 截至目前，线段检测 (LSD) 的最佳精度是通过基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的算法实现的。不幸的是，这些方法利用深度、重型网络，并且比传统的基于模型的检测器慢。在本文中，我们通过将轻量级 CNN 合并到经典的 LSD 检测器中，构建了一个准确而快速的基于 CNN 的检测器 LSDNet。具体来说，我们用轻量级的 CNN 代替了原始 LSD 算法的第一步——从原始图像梯度构建线段热图和切线场，它能够计算更复杂和丰富的特征。 LSD 算法的第二部分仅经过较小的修改即可使用。与标准线框数据集上的几种现代线段检测器相比，所提出的 LSDNet 提供了 214 FPS 的最高速度（基于 CNN 的检测器），具有 78 Fh 的竞争精度。尽管报告的最佳准确度为 33 FPS 时的 83 Fh，但我们推测观察到的准确度差距是由注释错误引起的，而实际差距要低得多。我们指出了流行的线检测基准 - Wireframe 和 York Urban 注释中的系统不一致，仔细地重新注释了图像子集，并表明（i）现有检测器在无需重新训练的情况下提高了更新注释的质量，这表明新注释与正确线段检测的概念更好地相关； (ii) 我们的检测器和其他检测器的精度之间的差距缩小到可以忽略不计的 0.2 Fh ，而我们的方法是最快的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LSDNet，通过将轻量级CNN与经典LSD算法结合，实现高速且准确的线段检测。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法精度高但速度慢，传统LSD算法速度虽快但精度不足，需平衡二者以实现实时检测。
AI.method: 用轻量级CNN替代LSD算法中原始梯度处理步骤，保留并微调其后续流程，提升特征表达能力。
AI.result: 在Wireframe数据集上达到214 FPS（最快CNN方法），准确率78 Fh；重新标注后与最佳方法差距缩小至0.2 Fh。
AI.conclusion: LSDNet在速度与精度间取得最优平衡，同时揭示了线段检测数据集标注存在系统性偏差。

Unfortunately, these methods utilize deep, heavy networks and are slower than traditional model-based detectors. In this paper we build an accurate yet fast CNN- based detector, LSDNet, by incorporating a lightweight CNN into a classical LSD detector. Specifically, we replace the first step of the original LSD algorithm - construction of line segments heatmap and tangent field from raw image gradients - with a lightweight CNN, which is able to calculate more complex and rich features. The second part of the LSD algorithm is used with only minor modifications. Compared with several modern line segment detectors on standard Wireframe dataset, the proposed LSDNet provides the highest speed (among CNN-based detectors) of 214 FPS with a competitive accuracy of 78 Fh . Although the best-reported accuracy is 83 Fh at 33 FPS, we speculate that the observed accuracy gap is caused by errors in annotations and the actual gap is significantly lower. We point out systematic inconsistencies in the annotations of popular line detection benchmarks - Wireframe and York Urban, carefully reannotate a subset of images and show that (i) existing detectors have improved quality on updated annotations without retraining, suggesting that new annotations correlate better with the notion of correct line segment detection; (ii) the gap between accuracies of our detector and others diminishes to negligible 0.2 Fh , with our method being the fastest. 截至目前，线段检测 (LSD) 的最佳精度是通过基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的算法实现的。不幸的是，这些方法利用深度、重型网络，并且比传统的基于模型的检测器慢。在本文中，我们通过将轻量级 CNN 合并到经典的 LSD 检测器中，构建了一个准确而快速的基于 CNN 的检测器 LSDNet。具体来说，我们用轻量级的 CNN 代替了原始 LSD 算法的第一步——从原始图像梯度构建线段热图和切线场，它能够计算更复杂和丰富的特征。 LSD 算法的第二部分仅经过较小的修改即可使用。与标准线框数据集上的几种现代线段检测器相比，所提出的 LSDNet 提供了 214 FPS 的最高速度（基于 CNN 的检测器），具有 78 Fh 的竞争精度。尽管报告的最佳准确度为 33 FPS 时的 83 Fh，但我们推测观察到的准确度差距是由注释错误引起的，而实际差距要低得多。我们指出了流行的线检测基准 - Wireframe 和 York Urban 注释中的系统不一致，仔细地重新注释了图像子集，并表明（i）现有检测器在无需重新训练的情况下提高了更新注释的质量，这表明新注释与正确线段检测的概念更好地相关； (ii) 我们的检测器和其他检测器的精度之间的差距缩小到可以忽略不计的 0.2 Fh ，而我们的方法是最快的。 本文提出LSDNet，通过将轻量级CNN与经典LSD算法结合，实现高速且准确的线段检测。 Lev Teplyakov,Leonid Erlygin,Evgeny Shvets cs.CV

authors_text: Haiyang Mei,Xin Yang,Letian Yu,Qiang Zhang,Xiaopeng Wei,Rynson W. H. Lau
title: Large-Field Contextual Feature Learning for Glass Detection
title_zh: 用于玻璃检测的大视场上下文特征学习
abstract: Glass is very common in our daily life. Existing computer vision systems neglect it and thus may have severe consequences, e.g., a robot may crash into a glass wall. However, sensing the presence of glass is not straightforward. The key challenge is that arbitrary objects/scenes can appear behind the glass. In this paper, we propose an important problem of detecting glass surfaces from a single RGB image. To address this problem, we construct the first large-scale glass detection dataset (GDD) and propose a novel glass detection network, called GDNet-B, which explores abundant contextual cues in a large field-of-view via a novel large-field contextual feature integration (LCFI) module and integrates both high-level and low-level boundary features with a boundary feature enhancement (BFE) module. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our GDNet-B achieves satisfying glass detection results on the images within and beyond the GDD testing set. We further validate the effectiveness and generalization capability of our proposed GDNet-B by applying it to other vision tasks, including mirror segmentation and salient object detection. Finally, we show the potential applications of glass detection and discuss possible future research directions.
summary: Glass is very common in our daily life. Existing computer vision systems neglect it and thus may have severe consequences, e.g., a robot may crash into a glass wall. However, sensing the presence of glass is not straightforward. The key challenge is that arbitrary objects/scenes can appear behind the glass. In this paper, we propose an important problem of detecting glass surfaces from a single RGB image. To address this problem, we construct the first large-scale glass detection dataset (GDD) and propose a novel glass detection network, called GDNet-B, which explores abundant contextual cues in a large field-of-view via a novel large-field contextual feature integration (LCFI) module and integrates both high-level and low-level boundary features with a boundary feature enhancement (BFE) module. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our GDNet-B achieves satisfying glass detection results on the images within and beyond the GDD testing set. We further validate the effectiveness and generalization capability of our proposed GDNet-B by applying it to other vision tasks, including mirror segmentation and salient object detection. Finally, we show the potential applications of glass detection and discuss possible future research directions.
abstract_zh: 玻璃在我们的日常生活中很常见。现有的计算机视觉系统忽略了它，因此可能会产生严重的后果，例如机器人可能会撞到玻璃墙。然而，感知玻璃的存在并不简单。关键的挑战是玻璃后面可能出现任意物体/场景。在本文中，我们提出了从单个 RGB 图像中检测玻璃表面的重要问题。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了第一个大规模玻璃检测数据集（GDD），并提出了一种新颖的玻璃检测网络，称为GDNet-B，该网络通过新颖的大视场上下文特征集成（LCFI）模块探索大视场中的丰富上下文线索，并将高级和低级边界特征与边界特征增强（BFE）模块集成。大量实验表明，我们的 GDNet-B 在 GDD 测试集内外的图像上取得了令人满意的玻璃检测结果。我们通过将其应用于其他视觉任务（包括镜像分割和显着目标检测）来进一步验证我们提出的 GDNet-B 的有效性和泛化能力。最后，我们展示了玻璃检测的潜在应用并讨论了未来可能的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从单张RGB图像中检测玻璃表面的方法，解决现有视觉系统忽视玻璃导致的安全问题。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉系统未有效检测玻璃，可能引发碰撞等危险；玻璃后场景复杂，检测难度大。
AI.method: 构建首个大规模玻璃检测数据集GDD，设计GDNet-B网络，包含大视野上下文特征整合模块（LCFI）和边界特征增强模块（BFE）。
AI.result: GDNet-B在GDD测试集及镜面分割、显著物体检测等任务中均表现优异，验证了方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决玻璃检测难题，展示了在安全感知等领域的应用潜力，未来可探索更复杂场景的检测技术。
