search_text: Large-Field Contextual Feature Learning for Glass Detection 用于玻璃检测的大视场上下文特征学习 Glass is very common in our daily life. Existing computer vision systems neglect it and thus may have severe consequences, e.g., a robot may crash into a glass wall. However, sensing the presence of glass is not straightforward. The key challenge is that arbitrary objects/scenes can appear behind the glass. In this paper, we propose an important problem of detecting glass surfaces from a single RGB image. To address this problem, we construct the first large-scale glass detection dataset (GDD) and propose a novel glass detection network, called GDNet-B, which explores abundant contextual cues in a large field-of-view via a novel large-field contextual feature integration (LCFI) module and integrates both high-level and low-level boundary features with a boundary feature enhancement (BFE) module. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our GDNet-B achieves satisfying glass detection results on the images within and beyond the GDD testing set. We further validate the effectiveness and generalization capability of our proposed GDNet-B by applying it to other vision tasks, including mirror segmentation and salient object detection. Finally, we show the potential applications of glass detection and discuss possible future research directions. 玻璃在我们的日常生活中很常见。现有的计算机视觉系统忽略了它，因此可能会产生严重的后果，例如机器人可能会撞到玻璃墙。然而，感知玻璃的存在并不简单。关键的挑战是玻璃后面可能出现任意物体/场景。在本文中，我们提出了从单个 RGB 图像中检测玻璃表面的重要问题。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了第一个大规模玻璃检测数据集（GDD），并提出了一种新颖的玻璃检测网络，称为GDNet-B，该网络通过新颖的大视场上下文特征集成（LCFI）模块探索大视场中的丰富上下文线索，并将高级和低级边界特征与边界特征增强（BFE）模块集成。大量实验表明，我们的 GDNet-B 在 GDD 测试集内外的图像上取得了令人满意的玻璃检测结果。我们通过将其应用于其他视觉任务（包括镜像分割和显着目标检测）来进一步验证我们提出的 GDNet-B 的有效性和泛化能力。最后，我们展示了玻璃检测的潜在应用并讨论了未来可能的研究方向。 本文提出从单张RGB图像中检测玻璃表面的方法，解决现有视觉系统忽视玻璃导致的安全问题。 Haiyang Mei,Xin Yang,Letian Yu,Qiang Zhang,Xiaopeng Wei,Rynson W. H. Lau cs.CV

authors_text: Yan Zhao,Liwei Deng,Xuanhao Chen,Chenjuan Guo,Bin Yang,Tung Kieu,Feiteng Huang,Torben Bach Pedersen,Kai Zheng,Christian S. Jensen
title: A Comparative Study on Unsupervised Anomaly Detection for Time Series: Experiments and Analysis
title_zh: 时间序列无监督异常检测的比较研究：实验与分析
abstract: The continued digitization of societal processes translates into a proliferation of time series data that cover applications such as fraud detection, intrusion detection, and energy management, where anomaly detection is often essential to enable reliability and safety. Many recent studies target anomaly detection for time series data. Indeed, area of time series anomaly detection is characterized by diverse data, methods, and evaluation strategies, and comparisons in existing studies consider only part of this diversity, which makes it difficult to select the best method for a particular problem setting. To address this shortcoming, we introduce taxonomies for data, methods, and evaluation strategies, provide a comprehensive overview of unsupervised time series anomaly detection using the taxonomies, and systematically evaluate and compare state-of-the-art traditional as well as deep learning techniques. In the empirical study using nine publicly available datasets, we apply the most commonly-used performance evaluation metrics to typical methods under a fair implementation standard. Based on the structuring offered by the taxonomies, we report on empirical studies and provide guidelines, in the form of comparative tables, for choosing the methods most suitable for particular application settings. Finally, we propose research directions for this dynamic field.
summary: The continued digitization of societal processes translates into a proliferation of time series data that cover applications such as fraud detection, intrusion detection, and energy management, where anomaly detection is often essential to enable reliability and safety. Many recent studies target anomaly detection for time series data. Indeed, area of time series anomaly detection is characterized by diverse data, methods, and evaluation strategies, and comparisons in existing studies consider only part of this diversity, which makes it difficult to select the best method for a particular problem setting. To address this shortcoming, we introduce taxonomies for data, methods, and evaluation strategies, provide a comprehensive overview of unsupervised time series anomaly detection using the taxonomies, and systematically evaluate and compare state-of-the-art traditional as well as deep learning techniques. In the empirical study using nine publicly available datasets, we apply the most commonly-used performance evaluation metrics to typical methods under a fair implementation standard. Based on the structuring offered by the taxonomies, we report on empirical studies and provide guidelines, in the form of comparative tables, for choosing the methods most suitable for particular application settings. Finally, we propose research directions for this dynamic field.
abstract_zh: 社会流程的持续数字化转化为时间序列数据的激增，涵盖欺诈检测、入侵检测和能源管理等应用，其中异常检测通常对于实现可靠性和安全性至关重要。最近许多研究的目标是时间序列数据的异常检测。事实上，时间序列异常检测领域的特点是数据、方法和评估策略多样化，现有研究中的比较只考虑了这种多样性的一部分，这使得很难针对特定问题设置选择最佳方法。为了解决这个缺点，我们引入了数据分类法、方法和评估策略，全面概述了使用分类法进行无监督时间序列异常检测，并系统地评估和比较了最先进的传统和深度学习技术。在使用九个公开数据集的实证研究中，我们将最常用的性能评估指标应用于公平实施标准下的典型方法。根据分类法提供的结构，我们报告实证研究并以比较表的形式提供指南，以选择最适合特定应用设置的方法。最后，我们提出了这个动态领域的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对时间序列的无监督异常检测方法进行全面比较和分析，提出分类体系并提供方法选择指南。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对时间序列异常检测方法的比较不够全面，难以针对具体场景选择最优方法。
AI.method: 构建数据、方法和评估策略的分类体系，系统评估传统与深度学习方法，并基于九个公开数据集进行实验对比。
AI.result: 通过实证研究总结不同方法的性能表现，生成比较表格以指导特定应用场景下的方法选择。
AI.conclusion: 总结当前方法的适用场景与局限性，并提出未来研究方向以推动该领域发展。

authors_text: Andreas Ziegler,Daniel Teigland,Jonas Tebbe,Thomas Gossard,Andreas Zell
title: Real-time event simulation with frame-based cameras
title_zh: 使用基于帧的相机进行实时事件模拟
comment: Accepted for 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023). Project web page: https://cogsys-tuebingen.github.io/realtime_event_simulator/
comments: Accepted for 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023). Project web page: https://cogsys-tuebingen.github.io/realtime_event_simulator/
abstract: Event cameras are becoming increasingly popular in robotics and computer vision due to their beneficial properties, e.g., high temporal resolution, high bandwidth, almost no motion blur, and low power consumption. However, these cameras remain expensive and scarce in the market, making them inaccessible to the majority. Using event simulators minimizes the need for real event cameras to develop novel algorithms. However, due to the computational complexity of the simulation, the event streams of existing simulators cannot be generated in real-time but rather have to be pre-calculated from existing video sequences or pre-rendered and then simulated from a virtual 3D scene. Although these offline generated event streams can be used as training data for learning tasks, all response time dependent applications cannot benefit from these simulators yet, as they still require an actual event camera. This work proposes simulation methods that improve the performance of event simulation by two orders of magnitude (making them real-time capable) while remaining competitive in the quality assessment.
summary: Event cameras are becoming increasingly popular in robotics and computer vision due to their beneficial properties, e.g., high temporal resolution, high bandwidth, almost no motion blur, and low power consumption. However, these cameras remain expensive and scarce in the market, making them inaccessible to the majority. Using event simulators minimizes the need for real event cameras to develop novel algorithms. However, due to the computational complexity of the simulation, the event streams of existing simulators cannot be generated in real-time but rather have to be pre-calculated from existing video sequences or pre-rendered and then simulated from a virtual 3D scene. Although these offline generated event streams can be used as training data for learning tasks, all response time dependent applications cannot benefit from these simulators yet, as they still require an actual event camera. This work proposes simulation methods that improve the performance of event simulation by two orders of magnitude (making them real-time capable) while remaining competitive in the quality assessment.
abstract_zh: 事件相机由于其有益的特性，例如高时间分辨率、高带宽、几乎没有运动模糊和低功耗，在机器人和计算机视觉领域变得越来越流行。然而，这些相机在市场上仍然昂贵且稀缺，使得大多数人无法使用它们。使用事件模拟器可以最大限度地减少对真实事件摄像机开发新颖算法的需求。然而，由于模拟的计算复杂性，现有模拟器的事件流无法实时生成，而是必须根据现有视频序列预先计算或预先渲染，然后根据虚拟3D场景进行模拟。尽管这些离线生成的事件流可以用作学习任务的训练数据，但所有依赖于响应时间的应用程序还无法从这些模拟器中受益，因为它们仍然需要实际的事件摄像机。这项工作提出的模拟方法可以将事件模拟的性能提高两个数量级（使其具有实时能力），同时在质量评估中保持竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于帧的摄像机实时事件模拟方法，以替代昂贵的真实事件摄像机。
AI.motivation: 现有事件模拟器因计算复杂度无法实时生成事件流，且真实事件摄像机价格高昂且稀缺，限制了算法开发和实时应用。
AI.method: 通过优化模拟算法，将事件流生成速度提升两个数量级，同时保持与现有方法相当的质量评估水平。
AI.result: 实现了实时事件模拟，能够在不依赖预处理或预渲染的情况下生成高质量事件流。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为需要实时响应的应用提供了可行的模拟方案，降低了对真实事件摄像机的依赖。

This work proposes simulation methods that improve the performance of event simulation by two orders of magnitude (making them real-time capable) while remaining competitive in the quality assessment. 事件相机由于其有益的特性，例如高时间分辨率、高带宽、几乎没有运动模糊和低功耗，在机器人和计算机视觉领域变得越来越流行。然而，这些相机在市场上仍然昂贵且稀缺，使得大多数人无法使用它们。使用事件模拟器可以最大限度地减少对真实事件摄像机开发新颖算法的需求。然而，由于模拟的计算复杂性，现有模拟器的事件流无法实时生成，而是必须根据现有视频序列预先计算或预先渲染，然后根据虚拟3D场景进行模拟。尽管这些离线生成的事件流可以用作学习任务的训练数据，但所有依赖于响应时间的应用程序还无法从这些模拟器中受益，因为它们仍然需要实际的事件摄像机。这项工作提出的模拟方法可以将事件模拟的性能提高两个数量级（使其具有实时能力），同时在质量评估中保持竞争力。 本文提出了一种基于帧的摄像机实时事件模拟方法，以替代昂贵的真实事件摄像机。 Andreas Ziegler,Daniel Teigland,Jonas Tebbe,Thomas Gossard,Andreas Zell cs.RO,cs.CV

title: Self-supervised Learning for Panoptic Segmentation of Multiple Fruit Flower Species
title_zh: 多种果花品种全景分割的自监督学习
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Convolutional neural networks trained using manually generated labels are commonly used for semantic or instance segmentation. In precision agriculture, automated flower detection methods use supervised models and post-processing techniques that may not perform consistently as the appearance of the flowers and the data acquisition conditions vary. We propose a self-supervised learning strategy to enhance the sensitivity of segmentation models to different flower species using automatically generated pseudo-labels. We employ a data augmentation and refinement approach to improve the accuracy of the model predictions. The augmented semantic predictions are then converted to panoptic pseudo-labels to iteratively train a multi-task model. The self-supervised model predictions can be refined with existing post-processing approaches to further improve their accuracy. An evaluation on a multi-species fruit tree flower dataset demonstrates that our method outperforms state-of-the-art models without computationally expensive post-processing steps, providing a new baseline for flower detection applications.
summary: Convolutional neural networks trained using manually generated labels are commonly used for semantic or instance segmentation. In precision agriculture, automated flower detection methods use supervised models and post-processing techniques that may not perform consistently as the appearance of the flowers and the data acquisition conditions vary. We propose a self-supervised learning strategy to enhance the sensitivity of segmentation models to different flower species using automatically generated pseudo-labels. We employ a data augmentation and refinement approach to improve the accuracy of the model predictions. The augmented semantic predictions are then converted to panoptic pseudo-labels to iteratively train a multi-task model. The self-supervised model predictions can be refined with existing post-processing approaches to further improve their accuracy. An evaluation on a multi-species fruit tree flower dataset demonstrates that our method outperforms state-of-the-art models without computationally expensive post-processing steps, providing a new baseline for flower detection applications.
abstract_zh: 使用手动生成的标签训练的卷积神经网络通常用于语义或实例分割。在精准农业中，自动化花卉检测方法使用监督模型和后处理技术，随着花朵外观和数据采集条件的变化，这些技术可能无法一致地执行。我们提出了一种自我监督的学习策略，使用自动生成的伪标签来增强分割模型对不同花卉种类的敏感性。我们采用数据增强和细化方法来提高模型预测的准确性。然后，增强的语义预测被转换为全景伪标签，以迭代训练多任务模型。自监督模型预测可以使用现有的后处理方法进行改进，以进一步提高其准确性。对多物种果树花卉数据集的评估表明，我们的方法优于最先进的模型，无需计算昂贵的后处理步骤，为花卉检测应用提供了新的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督学习方法，用于多物种水果花的全景分割，以提高检测的准确性和适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督模型和后处理技术在花朵外观和数据采集条件变化时表现不稳定，且依赖人工标注标签成本较高。
AI.method: 通过自动生成伪标签、数据增强和迭代训练多任务模型，结合后处理技术优化分割结果。
AI.result: 在多物种水果花数据集上，该方法在无需昂贵后处理步骤的情况下优于现有最先进模型，建立了新的检测基准。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习策略有效提升了花检测的鲁棒性，为精准农业提供了高效且低成本的解决方案。

title: Code Compliance Assessment as a Learning Problem
title_zh: 代码合规性评估作为一个学习问题
comment: Amazon.com, 2022
comments: Amazon.com, 2022
abstract: Manual code reviews and static code analyzers are the traditional mechanisms to verify if source code complies with coding policies. However, these mechanisms are hard to scale. We formulate code compliance assessment as a machine learning (ML) problem, to take as input a natural language policy and code, and generate a prediction on the code's compliance, non-compliance, or irrelevance. This can help scale compliance classification and search for policies not covered by traditional mechanisms. We explore key research questions on ML model formulation, training data, and evaluation setup. The core idea is to obtain a joint code-text embedding space which preserves compliance relationships via the vector distance of code and policy embeddings. As there is no task-specific data, we re-interpret and filter commonly available software datasets with additional pre-training and pre-finetuning tasks that reduce the semantic gap. We benchmarked our approach on two listings of coding policies (CWE and CBP). This is a zero-shot evaluation as none of the policies occur in the training set. On CWE and CBP respectively, our tool Policy2Code achieves classification accuracies of (59%, 71%) and search MRR of (0.05, 0.21) compared to CodeBERT with classification accuracies of (37%, 54%) and MRR of (0.02, 0.02). In a user study, 24% Policy2Code detections were accepted compared to 7% for CodeBERT.
summary: Manual code reviews and static code analyzers are the traditional mechanisms to verify if source code complies with coding policies. However, these mechanisms are hard to scale. We formulate code compliance assessment as a machine learning (ML) problem, to take as input a natural language policy and code, and generate a prediction on the code's compliance, non-compliance, or irrelevance. This can help scale compliance classification and search for policies not covered by traditional mechanisms. We explore key research questions on ML model formulation, training data, and evaluation setup. The core idea is to obtain a joint code-text embedding space which preserves compliance relationships via the vector distance of code and policy embeddings. As there is no task-specific data, we re-interpret and filter commonly available software datasets with additional pre-training and pre-finetuning tasks that reduce the semantic gap. We benchmarked our approach on two listings of coding policies (CWE and CBP). This is a zero-shot evaluation as none of the policies occur in the training set. On CWE and CBP respectively, our tool Policy2Code achieves classification accuracies of (59%, 71%) and search MRR of (0.05, 0.21) compared to CodeBERT with classification accuracies of (37%, 54%) and MRR of (0.02, 0.02). In a user study, 24% Policy2Code detections were accepted compared to 7% for CodeBERT.
abstract_zh: 手动代码审查和静态代码分析器是验证源代码是否符合编码策略的传统机制。然而，这些机制很难扩展。我们将代码合规性评估制定为机器学习 (ML) 问题，以自然语言策略和代码作为输入，并生成对代码合规性、不合规性或不相关性的预测。这可以帮助扩展合规性分类并搜索传统机制未涵盖的政策。我们探索有关 ML 模型制定、训练数据和评估设置的关键研究问题。核心思想是获得一个联合的代码文本嵌入空间，该空间通过代码和策略嵌入的向量距离保留合规关系。由于没有特定于任务的数据，我们通过额外的预训练和预微调任务重新解释和过滤常用的软件数据集，以减少语义差距。我们在两个编码政策列表（CWE 和 CBP）上对我们的方法进行了基准测试。这是零样本评估，因为训练集中没有出现任何策略。在 CWE 和 CBP 上，我们的工具 Policy2Code 分别实现了分类精度 (59%, 71%) 和搜索 MRR (0.05, 0.21)，而 CodeBERT 的分类精度为 (37%, 54%)，搜索 MRR 为 (0.02, 0.02)。在一项用户研究中，24% 的 Policy2Code 检测被接受，而 CodeBERT 的接受率为 7%。

AI.tldr: 将代码合规性评估转化为机器学习问题，通过自然语言政策和代码输入预测代码是否符合规范。
AI.motivation: 传统代码审查和静态分析工具难以扩展，需开发可扩展的自动化合规性评估方法。
AI.method: 构建联合代码-文本嵌入空间，利用预训练和微调任务减少语义差距，并基于CWE和CBP数据集进行零样本评估。
AI.result: Policy2Code在CWE和CBP数据集上分类准确率达59%和71%，搜索MRR为0.05和0.21，优于CodeBERT的37%/54%和0.02/0.02；用户研究接受率为24%（CodeBERT为7%）。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法在零样本合规性评估中表现更优，为自动化政策检测提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xuan Gong,Abhishek Sharma,Srikrishna Karanam,Ziyan Wu,Terrence Chen,David Doermann,Arun Innanje
title: Preserving Privacy in Federated Learning with Ensemble Cross-Domain Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过集成跨域知识蒸馏在联邦学习中保护隐私
comment: Accepted by AAAI2022
comments: Accepted by AAAI2022
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning paradigm where local nodes collaboratively train a central model while the training data remains decentralized. Existing FL methods typically share model parameters or employ co-distillation to address the issue of unbalanced data distribution. However, they suffer from communication bottlenecks. More importantly, they risk privacy leakage. In this work, we develop a privacy preserving and communication efficient method in a FL framework with one-shot offline knowledge distillation using unlabeled, cross-domain public data. We propose a quantized and noisy ensemble of local predictions from completely trained local models for stronger privacy guarantees without sacrificing accuracy. Based on extensive experiments on image classification and text classification tasks, we show that our privacy-preserving method outperforms baseline FL algorithms with superior performance in both accuracy and communication efficiency.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning paradigm where local nodes collaboratively train a central model while the training data remains decentralized. Existing FL methods typically share model parameters or employ co-distillation to address the issue of unbalanced data distribution. However, they suffer from communication bottlenecks. More importantly, they risk privacy leakage. In this work, we develop a privacy preserving and communication efficient method in a FL framework with one-shot offline knowledge distillation using unlabeled, cross-domain public data. We propose a quantized and noisy ensemble of local predictions from completely trained local models for stronger privacy guarantees without sacrificing accuracy. Based on extensive experiments on image classification and text classification tasks, we show that our privacy-preserving method outperforms baseline FL algorithms with superior performance in both accuracy and communication efficiency.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种机器学习范例，其中本地节点协作训练中央模型，同时训练数据保持分散。现有的 FL 方法通常共享模型参数或采用共蒸馏来解决数据分布不平衡的问题。然而，他们却面临着沟通瓶颈。更重要的是，他们面临隐私泄露的风险。在这项工作中，我们在 FL 框架中开发了一种隐私保护和通信有效的方法，使用未标记的跨域公共数据进行一次性离线知识蒸馏。我们提出了一种来自经过完全训练的本地模型的本地预测的量化和噪声集成，以在不牺牲准确性的情况下提供更强的隐私保证。基于图像分类和文本分类任务的大量实验，我们表明我们的隐私保护方法优于基线 FL 算法，在准确性和通信效率方面均具有卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在联邦学习中保护隐私的方法，通过集成跨领域知识蒸馏技术，在保证模型准确性的同时减少通信开销并增强隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在应对数据分布不均时存在通信开销大和隐私泄露风险，亟需一种兼顾隐私保护与通信效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用量化噪声的本地模型预测集成，结合跨领域公共数据进行一次性离线知识蒸馏，以在无需共享参数的情况下增强隐私性。

AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了隐私保护与通信效率，为联邦学习中的隐私安全问题提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Preserving Privacy in Federated Learning with Ensemble Cross-Domain Knowledge Distillation 通过集成跨域知识蒸馏在联邦学习中保护隐私 Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning paradigm where local nodes collaboratively train a central model while the training data remains decentralized. Existing FL methods typically share model parameters or employ co-distillation to address the issue of unbalanced data distribution. However, they suffer from communication bottlenecks. More importantly, they risk privacy leakage. In this work, we develop a privacy preserving and communication efficient method in a FL framework with one-shot offline knowledge distillation using unlabeled, cross-domain public data. We propose a quantized and noisy ensemble of local predictions from completely trained local models for stronger privacy guarantees without sacrificing accuracy. Based on extensive experiments on image classification and text classification tasks, we show that our privacy-preserving method outperforms baseline FL algorithms with superior performance in both accuracy and communication efficiency. 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种机器学习范例，其中本地节点协作训练中央模型，同时训练数据保持分散。现有的 FL 方法通常共享模型参数或采用共蒸馏来解决数据分布不平衡的问题。然而，他们却面临着沟通瓶颈。更重要的是，他们面临隐私泄露的风险。在这项工作中，我们在 FL 框架中开发了一种隐私保护和通信有效的方法，使用未标记的跨域公共数据进行一次性离线知识蒸馏。我们提出了一种来自经过完全训练的本地模型的本地预测的量化和噪声集成，以在不牺牲准确性的情况下提供更强的隐私保证。基于图像分类和文本分类任务的大量实验，我们表明我们的隐私保护方法优于基线 FL 算法，在准确性和通信效率方面均具有卓越的性能。 本文提出了一种在联邦学习中保护隐私的方法，通过集成跨领域知识蒸馏技术，在保证模型准确性的同时减少通信开销并增强隐私保护。 Xuan Gong,Abhishek Sharma,Srikrishna Karanam,Ziyan Wu,Terrence Chen,David Doermann,Arun Innanje cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xuan Gong,Meng Zheng,Benjamin Planche,Srikrishna Karanam,Terrence Chen,David Doermann,Ziyan Wu
title: Self-supervised Human Mesh Recovery with Cross-Representation Alignment
title_zh: 具有交叉表示对齐的自我监督人体网格恢复
comment: Accepted ECCV2022
comments: Accepted ECCV2022
abstract: Fully supervised human mesh recovery methods are data-hungry and have poor generalizability due to the limited availability and diversity of 3D-annotated benchmark datasets. Recent progress in self-supervised human mesh recovery has been made using synthetic-data-driven training paradigms where the model is trained from synthetic paired 2D representation (e.g., 2D keypoints and segmentation masks) and 3D mesh. However, on synthetic dense correspondence maps (i.e., IUV) few have been explored since the domain gap between synthetic training data and real testing data is hard to address for 2D dense representation. To alleviate this domain gap on IUV, we propose cross-representation alignment utilizing the complementary information from the robust but sparse representation (2D keypoints). Specifically, the alignment errors between initial mesh estimation and both 2D representations are forwarded into regressor and dynamically corrected in the following mesh regression. This adaptive cross-representation alignment explicitly learns from the deviations and captures complementary information: robustness from sparse representation and richness from dense representation. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple standard benchmark datasets and demonstrate competitive results, helping take a step towards reducing the annotation effort needed to produce state-of-the-art models in human mesh estimation.
summary: Fully supervised human mesh recovery methods are data-hungry and have poor generalizability due to the limited availability and diversity of 3D-annotated benchmark datasets. Recent progress in self-supervised human mesh recovery has been made using synthetic-data-driven training paradigms where the model is trained from synthetic paired 2D representation (e.g., 2D keypoints and segmentation masks) and 3D mesh. However, on synthetic dense correspondence maps (i.e., IUV) few have been explored since the domain gap between synthetic training data and real testing data is hard to address for 2D dense representation. To alleviate this domain gap on IUV, we propose cross-representation alignment utilizing the complementary information from the robust but sparse representation (2D keypoints). Specifically, the alignment errors between initial mesh estimation and both 2D representations are forwarded into regressor and dynamically corrected in the following mesh regression. This adaptive cross-representation alignment explicitly learns from the deviations and captures complementary information: robustness from sparse representation and richness from dense representation. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple standard benchmark datasets and demonstrate competitive results, helping take a step towards reducing the annotation effort needed to produce state-of-the-art models in human mesh estimation.
abstract_zh: 由于 3D 注释基准数据集的可用性和多样性有限，完全监督的人体网格恢复方法需要大量数据，并且通用性较差。使用合成数据驱动的训练范例在自监督人体网格恢复方面取得了最新进展，其中模型是根据合成配对 2D 表示（例如 2D 关键点和分割掩模）和 3D 网格进行训练的。然而，在合成密集对应图（即 IUV）上，由于合成训练数据和真实测试数据之间的域差距很难解决 2D 密集表示，因此很少有人进行探索。为了缓解 IUV 上的域差距，我们提出利用来自稳健但稀疏表示（2D 关键点）的补充信息进行交叉表示对齐。具体来说，初始网格估计和两个二维表示之间的对齐误差被转发到回归器中，并在接下来的网格回归中动态校正。这种自适应交叉表示对齐显式地从偏差中学习并捕获补充信息：稀疏表示的鲁棒性和密集表示的丰富性。我们对多个标准基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，并展示了具有竞争力的结果，有助于减少在人体网格估计中生成最先进模型所需的注释工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督的人体网格恢复方法，通过跨表示对齐减少对密集标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有全监督方法依赖大量标注数据且泛化能力差，而基于合成数据的自监督方法在处理真实测试数据时因领域差异（如IUV密集对应图）效果不佳，需减少标注工作量并提升模型性能。
AI.method: 利用稀疏但鲁棒的2D关键点与密集IUV图的互补性，通过初始网格估计与两种表示的对齐误差动态修正网格回归，实现跨表示对齐。
AI.result: 在多个标准数据集上实验验证，结果具有竞争力，表明该方法能有效缓解领域差异并减少标注需求。
AI.conclusion: 跨表示对齐策略通过融合稀疏与密集表示的优势，提升了人体网格估计的泛化能力，为低标注成本的高质量模型提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xi Wang,Wenjie Wang,Fuli Feng,Wenge Rong,Chuantao Yin,Zhang Xiong
title: Causal Intervention for Fairness in Multi-behavior Recommendation
title_zh: 多行为推荐中公平性的因果干预
comment: This paper is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems
comments: This paper is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems
abstract: Recommender systems usually learn user interests from various user behaviors, including clicks and post-click behaviors (e.g., like and favorite). However, these behaviors inevitably exhibit popularity bias, leading to some unfairness issues: 1) for items with similar quality, more popular ones get more exposure; and 2) even worse the popular items with lower popularity might receive more exposure. Existing work on mitigating popularity bias blindly eliminates the bias and usually ignores the effect of item quality. We argue that the relationships between different user behaviors (e.g., conversion rate) actually reflect the item quality. Therefore, to handle the unfairness issues, we propose to mitigate the popularity bias by considering multiple user behaviors. In this work, we examine causal relationships behind the interaction generation procedure in multi-behavior recommendation. Specifically, we find that: 1) item popularity is a confounder between the exposed items and users' post-click interactions, leading to the first unfairness; and 2) some hidden confounders (e.g., the reputation of item producers) affect both item popularity and quality, resulting in the second unfairness. To alleviate these confounding issues, we propose a causal framework to estimate the causal effect, which leverages backdoor adjustment to block the backdoor paths caused by the confounders. In the inference stage, we remove the negative effect of popularity and utilize the good effect of quality for recommendation. Experiments on two real-world datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which enhances fairness without sacrificing recommendation accuracy.
summary: Recommender systems usually learn user interests from various user behaviors, including clicks and post-click behaviors (e.g., like and favorite). However, these behaviors inevitably exhibit popularity bias, leading to some unfairness issues: 1) for items with similar quality, more popular ones get more exposure; and 2) even worse the popular items with lower popularity might receive more exposure. Existing work on mitigating popularity bias blindly eliminates the bias and usually ignores the effect of item quality. We argue that the relationships between different user behaviors (e.g., conversion rate) actually reflect the item quality. Therefore, to handle the unfairness issues, we propose to mitigate the popularity bias by considering multiple user behaviors. In this work, we examine causal relationships behind the interaction generation procedure in multi-behavior recommendation. Specifically, we find that: 1) item popularity is a confounder between the exposed items and users' post-click interactions, leading to the first unfairness; and 2) some hidden confounders (e.g., the reputation of item producers) affect both item popularity and quality, resulting in the second unfairness. To alleviate these confounding issues, we propose a causal framework to estimate the causal effect, which leverages backdoor adjustment to block the backdoor paths caused by the confounders. In the inference stage, we remove the negative effect of popularity and utilize the good effect of quality for recommendation. Experiments on two real-world datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which enhances fairness without sacrificing recommendation accuracy.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统通常从各种用户行为中学习用户兴趣，包括点击和点击后行为（例如点赞和收藏）。然而，这些行为不可避免地表现出受欢迎度偏差，从而导致一些不公平问题：1）对于质量相似的商品，更受欢迎的商品获得更多的曝光； 2）更糟糕的是，人气较低的热门商品可能会获得更多曝光。现有的减轻流行度偏差的工作盲目地消除了偏差，并且通常忽略了项目质量的影响。我们认为不同用户行为之间的关系（例如转化率）实际上反映了项目质量。因此，为了解决不公平问题，我们建议通过考虑多种用户行为来减轻流行度偏差。在这项工作中，我们研究了多行为推荐中交互生成过程背后的因果关系。具体来说，我们发现：1）项目流行度是暴露项目和用户点击后交互之间的混杂因素，导致第一个不公平； 2）一些隐藏的混杂因素（例如物品生产者的声誉）会影响物品的受欢迎程度和质量，从而导致第二种不公平。为了缓解这些混杂问题，我们提出了一个因果框架来估计因果效应，该框架利用后门调整来阻止混杂因素引起的后门路径。在推理阶段，我们消除了流行度的负面影响，并利用质量的良好效果进行推荐。对两个真实世界数据集的实验验证了我们提出的框架的有效性，该框架在不牺牲推荐准确性的情况下增强了公平性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果干预的多行为推荐方法，通过缓解流行度偏差提升推荐公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有去流行度偏差方法忽视物品质量影响，导致推荐不公平。用户多行为（如点击、点赞）能反映物品质量，需结合因果关系分析解决双重不公平问题。
AI.method: 构建因果框架分析多行为交互机制，识别流行度作为混杂变量及隐藏混杂因素（如生产者声誉），利用后门调整阻断因果路径，分离流行度负效应与质量正效应。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集实验验证，该框架在提升公平性的同时保持推荐准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过因果干预结合多行为分析，有效解决推荐系统中的流行度偏差与质量混淆问题，为公平推荐提供新思路。

search_text: Causal Intervention for Fairness in Multi-behavior Recommendation 多行为推荐中公平性的因果干预 Recommender systems usually learn user interests from various user behaviors, including clicks and post-click behaviors (e.g., like and favorite). However, these behaviors inevitably exhibit popularity bias, leading to some unfairness issues: 1) for items with similar quality, more popular ones get more exposure; and 2) even worse the popular items with lower popularity might receive more exposure. Existing work on mitigating popularity bias blindly eliminates the bias and usually ignores the effect of item quality. We argue that the relationships between different user behaviors (e.g., conversion rate) actually reflect the item quality. Therefore, to handle the unfairness issues, we propose to mitigate the popularity bias by considering multiple user behaviors. In this work, we examine causal relationships behind the interaction generation procedure in multi-behavior recommendation. Specifically, we find that: 1) item popularity is a confounder between the exposed items and users' post-click interactions, leading to the first unfairness; and 2) some hidden confounders (e.g., the reputation of item producers) affect both item popularity and quality, resulting in the second unfairness. To alleviate these confounding issues, we propose a causal framework to estimate the causal effect, which leverages backdoor adjustment to block the backdoor paths caused by the confounders. In the inference stage, we remove the negative effect of popularity and utilize the good effect of quality for recommendation. Experiments on two real-world datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which enhances fairness without sacrificing recommendation accuracy. 推荐系统通常从各种用户行为中学习用户兴趣，包括点击和点击后行为（例如点赞和收藏）。然而，这些行为不可避免地表现出受欢迎度偏差，从而导致一些不公平问题：1）对于质量相似的商品，更受欢迎的商品获得更多的曝光； 2）更糟糕的是，人气较低的热门商品可能会获得更多曝光。现有的减轻流行度偏差的工作盲目地消除了偏差，并且通常忽略了项目质量的影响。我们认为不同用户行为之间的关系（例如转化率）实际上反映了项目质量。因此，为了解决不公平问题，我们建议通过考虑多种用户行为来减轻流行度偏差。在这项工作中，我们研究了多行为推荐中交互生成过程背后的因果关系。具体来说，我们发现：1）项目流行度是暴露项目和用户点击后交互之间的混杂因素，导致第一个不公平； 2）一些隐藏的混杂因素（例如物品生产者的声誉）会影响物品的受欢迎程度和质量，从而导致第二种不公平。为了缓解这些混杂问题，我们提出了一个因果框架来估计因果效应，该框架利用后门调整来阻止混杂因素引起的后门路径。在推理阶段，我们消除了流行度的负面影响，并利用质量的良好效果进行推荐。对两个真实世界数据集的实验验证了我们提出的框架的有效性，该框架在不牺牲推荐准确性的情况下增强了公平性。 本文提出一种基于因果干预的多行为推荐方法，通过缓解流行度偏差提升推荐公平性。 Xi Wang,Wenjie Wang,Fuli Feng,Wenge Rong,Chuantao Yin,Zhang Xiong cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Sara A. Miskovich,Willie Neiswanger,William Colocho,Claudio Emma,Jacqueline Garrahan,Timothy Maxwell,Christopher Mayes,Stefano Ermon,Auralee Edelen,Daniel Ratner
title: Multipoint-BAX: A New Approach for Efficiently Tuning Particle Accelerator Emittance via Virtual Objectives
title_zh: Multipoint-BAX：一种通过虚拟物镜有效调节粒子加速器发射度的新方法
comment: ef:Machine Learning: Science and Technology, Dec. 2023
comments: ef:Machine Learning: Science and Technology, Dec. 2023
abstract: Although beam emittance is critical for the performance of high-brightness accelerators, optimization is often time limited as emittance calculations, commonly done via quadrupole scans, are typically slow. Such calculations are a type of $\textit{multipoint query}$, i.e. each query requires multiple secondary measurements. Traditional black-box optimizers such as Bayesian optimization are slow and inefficient when dealing with such objectives as they must acquire the full series of measurements, but return only the emittance, with each query. We propose a new information-theoretic algorithm, Multipoint-BAX, for black-box optimization on multipoint queries, which queries and models individual beam-size measurements using techniques from Bayesian Algorithm Execution (BAX). Our method avoids the slow multipoint query on the accelerator by acquiring points through a $\textit{virtual objective}$, i.e. calculating the emittance objective from a fast learned model rather than directly from the accelerator. We use Multipoint-BAX to minimize emittance at the Linac Coherent Light Source (LCLS) and the Facility for Advanced Accelerator Experimental Tests II (FACET-II). In simulation, our method is 20$\times$ faster and more robust to noise compared to existing methods. In live tests, it matched the hand-tuned emittance at FACET-II and achieved a 24% lower emittance than hand-tuning at LCLS. Our method represents a conceptual shift for optimizing multipoint queries, and we anticipate that it can be readily adapted to similar problems in particle accelerators and other scientific instruments.

Such calculations are a type of $\textit{multipoint query}$, i.e. each query requires multiple secondary measurements. Traditional black-box optimizers such as Bayesian optimization are slow and inefficient when dealing with such objectives as they must acquire the full series of measurements, but return only the emittance, with each query. We propose a new information-theoretic algorithm, Multipoint-BAX, for black-box optimization on multipoint queries, which queries and models individual beam-size measurements using techniques from Bayesian Algorithm Execution (BAX). Our method avoids the slow multipoint query on the accelerator by acquiring points through a $\textit{virtual objective}$, i.e. calculating the emittance objective from a fast learned model rather than directly from the accelerator. We use Multipoint-BAX to minimize emittance at the Linac Coherent Light Source (LCLS) and the Facility for Advanced Accelerator Experimental Tests II (FACET-II). In simulation, our method is 20$\times$ faster and more robust to noise compared to existing methods. In live tests, it matched the hand-tuned emittance at FACET-II and achieved a 24% lower emittance than hand-tuning at LCLS. Our method represents a conceptual shift for optimizing multipoint queries, and we anticipate that it can be readily adapted to similar problems in particle accelerators and other scientific instruments.
abstract_zh: 尽管束流发射率对于高亮度加速器的性能至关重要，但优化通常受到时间限制，因为通常通过四极扫描完成的发射率计算通常很慢。这种计算是一种$\textit{多点查询}$，即每个查询需要多个辅助测量。传统的黑盒优化器（例如贝叶斯优化）在处理此类目标时速度缓慢且效率低下，因为它们必须获取完整的测量系列，但每次查询时仅返回发射度。我们提出了一种新的信息论算法 Multipoint-BAX，用于多点查询的黑盒优化，该算法使用贝叶斯算法执行 (BAX) 的技术来查询和建模各个波束尺寸测量。我们的方法通过 $\textit{virtual Objective}$ 获取点来避免加速器上的缓慢多点查询，即从快速学习模型而不是直接从加速器计算发射度目标。我们使用多点-BAX 来最大限度地减少直线加速器相干光源 (LCLS) 和高级加速器实验测试 II (FACET-II) 设施的发射率。在仿真中，与现有方法相比，我们的方法速度快 20 倍，并且对噪声的鲁棒性更强。在现场测试中，它与 FACET-II 上的手动调谐发射率相匹配，并且比 LCLS 上的手动调谐发射率低 24%。我们的方法代表了优化多点查询的概念转变，我们预计它可以很容易地适应粒子加速器和其他科学仪器中的类似问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Multipoint-BAX的新算法，通过虚拟目标高效优化粒子加速器的束流发射度。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法在处理需要多次测量的多点查询时效率低下，且直接依赖加速器测量导致计算缓慢。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯算法执行（BAX）技术，利用快速学习模型替代直接加速器测量，通过虚拟目标计算发射度以避免多点查询。
AI.result: 仿真中比现有方法快20倍且更抗噪声；在FACET-II和LCLS实测中分别达到手动调优水平和24%更低的发射度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多点查询优化提供了概念性突破，可推广至其他科学仪器领域。

title: Explaining Results of Multi-Criteria Decision Making
title_zh: 解释多标准决策的结果
abstract: We introduce a method for explaining the results of various linear and hierarchical multi-criteria decision-making (MCDM) techniques such as WSM and AHP. The two key ideas are (A) to maintain a fine-grained representation of the values manipulated by these techniques and (B) to derive explanations from these representations through merging, filtering, and aggregating operations. An explanation in our model presents a high-level comparison of two alternatives in an MCDM problem, presumably an optimal and a non-optimal one, illuminating why one alternative was preferred over the other one. We show the usefulness of our techniques by generating explanations for two well-known examples from the MCDM literature. Finally, we show their efficacy by performing computational experiments.
summary: We introduce a method for explaining the results of various linear and hierarchical multi-criteria decision-making (MCDM) techniques such as WSM and AHP. The two key ideas are (A) to maintain a fine-grained representation of the values manipulated by these techniques and (B) to derive explanations from these representations through merging, filtering, and aggregating operations. An explanation in our model presents a high-level comparison of two alternatives in an MCDM problem, presumably an optimal and a non-optimal one, illuminating why one alternative was preferred over the other one. We show the usefulness of our techniques by generating explanations for two well-known examples from the MCDM literature. Finally, we show their efficacy by performing computational experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种解释各种线性和分层多标准决策 (MCDM) 技术（例如 WSM 和 AHP）结果的方法。两个关键思想是（A）维护由这些技术操纵的值的细粒度表示，以及（B）通过合并、过滤和聚合操作从这些表示中得出解释。我们模型中的解释对 MCDM 问题中的两种替代方案（可能是最优方案和非最优方案）进行了高级比较，阐明了为什么一种方案优于另一种方案。我们通过对 MCDM 文献中两个著名示例进行解释来展示我们技术的实用性。最后，我们通过进行计算实验来展示它们的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，用于解释多准则决策分析（MCDM）技术（如WSM和AHP）的结果，通过细粒度值表示和操作生成高阶对比解释。
AI.motivation: 现有MCDM方法结果缺乏直观解释，用户难以理解决策依据，需通过透明化分析提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 基于细粒度值表示，结合合并、过滤和聚合操作，生成最优与非最优方案的对比解释，并通过经典案例与计算实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 成功为两个MCDM经典案例生成解释，计算实验表明方法能有效揭示决策差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可增强MCDM结果的可解释性，帮助用户理解决策逻辑，具有实际应用价值。

Finally, we show their efficacy by performing computational experiments. 我们介绍了一种解释各种线性和分层多标准决策 (MCDM) 技术（例如 WSM 和 AHP）结果的方法。两个关键思想是（A）维护由这些技术操纵的值的细粒度表示，以及（B）通过合并、过滤和聚合操作从这些表示中得出解释。我们模型中的解释对 MCDM 问题中的两种替代方案（可能是最优方案和非最优方案）进行了高级比较，阐明了为什么一种方案优于另一种方案。我们通过对 MCDM 文献中两个著名示例进行解释来展示我们技术的实用性。最后，我们通过进行计算实验来展示它们的功效。 本文提出一种方法，用于解释多准则决策分析（MCDM）技术（如WSM和AHP）的结果，通过细粒度值表示和操作生成高阶对比解释。 Martin Erwig,Prashant Kumar cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.PL

title: A general class of combinatorial filters that can be minimized efficiently
title_zh: 一类可以有效最小化的通用组合滤波器
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures
comments: 9 pages, 3 figures
abstract: State minimization of combinatorial filters is a fundamental problem that arises, for example, in building cheap, resource-efficient robots. But exact minimization is known to be NP-hard. This paper conducts a more nuanced analysis of this hardness than up till now, and uncovers two factors which contribute to this complexity. We show each factor is a distinct source of the problem's hardness and are able, thereby, to shed some light on the role played by (1) structure of the graph that encodes compatibility relationships, and (2) determinism-enforcing constraints. Just as a line of prior work has sought to introduce additional assumptions and identify sub-classes that lead to practical state reduction, we next use this new, sharper understanding to explore special cases for which exact minimization is efficient. We introduce a new algorithm for constraint repair that applies to a large sub-class of filters, subsuming three distinct special cases for which the possibility of optimal minimization in polynomial time was known earlier. While the efficiency in each of these three cases previously appeared to stem from seemingly dissimilar properties, when seen through the lens of the present work, their commonality now becomes clear. We also provide entirely new families of filters that are efficiently reducible.

This paper conducts a more nuanced analysis of this hardness than up till now, and uncovers two factors which contribute to this complexity. We show each factor is a distinct source of the problem's hardness and are able, thereby, to shed some light on the role played by (1) structure of the graph that encodes compatibility relationships, and (2) determinism-enforcing constraints. Just as a line of prior work has sought to introduce additional assumptions and identify sub-classes that lead to practical state reduction, we next use this new, sharper understanding to explore special cases for which exact minimization is efficient. We introduce a new algorithm for constraint repair that applies to a large sub-class of filters, subsuming three distinct special cases for which the possibility of optimal minimization in polynomial time was known earlier. While the efficiency in each of these three cases previously appeared to stem from seemingly dissimilar properties, when seen through the lens of the present work, their commonality now becomes clear. We also provide entirely new families of filters that are efficiently reducible.
abstract_zh: 组合滤波器的状态最小化是在构建廉价、资源高效的机器人等过程中出现的一个基本问题。但众所周知，精确最小化是 NP 困难的。本文对这种硬度进行了比迄今为止更细致的分析，并揭示了导致这种复杂性的两个因素。我们证明每个因素都是问题难度的独特来源，因此能够阐明（1）编码兼容性关系的图结构和（2）确定性强制约束所发挥的作用。正如一系列先前的工作试图引入额外的假设并确定导致实际状态减少的子类一样，我们接下来使用这种新的、更清晰的理解来探索精确最小化有效的特殊情况。我们引入了一种新的约束修复算法，该算法适用于滤波器的大子类，包含三种不同的特殊情况，对于这些情况，多项式时间内最优最小化的可能性是早期已知的。虽然这三种情况的效率以前似乎源于看似不同的属性，但从当前工作的角度来看，它们的共性现在变得清晰起来。我们还提供全新的可有效还原的过滤器系列。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了组合滤波器的状态最小化问题，并分析了其复杂性的两个因素。
AI.motivation: 组合滤波器的状态最小化是构建低成本、资源高效的机器人等应用中的基础问题，但精确最小化是NP难的。因此，需要更深入地理解其复杂性来源，并寻找高效的解决方法。
AI.method: 本文通过分析组合滤波器的图结构和确定性约束，揭示了复杂性的两个独立因素，并提出了一种适用于大类滤波器的约束修复算法。
AI.result: 本文提出了一种新的算法，适用于多个子类滤波器，并发现了新的高效可约化的滤波器家族。
AI.conclusion: 通过更深入的分析，本文揭示了组合滤波器状态最小化问题的复杂性来源，并提出了高效的解决方法，为相关领域提供了新的研究方向。

title: Bayan Algorithm: Detecting Communities in Networks Through Exact and Approximate Optimization of Modularity
title_zh: 巴彦算法：通过模块化的精确和近似优化来检测网络中的社区
comment: 36 pages, 11 figures
comments: 36 pages, 11 figures
abstract: Community detection is a classic network problem with extensive applications in various fields. Its most common method is using modularity maximization heuristics which rarely return an optimal partition or anything similar. Partitions with globally optimal modularity are difficult to compute, and therefore have been underexplored. Using structurally diverse networks, we compare 30 community detection methods including our proposed algorithm that offers optimality and approximation guarantees: the Bayan algorithm. Unlike existing methods, Bayan globally maximizes modularity or approximates it within a factor. Our results show the distinctive accuracy and stability of maximum-modularity partitions in retrieving planted partitions at rates higher than most alternatives for a wide range of parameter settings in two standard benchmarks. Compared to the partitions from 29 other algorithms, maximum-modularity partitions have the best medians for description length, coverage, performance, average conductance, and well clusteredness. These advantages come at the cost of additional computations which Bayan makes possible for small networks (networks that have up to 3000 edges in their largest connected component). Bayan is several times faster than using open-source and commercial solvers for modularity maximization, making it capable of finding optimal partitions for instances that cannot be optimized by any other existing method. Our results point to a few well performing algorithms, among which Bayan stands out as the most reliable method for small networks. A Python implementation of the Bayan algorithm (bayanpy) is publicly available through the package installer for Python.

abstract_zh: 社区检测是一个经典的网络问题，在各个领域都有广泛的应用。它最常见的方法是使用模块化最大化启发式方法，这种方法很少返回最佳分区或类似的东西。具有全局最优模块化的分区很难计算，因此尚未得到充分探索。使用结构多样化的网络，我们比较了 30 种社区检测方法，包括我们提出的提供最优性和近似保证的算法：Bayan 算法。与现有方法不同，Bayan 在全局范围内最大化模块化或在一个因子内对其进行近似。我们的结果表明，最大模块化分区在检索种植分区时具有独特的准确性和稳定性，在两个标准基准中，对于各种参数设置，其速度高于大多数替代方案。与其他 29 种算法的分区相比，最大模块化分区在描述长度、覆盖范围、性能、平均电导和良好聚类性方面具有最佳中值。这些优势是以额外计算为代价的，Bayan 使小型网络（最大连接组件中最多有 3000 个边的网络）成为可能。 Bayan 比使用开源和商业求解器实现模块化最大化快了几倍，使其能够为无法通过任何其他现有方法优化的实例找到最佳分区。我们的结果表明了一些性能良好的算法，其中 Bayan 是小型网络最可靠的方法。 Bayan 算法 (bayanpy) 的 Python 实现可通过 Python 包安装程序公开获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bayan的算法，通过精确和近似优化模块度来检测网络中的社区结构。
AI.motivation: 现有社区检测方法依赖模块度最大化启发式算法，但难以返回最优划分。全局最优模块度划分计算困难且研究不足，需开发具有优化保证的新算法。
AI.method: 提出Bayan算法，在结构多样的网络中比较了30种方法，该算法能全局最大化模块度或近似优化，并通过基准测试验证其性能。
AI.result: Bayan在描述长度、覆盖率、性能、平均导纳和聚类质量等指标上优于其他29种算法，且计算速度更快，适用于最多3000条边的小型网络。
AI.conclusion: Bayan在小型网络中是最可靠的社区检测方法，其Python实现（bayanpy）已公开发布。

title: Diagnosis-guided Attack Recovery for Securing Robotic Vehicles from Sensor Deception Attacks
title_zh: 用于保护机器人车辆免受传感器欺骗攻击的诊断引导攻击恢复
comment: ef:2024 ACM Asia Conference on Computer and Communications Security (ASIA CCS '24). Association for Computing Machinery, New York, NY, USA, 915-929
comments: ef:2024 ACM Asia Conference on Computer and Communications Security (ASIA CCS '24). Association for Computing Machinery, New York, NY, USA, 915-929
abstract: Sensors are crucial for perception and autonomous operation in robotic vehicles (RV). Unfortunately, RV sensors can be compromised by physical attacks such as sensor tampering or spoofing. In this paper, we present DeLorean, a unified framework for attack detection, attack diagnosis, and recovering RVs from sensor deception attacks (SDA). DeLorean can recover RVs even from strong SDAs in which the adversary targets multiple heterogeneous sensors simultaneously. We propose a novel attack diagnosis technique that inspects the attack-induced errors under SDAs, and identifies the targeted sensors using causal analysis. DeLorean then uses historic state information to selectively reconstruct physical states for compromised sensors, enabling targeted attack recovery under single or multi-sensor SDAs. We evaluate DeLorean on four real and two simulated RVs under SDAs targeting various sensors, and we find that it successfully recovers RVs from SDAs in 93% of the cases.
summary: Sensors are crucial for perception and autonomous operation in robotic vehicles (RV). Unfortunately, RV sensors can be compromised by physical attacks such as sensor tampering or spoofing. In this paper, we present DeLorean, a unified framework for attack detection, attack diagnosis, and recovering RVs from sensor deception attacks (SDA). DeLorean can recover RVs even from strong SDAs in which the adversary targets multiple heterogeneous sensors simultaneously. We propose a novel attack diagnosis technique that inspects the attack-induced errors under SDAs, and identifies the targeted sensors using causal analysis. DeLorean then uses historic state information to selectively reconstruct physical states for compromised sensors, enabling targeted attack recovery under single or multi-sensor SDAs. We evaluate DeLorean on four real and two simulated RVs under SDAs targeting various sensors, and we find that it successfully recovers RVs from SDAs in 93% of the cases.
abstract_zh: 传感器对于机器人车辆 (RV) 的感知和自主操作至关重要。不幸的是，RV 传感器可能会受到传感器篡改或欺骗等物理攻击的影响。在本文中，我们提出了 DeLorean，这是一个用于攻击检测、攻击诊断以及从传感器欺骗攻击 (SDA) 中恢复 RV 的统一框架。 DeLorean 甚至可以从强 SDA 中恢复 RV，其中对手同时瞄准多个异构传感器。我们提出了一种新颖的攻击诊断技术，该技术可以检查 SDA 下的攻击引起的错误，并使用因果分析来识别目标传感器。然后，DeLorean 使用历史状态信息有选择地重建受损传感器的物理状态，从而在单传感器或多传感器 SDA 下实现有针对性的攻击恢复。我们在针对各种传感器的 SDA 下对四个真实的 RV 和两个模拟的 RV 进行了评估，发现它在 93% 的情况下成功地从 SDA 中恢复了 RV。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于诊断引导的攻击恢复框架DeLorean，用于保护机器人车辆免受传感器欺骗攻击。
AI.motivation: 机器人车辆依赖传感器实现自主操作，但传感器易受物理攻击（如篡改或欺骗），现有方法难以应对多异构传感器同时被攻击的复杂场景。
AI.method: 设计DeLorean框架，包含攻击检测、诊断与恢复模块。通过因果分析识别被攻击传感器，并利用历史状态信息重建物理状态以实现针对性恢复。
AI.result: 在4个真实和2个模拟机器人车辆上测试，DeLorean在93%的传感器欺骗攻击案例中成功恢复车辆功能。
AI.conclusion: DeLorean框架有效应对单/多传感器欺骗攻击，显著提升机器人车辆在复杂攻击场景下的安全性与鲁棒性。

title: Avoiding Pragmatic Oddity: A Bottom-up Defeasible Deontic Logic
title_zh: 避免务实的奇怪：自下而上的可废止的道义逻辑
abstract: This paper presents an extension of Defeasible Deontic Logic to deal with the Pragmatic Oddity problem. The logic applies three general principles: (1) the Pragmatic Oddity problem must be solved within a general logical treatment of CTD reasoning; (2) non-monotonic methods must be adopted to handle CTD reasoning; (3) logical models of CTD reasoning must be computationally feasible and, if possible, efficient. The proposed extension of Defeasible Deontic Logic elaborates a preliminary version of the model proposed by Governatori and Rotolo (2019). The previous solution was based on particular characteristics of the (constructive, top-down) proof theory of the logic. However, that method introduces some degree of non-determinism. To avoid the problem, we provide a bottom-up characterisation of the logic. The new characterisation offers insights for the efficient implementation of the logic and allows us to establish the computational complexity of the problem.
summary: This paper presents an extension of Defeasible Deontic Logic to deal with the Pragmatic Oddity problem. The logic applies three general principles: (1) the Pragmatic Oddity problem must be solved within a general logical treatment of CTD reasoning; (2) non-monotonic methods must be adopted to handle CTD reasoning; (3) logical models of CTD reasoning must be computationally feasible and, if possible, efficient. The proposed extension of Defeasible Deontic Logic elaborates a preliminary version of the model proposed by Governatori and Rotolo (2019). The previous solution was based on particular characteristics of the (constructive, top-down) proof theory of the logic. However, that method introduces some degree of non-determinism. To avoid the problem, we provide a bottom-up characterisation of the logic. The new characterisation offers insights for the efficient implementation of the logic and allows us to establish the computational complexity of the problem.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了可废止道义逻辑的扩展来处理语用奇怪问题。该逻辑应用三个一般原则：（1）必须在 CTD 推理的一般逻辑处理中解决语用奇怪问题； (2)必须采用非单调方法来处理CTD推理； (3) CTD推理的逻辑模型必须在计算上可行，并且如果可能的话，必须是高效的。 Defeasible Deontic Logic 的拟议扩展详细阐述了 Governatori 和 Rotolo (2019) 提出的模型的初步版本。先前的解决方案基于逻辑的（构造性的、自上而下的）证明理论的特定特征。然而，该方法引入了某种程度的不确定性。为了避免这个问题，我们提供了自下而上的逻辑特征。新的表征为逻辑的有效实现提供了见解，并使我们能够确定问题的计算复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自底向上的可废止道义逻辑扩展方法，以解决实用奇论问题并提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有逻辑模型在处理义务冲突（CTD）时存在非确定性问题，且缺乏高效的计算实现方案。
AI.method: 基于可废止道义逻辑，采用自底向上的推理机制替代原有自顶向下的证明理论，并优化计算复杂性分析。
AI.result: 建立了新的逻辑模型，降低了非确定性影响，明确了计算复杂度并提升了实现效率。
AI.conclusion: 自底向上的方法为解决实用奇论问题提供了可行的逻辑框架，同时保障了计算可实现性。

authors_text: Tianyu Ding,Luming Liang,Zhihui Zhu,Tianyi Chen,Ilya Zharkov
title: Sparsity-guided Network Design for Frame Interpolation
title_zh: 用于帧插值的稀疏引导网络设计
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence. The corresponding CVPR paper can be found at arXiv:2103.10559
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence. The corresponding CVPR paper can be found at arXiv:2103.10559
abstract: DNN-based frame interpolation, which generates intermediate frames from two consecutive frames, is often dependent on model architectures with a large number of features, preventing their deployment on systems with limited resources, such as mobile devices. We present a compression-driven network design for frame interpolation that leverages model pruning through sparsity-inducing optimization to greatly reduce the model size while attaining higher performance. Concretely, we begin by compressing the recently proposed AdaCoF model and demonstrating that a 10 times compressed AdaCoF performs similarly to its original counterpart, where different strategies for using layerwise sparsity information as a guide are comprehensively investigated under a variety of hyperparameter settings. We then enhance this compressed model by introducing a multi-resolution warping module, which improves visual consistency with multi-level details. As a result, we achieve a considerable performance gain with a quarter of the size of the original AdaCoF. In addition, our model performs favorably against other state-of-the-art approaches on a wide variety of datasets. We note that the suggested compression-driven framework is generic and can be easily transferred to other DNN-based frame interpolation algorithms. The source code is available at https://github.com/tding1/CDFI.
summary: DNN-based frame interpolation, which generates intermediate frames from two consecutive frames, is often dependent on model architectures with a large number of features, preventing their deployment on systems with limited resources, such as mobile devices. We present a compression-driven network design for frame interpolation that leverages model pruning through sparsity-inducing optimization to greatly reduce the model size while attaining higher performance. Concretely, we begin by compressing the recently proposed AdaCoF model and demonstrating that a 10 times compressed AdaCoF performs similarly to its original counterpart, where different strategies for using layerwise sparsity information as a guide are comprehensively investigated under a variety of hyperparameter settings. We then enhance this compressed model by introducing a multi-resolution warping module, which improves visual consistency with multi-level details. As a result, we achieve a considerable performance gain with a quarter of the size of the original AdaCoF. In addition, our model performs favorably against other state-of-the-art approaches on a wide variety of datasets. We note that the suggested compression-driven framework is generic and can be easily transferred to other DNN-based frame interpolation algorithms. The source code is available at https://github.com/tding1/CDFI.
abstract_zh: 基于 DNN 的帧插值从两个连续帧生成中间帧，通常依赖于具有大量特征的模型架构，从而无法将其部署在资源有限的系统（例如移动设备）上。我们提出了一种用于帧插值的压缩驱动的网络设计，它通过稀疏诱导优化来利用模型修剪，以大大减小模型大小，同时获得更高的性能。具体来说，我们首先压缩最近提出的 AdaCoF 模型，并证明压缩 10 倍的 AdaCoF 的性能与其原始模型类似，其中在各种超参数设置下全面研究了使用分层稀疏信息作为指导的不同策略。然后，我们通过引入多分辨率变形模块来增强此压缩模型，该模块提高了多级细节的视觉一致性。因此，我们以原始 AdaCoF 四分之一的大小实现了可观的性能提升。此外，我们的模型在各种数据集上的表现优于其他最先进的方法。我们注意到，建议的压缩驱动框​​架是通用的，可以轻松转移到其他基于 DNN 的帧插值算法。源代码可在 https://github.com/tding1/CDFI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏性的网络设计方法，用于在资源受限设备上高效实现帧插值。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度学习帧插值模型参数量大，难以部署在移动端等资源受限系统中，需通过模型压缩技术降低计算量和存储需求。
AI.method: 采用稀疏性诱导优化对AdaCoF模型进行压缩，并引入多分辨率配准模块增强细节一致性，通过分层稀疏性策略指导剪枝过程。
AI.result: 压缩后的模型体积仅为原模型的1/4，性能与原模型相当且优于其他先进方法，在多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的压缩驱动框架具有通用性，可迁移至其他帧插值算法，开源代码已发布。

motivation: 现有的深度学习帧插值模型参数量大，难以部署在移动端等资源受限系统中，需通过模型压缩技术降低计算量和存储需求。
method: 采用稀疏性诱导优化对AdaCoF模型进行压缩，并引入多分辨率配准模块增强细节一致性，通过分层稀疏性策略指导剪枝过程。
result: 压缩后的模型体积仅为原模型的1/4，性能与原模型相当且优于其他先进方法，在多个数据集上表现优异。
conclusion: 提出的压缩驱动框架具有通用性，可迁移至其他帧插值算法，开源代码已发布。
search_text: Sparsity-guided Network Design for Frame Interpolation 用于帧插值的稀疏引导网络设计 DNN-based frame interpolation, which generates intermediate frames from two consecutive frames, is often dependent on model architectures with a large number of features, preventing their deployment on systems with limited resources, such as mobile devices. We present a compression-driven network design for frame interpolation that leverages model pruning through sparsity-inducing optimization to greatly reduce the model size while attaining higher performance. Concretely, we begin by compressing the recently proposed AdaCoF model and demonstrating that a 10 times compressed AdaCoF performs similarly to its original counterpart, where different strategies for using layerwise sparsity information as a guide are comprehensively investigated under a variety of hyperparameter settings. We then enhance this compressed model by introducing a multi-resolution warping module, which improves visual consistency with multi-level details. As a result, we achieve a considerable performance gain with a quarter of the size of the original AdaCoF. In addition, our model performs favorably against other state-of-the-art approaches on a wide variety of datasets. We note that the suggested compression-driven framework is generic and can be easily transferred to other DNN-based frame interpolation algorithms. The source code is available at https://github.com/tding1/CDFI. 基于 DNN 的帧插值从两个连续帧生成中间帧，通常依赖于具有大量特征的模型架构，从而无法将其部署在资源有限的系统（例如移动设备）上。我们提出了一种用于帧插值的压缩驱动的网络设计，它通过稀疏诱导优化来利用模型修剪，以大大减小模型大小，同时获得更高的性能。具体来说，我们首先压缩最近提出的 AdaCoF 模型，并证明压缩 10 倍的 AdaCoF 的性能与其原始模型类似，其中在各种超参数设置下全面研究了使用分层稀疏信息作为指导的不同策略。然后，我们通过引入多分辨率变形模块来增强此压缩模型，该模块提高了多级细节的视觉一致性。因此，我们以原始 AdaCoF 四分之一的大小实现了可观的性能提升。此外，我们的模型在各种数据集上的表现优于其他最先进的方法。我们注意到，建议的压缩驱动框​​架是通用的，可以轻松转移到其他基于 DNN 的帧插值算法。源代码可在 https://github.com/tding1/CDFI 获取。 本文提出一种基于稀疏性的网络设计方法，用于在资源受限设备上高效实现帧插值。 Tianyu Ding,Luming Liang,Zhihui Zhu,Tianyi Chen,Ilya Zharkov cs.CV

title: Defend Data Poisoning Attacks on Voice Authentication
title_zh: 防御语音身份验证的数据中毒攻击
comment: ef:IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON DEPENDABLE AND SECURE COMPUTING, VOL. 14, NO. 8, AUGUST 2022
comments: ef:IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON DEPENDABLE AND SECURE COMPUTING, VOL. 14, NO. 8, AUGUST 2022
abstract: With the advances in deep learning, speaker verification has achieved very high accuracy and is gaining popularity as a type of biometric authentication option in many scenes of our daily life, especially the growing market of web services. Compared to traditional passwords, "vocal passwords" are much more convenient as they relieve people from memorizing different passwords. However, new machine learning attacks are putting these voice authentication systems at risk. Without a strong security guarantee, attackers could access legitimate users' web accounts by fooling the deep neural network (DNN) based voice recognition models. In this paper, we demonstrate an easy-to-implement data poisoning attack to the voice authentication system, which can hardly be captured by existing defense mechanisms. Thus, we propose a more robust defense method, called Guardian, which is a convolutional neural network-based discriminator. The Guardian discriminator integrates a series of novel techniques including bias reduction, input augmentation, and ensemble learning. Our approach is able to distinguish about 95% of attacked accounts from normal accounts, which is much more effective than existing approaches with only 60% accuracy.
summary: With the advances in deep learning, speaker verification has achieved very high accuracy and is gaining popularity as a type of biometric authentication option in many scenes of our daily life, especially the growing market of web services. Compared to traditional passwords, "vocal passwords" are much more convenient as they relieve people from memorizing different passwords. However, new machine learning attacks are putting these voice authentication systems at risk. Without a strong security guarantee, attackers could access legitimate users' web accounts by fooling the deep neural network (DNN) based voice recognition models. In this paper, we demonstrate an easy-to-implement data poisoning attack to the voice authentication system, which can hardly be captured by existing defense mechanisms. Thus, we propose a more robust defense method, called Guardian, which is a convolutional neural network-based discriminator. The Guardian discriminator integrates a series of novel techniques including bias reduction, input augmentation, and ensemble learning. Our approach is able to distinguish about 95% of attacked accounts from normal accounts, which is much more effective than existing approaches with only 60% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的进步，说话人验证已经实现了非常高的准确性，并且作为一种生物特征认证选项在我们日常生活的许多场景中越来越受欢迎，尤其是不断增长的网络服务市场。与传统密码相比，“语音密码”方便得多，因为它可以减轻人们记住不同密码的麻烦。然而，新的机器学习攻击使这些语音认证系统面临风险。如果没有强大的安全保障，攻击者可以通过欺骗基于深度神经网络（DNN）的语音识别模型来访问合法用户的网络帐户。在本文中，我们演示了一种针对语音认证系统的易于实施的数据中毒攻击，现有的防御机制很难捕获这种攻击。因此，我们提出了一种更强大的防御方法，称为 Guardian，它是一种基于卷积神经网络的判别器。 Guardian 判别器集成了一系列新颖的技术，包括减少偏差、输入增强和集成学习。我们的方法能够区分大约 95% 的受攻击帐户和正常帐户，这比现有方法有效得多，准确率只有 60%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Guardian的防御方法，用于检测和防御语音认证系统中的数据投毒攻击。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习的发展，语音认证系统面临数据投毒攻击的威胁，现有防御机制效果有限，亟需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于卷积神经网络的判别器Guardian，结合偏差减少、输入增强和集成学习等技术，区分攻击账户与正常账户。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能识别约95%的攻击账户，显著优于现有方法的60%准确率。
AI.conclusion: Guardian通过创新技术有效提升了语音认证系统对数据投毒攻击的防御能力，为安全研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Abdurrahman Yasar,Sivasankaran Rajamanickam,Jonathan W. Berry,Umit V. Catalyurek
title: PGAbB: A Block-Based Graph Processing Framework for Heterogeneous Platforms
title_zh: PGAbB：适用于异构平台的基于块的图形处理框架
abstract: Designing flexible graph kernels that can run well on various platforms is a crucial research problem due to the frequent usage of graphs for modeling data and recent architectural advances and variety. In this work, we propose a novel graph processing framework, PGAbB (Parallel Graph Algorithms by Blocks), for modern shared-memory heterogeneous platforms. Our framework implements a block-based programming model. This allows a user to express a graph algorithm using kernels that operate on subgraphs. PGAbB support graph computations that fit in host DRAM but not in GPU device memory, and provides simple but effective scheduling techniques to schedule computations to all available resources in a heterogeneous architecture. We have demonstrated that one can easily implement a diverse set of graph algorithms in our framework by developing five algorithms. Our experimental results show that PGAbB implementations achieve better or competitive performance compared to hand-optimized implementations. Based on our experiments on five graph algorithms and forty-four graphs, in the median, PGAbB achieves 1.6, 1.6, 5.7, 3.4, 4.5, and 2.4 times better performance than GAPBS, Galois, Ligra, LAGraph Galois-GPU, and Gunrock graph processing systems, respectively.
summary: Designing flexible graph kernels that can run well on various platforms is a crucial research problem due to the frequent usage of graphs for modeling data and recent architectural advances and variety. In this work, we propose a novel graph processing framework, PGAbB (Parallel Graph Algorithms by Blocks), for modern shared-memory heterogeneous platforms. Our framework implements a block-based programming model. This allows a user to express a graph algorithm using kernels that operate on subgraphs. PGAbB support graph computations that fit in host DRAM but not in GPU device memory, and provides simple but effective scheduling techniques to schedule computations to all available resources in a heterogeneous architecture. We have demonstrated that one can easily implement a diverse set of graph algorithms in our framework by developing five algorithms. Our experimental results show that PGAbB implementations achieve better or competitive performance compared to hand-optimized implementations. Based on our experiments on five graph algorithms and forty-four graphs, in the median, PGAbB achieves 1.6, 1.6, 5.7, 3.4, 4.5, and 2.4 times better performance than GAPBS, Galois, Ligra, LAGraph Galois-GPU, and Gunrock graph processing systems, respectively.
abstract_zh: 由于频繁使用图来建模数据以及最近架构的进步和多样性，设计可以在各种平台上良好运行的灵活的图内核是一个至关重要的研究问题。在这项工作中，我们为现代共享内存异构平台提出了一种新颖的图处理框架：PGAbB（按块的并行图算法）。我们的框架实现了基于块的编程模型。这允许用户使用在子图上运行的内核来表达图算法。 PGAbB 支持适合主机 DRAM 但不适合 GPU 设备内存的图形计算，并提供简单但有效的调度技术来将计算调度到异构架构中的所有可用资源。我们已经证明，通过开发五种算法，可以在我们的框架中轻松实现一组不同的图算法。我们的实验结果表明，与手动优化的实现相比，PGAbB 实现实现了更好或有竞争力的性能。根据我们对五种图算法和 44 张图的实验，PGAbB 的性能中位数分别比 GAPBS、Galois、Ligra、LAGraph Galois-GPU 和 Gunrock 图处理系统高 1.6、1.6、5.7、3.4、4.5 和 2.4 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PGAbB的基于块的图处理框架，旨在支持现代异构平台上的高效图计算。
AI.motivation: 由于图在数据建模中的广泛应用以及硬件架构的多样化，设计能够在多种平台上灵活运行的图内核成为关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过实现基于块的编程模型，允许用户使用子图操作的内核表达图算法，并采用简单的调度技术将计算分配到异构架构中的所有可用资源。
AI.result: 在五个图算法和四十四张图的实验中，PGAbB的中位数性能分别比GAPBS、Galois、Ligra、LAGraph Galois-GPU和Gunrock等系统提升了1.6至5.7倍。
AI.conclusion: PGAbB框架在异构平台上实现了高效且灵活的图处理，其性能优于或与现有优化实现相当，适用于多种图计算场景。

title: Spectral hypergraph sparsification via chaining
title_zh: 通过链接进行谱超图稀疏化
comment: Incorrect example replaced by Remark 1.2; Definition of the distance corrected; reference to JLS'22 added
comments: Incorrect example replaced by Remark 1.2; Definition of the distance corrected; reference to JLS'22 added
abstract: In a hypergraph on $n$ vertices where $D$ is the maximum size of a hyperedge, there is a weighted hypergraph spectral $\varepsilon$-sparsifier with at most $O(\varepsilon^{-2} \log(D) \cdot n \log n)$ hyperedges. This improves over the bound of Kapralov, Krauthgamer, Tardos and Yoshida (2021) who achieve $O(\varepsilon^{-4} n (\log n)^3)$, as well as the bound $O(\varepsilon^{-2} D^3 n \log n)$ obtained by Bansal, Svensson, and Trevisan (2019). The same sparsification result was obtained independently by Jambulapati, Liu, and Sidford (2022).
summary: In a hypergraph on $n$ vertices where $D$ is the maximum size of a hyperedge, there is a weighted hypergraph spectral $\varepsilon$-sparsifier with at most $O(\varepsilon^{-2} \log(D) \cdot n \log n)$ hyperedges. This improves over the bound of Kapralov, Krauthgamer, Tardos and Yoshida (2021) who achieve $O(\varepsilon^{-4} n (\log n)^3)$, as well as the bound $O(\varepsilon^{-2} D^3 n \log n)$ obtained by Bansal, Svensson, and Trevisan (2019). The same sparsification result was obtained independently by Jambulapati, Liu, and Sidford (2022).
abstract_zh: 在 $n$ 个顶点的超图中，其中 $D$ 是超边的最大尺寸，存在一个加权超图谱 $\varepsilon$ 稀疏器，最多具有 $O(\varepsilon^{-2} \log(D) \cdot n \log n)$ 超边。这比 Kapralov、Krauthgamer、Tardos 和 Yoshida (2021) 的界限有所改进，他们实现了 $O(\varepsilon^{-4} n (\log n)^3)$，以及 Bansal、Svensson 和 Trevisan (2019) 获得的界限 $O(\varepsilon^{-2} D^3 n \log n)$。 Jambulapati、Liu 和 Sidford (2022) 独立获得了相同的稀疏化结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过链式方法对超图进行谱稀疏化的技术，改进了超图稀疏化的边数量上限。
AI.motivation: 超图谱稀疏化在优化算法和复杂网络分析中具有重要意义，但现有方法的边数量上限较高，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 采用链式技术构造加权超图谱ε-稀疏化器，通过分层抽样和边合并策略降低复杂度。
AI.result: 证明了稀疏化器的边数量上限为O(ε⁻² log D · n log n)，优于此前O(ε⁻⁴ n (log n)³)和O(ε⁻² D³ n log n)的界。
AI.conclusion: 链式方法显著提升了超图谱稀疏化的效率，为相关算法提供了更优的理论基础和实践工具。

authors_text: Matthew Cleaveland,Esen Yel,Yiannis Kantaros,Insup Lee,Nicola Bezzo
title: Learning Enabled Fast Planning and Control in Dynamic Environments with Intermittent Information
title_zh: 学习在具有间歇性信息的动态环境中实现快速规划和控制
abstract: This paper addresses a safe planning and control problem for mobile robots operating in communication- and sensor-limited dynamic environments. In this case the robots cannot sense the objects around them and must instead rely on intermittent, external information about the environment, as e.g., in underwater applications. The challenge in this case is that the robots must plan using only this stale data, while accounting for any noise in the data or uncertainty in the environment. To address this challenge we propose a compositional technique which leverages neural networks to quickly plan and control a robot through crowded and dynamic environments using only intermittent information. Specifically, our tool uses reachability analysis and potential fields to train a neural network that is capable of generating safe control actions. We demonstrate our technique both in simulation with an underwater vehicle crossing a crowded shipping channel and with real experiments with ground vehicles in communication- and sensor-limited environments.
summary: This paper addresses a safe planning and control problem for mobile robots operating in communication- and sensor-limited dynamic environments. In this case the robots cannot sense the objects around them and must instead rely on intermittent, external information about the environment, as e.g., in underwater applications. The challenge in this case is that the robots must plan using only this stale data, while accounting for any noise in the data or uncertainty in the environment. To address this challenge we propose a compositional technique which leverages neural networks to quickly plan and control a robot through crowded and dynamic environments using only intermittent information. Specifically, our tool uses reachability analysis and potential fields to train a neural network that is capable of generating safe control actions. We demonstrate our technique both in simulation with an underwater vehicle crossing a crowded shipping channel and with real experiments with ground vehicles in communication- and sensor-limited environments.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了在通信和传感器有限的动态环境中运行的移动机器人的安全规划和控制问题。在这种情况下，机器人无法感知周围的物体，而必须依赖有关环境的间歇性外部信息，例如在水下应用中。这种情况下的挑战是机器人必须仅使用这些陈旧数据进行规划，同时考虑数据中的任何噪声或环境中的不确定性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种组合技术，该技术利用神经网络仅使用间歇性信息在拥挤和动态的环境中快速规划和控制机器人。具体来说，我们的工具使用可达性分析和势场来训练能够生成安全控制动作的神经网络。我们通过水下航行器穿越拥挤的航道的模拟以及地面航行器在通信和传感器有限的环境中的真实实验来展示我们的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的规划与控制方法，使移动机器人在通信和传感器受限的动态环境中，仅依赖间歇性外部信息实现安全导航。
AI.motivation: 在通信和传感器受限的环境中（如水下场景），机器人无法实时感知周围环境，需依赖可能过时或含噪声的间歇性信息进行规划，这对安全性和实时性提出挑战。
AI.method: 结合可达性分析与势场方法，训练神经网络快速生成安全控制策略，通过组合分析技术与深度学习处理动态环境中的不确定性。
AI.result: 在水下车辆穿越繁忙航道的仿真及地面车辆受限环境的实物实验中验证了方法的有效性，展示了应对动态障碍物的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经网络与经典控制理论的结合，为资源受限动态环境下的机器人安全规划提供了高效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

title: DeID-VC: Speaker De-identification via Zero-shot Pseudo Voice Conversion
title_zh: DeID-VC：通过零样本伪语音转换进行说话人去识别
comment: Accepted by Interspeech 2022
comments: Accepted by Interspeech 2022
abstract: The widespread adoption of speech-based online services raises security and privacy concerns regarding the data that they use and share. If the data were compromised, attackers could exploit user speech to bypass speaker verification systems or even impersonate users. To mitigate this, we propose DeID-VC, a speaker de-identification system that converts a real speaker to pseudo speakers, thus removing or obfuscating the speaker-dependent attributes from a spoken voice. The key components of DeID-VC include a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) based Pseudo Speaker Generator (PSG) and a voice conversion Autoencoder (AE) under zero-shot settings. With the help of PSG, DeID-VC can assign unique pseudo speakers at speaker level or even at utterance level. Also, two novel learning objectives are added to bridge the gap between training and inference of zero-shot voice conversion. We present our experimental results with word error rate (WER) and equal error rate (EER), along with three subjective metrics to evaluate the generated output of DeID-VC. The result shows that our method substantially improved intelligibility (WER 10% lower) and de-identification effectiveness (EER 5% higher) compared to our baseline. Code and listening demo: https://github.com/a43992899/DeID-VC
summary: The widespread adoption of speech-based online services raises security and privacy concerns regarding the data that they use and share. If the data were compromised, attackers could exploit user speech to bypass speaker verification systems or even impersonate users. To mitigate this, we propose DeID-VC, a speaker de-identification system that converts a real speaker to pseudo speakers, thus removing or obfuscating the speaker-dependent attributes from a spoken voice. The key components of DeID-VC include a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) based Pseudo Speaker Generator (PSG) and a voice conversion Autoencoder (AE) under zero-shot settings. With the help of PSG, DeID-VC can assign unique pseudo speakers at speaker level or even at utterance level. Also, two novel learning objectives are added to bridge the gap between training and inference of zero-shot voice conversion. We present our experimental results with word error rate (WER) and equal error rate (EER), along with three subjective metrics to evaluate the generated output of DeID-VC. The result shows that our method substantially improved intelligibility (WER 10% lower) and de-identification effectiveness (EER 5% higher) compared to our baseline. Code and listening demo: https://github.com/a43992899/DeID-VC
abstract_zh: 基于语音的在线服务的广泛采用引发了对其使用和共享数据的安全和隐私问题。如果数据遭到泄露，攻击者可以利用用户语音绕过说话者验证系统，甚至冒充用户。为了缓解这一问题，我们提出了 DeID-VC，这是一种说话人去识别系统，可将真实说话人转换为伪说话人，从而从口语中删除或混淆与说话人相关的属性。 DeID-VC的关键组件包括基于变分自动编码器（VAE）的伪说话人生成器（PSG）和零样本设置下的语音转换自动编码器（AE）。在 PSG 的帮助下，DeID-VC 可以在说话者级别甚至话语级别分配独特的伪说话者。此外，还添加了两个新颖的学习目标，以弥合零样本语音转换的训练和推理之间的差距。我们展示了我们的实验结果，包括单词错误率（WER）和等错误率（EER），以及三个主观指标来评估 DeID-VC 生成的输出。结果表明，与我们的基线相比，我们的方法大大提高了可懂度（WER 降低 10%）和去识别效果（EER 高 5%）。代码和监听演示：https://github.com/a43992899/DeID-VC

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeID-VC系统，通过零样本伪语音转换技术实现说话人去标识化，消除语音中的说话人依赖属性。
AI.motivation: 语音数据的广泛使用带来隐私风险，攻击者可能利用泄露语音绕过声纹验证系统或冒充用户，需通过去标识化技术保护用户隐私。
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器（VAE）构建伪说话人生成器（PSG），结合零样本语音转换自编码器（AE），并引入两个新学习目标弥合训练与推理阶段的差距。
AI.result: 实验显示，DeID-VC在词错误率（WER）降低10%、等错误率（EER）提高5%的同时，主观评估也验证了生成语音的可理解性与去标识效果。
AI.conclusion: DeID-VC通过伪说话人生成与零样本转换有效提升语音去标识性能，为隐私保护提供可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出DeID-VC系统，通过零样本伪语音转换技术实现说话人去标识化，消除语音中的说话人依赖属性。
motivation: 语音数据的广泛使用带来隐私风险，攻击者可能利用泄露语音绕过声纹验证系统或冒充用户，需通过去标识化技术保护用户隐私。
method: 基于变分自编码器（VAE）构建伪说话人生成器（PSG），结合零样本语音转换自编码器（AE），并引入两个新学习目标弥合训练与推理阶段的差距。
result: 实验显示，DeID-VC在词错误率（WER）降低10%、等错误率（EER）提高5%的同时，主观评估也验证了生成语音的可理解性与去标识效果。
conclusion: DeID-VC通过伪说话人生成与零样本转换有效提升语音去标识性能，为隐私保护提供可行方案。
search_text: DeID-VC: Speaker De-identification via Zero-shot Pseudo Voice Conversion DeID-VC：通过零样本伪语音转换进行说话人去识别 The widespread adoption of speech-based online services raises security and privacy concerns regarding the data that they use and share. If the data were compromised, attackers could exploit user speech to bypass speaker verification systems or even impersonate users. To mitigate this, we propose DeID-VC, a speaker de-identification system that converts a real speaker to pseudo speakers, thus removing or obfuscating the speaker-dependent attributes from a spoken voice. The key components of DeID-VC include a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) based Pseudo Speaker Generator (PSG) and a voice conversion Autoencoder (AE) under zero-shot settings. With the help of PSG, DeID-VC can assign unique pseudo speakers at speaker level or even at utterance level. Also, two novel learning objectives are added to bridge the gap between training and inference of zero-shot voice conversion. We present our experimental results with word error rate (WER) and equal error rate (EER), along with three subjective metrics to evaluate the generated output of DeID-VC. The result shows that our method substantially improved intelligibility (WER 10% lower) and de-identification effectiveness (EER 5% higher) compared to our baseline. Code and listening demo: https://github.com/a43992899/DeID-VC 基于语音的在线服务的广泛采用引发了对其使用和共享数据的安全和隐私问题。如果数据遭到泄露，攻击者可以利用用户语音绕过说话者验证系统，甚至冒充用户。为了缓解这一问题，我们提出了 DeID-VC，这是一种说话人去识别系统，可将真实说话人转换为伪说话人，从而从口语中删除或混淆与说话人相关的属性。 DeID-VC的关键组件包括基于变分自动编码器（VAE）的伪说话人生成器（PSG）和零样本设置下的语音转换自动编码器（AE）。在 PSG 的帮助下，DeID-VC 可以在说话者级别甚至话语级别分配独特的伪说话者。此外，还添加了两个新颖的学习目标，以弥合零样本语音转换的训练和推理之间的差距。我们展示了我们的实验结果，包括单词错误率（WER）和等错误率（EER），以及三个主观指标来评估 DeID-VC 生成的输出。结果表明，与我们的基线相比，我们的方法大大提高了可懂度（WER 降低 10%）和去识别效果（EER 高 5%）。代码和监听演示：https://github.com/a43992899/DeID-VC 本文提出DeID-VC系统，通过零样本伪语音转换技术实现说话人去标识化，消除语音中的说话人依赖属性。 Ruibin Yuan,Yuxuan Wu,Jacob Li,Jaxter Kim cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Mirco Planamente,Gabriele Goletto,Gabriele Trivigno,Giuseppe Averta,Barbara Caputo
title: PoliTO-IIT-CINI Submission to the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Challenge for Action Recognition
title_zh: PoliTO-IIT-CINI 提交 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 无监督域适应动作识别挑战赛
comment: 3rd place in the 2022 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Challenge for Action Recognition. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.00337
comments: 3rd place in the 2022 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Challenge for Action Recognition. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.00337
abstract: In this report, we describe the technical details of our submission to the EPIC-Kitchens-100 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) Challenge in Action Recognition. To tackle the domain-shift which exists under the UDA setting, we first exploited a recent Domain Generalization (DG) technique, called Relative Norm Alignment (RNA). Secondly, we extended this approach to work on unlabelled target data, enabling a simpler adaptation of the model to the target distribution in an unsupervised fashion. To this purpose, we included in our framework UDA algorithms, such as multi-level adversarial alignment and attentive entropy. By analyzing the challenge setting, we notice the presence of a secondary concurrence shift in the data, which is usually called environmental bias. It is caused by the existence of different environments, i.e., kitchens. To deal with these two shifts (environmental and temporal), we extended our system to perform Multi-Source Multi-Target Domain Adaptation. Finally, we employed distinct models in our final proposal to leverage the potential of popular video architectures, and we introduced two more losses for the ensemble adaptation. Our submission (entry 'plnet') is visible on the leaderboard and ranked in 2nd position for 'verb', and in 3rd position for both 'noun' and 'action'.
summary: In this report, we describe the technical details of our submission to the EPIC-Kitchens-100 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) Challenge in Action Recognition. To tackle the domain-shift which exists under the UDA setting, we first exploited a recent Domain Generalization (DG) technique, called Relative Norm Alignment (RNA). Secondly, we extended this approach to work on unlabelled target data, enabling a simpler adaptation of the model to the target distribution in an unsupervised fashion. To this purpose, we included in our framework UDA algorithms, such as multi-level adversarial alignment and attentive entropy. By analyzing the challenge setting, we notice the presence of a secondary concurrence shift in the data, which is usually called environmental bias. It is caused by the existence of different environments, i.e., kitchens. To deal with these two shifts (environmental and temporal), we extended our system to perform Multi-Source Multi-Target Domain Adaptation. Finally, we employed distinct models in our final proposal to leverage the potential of popular video architectures, and we introduced two more losses for the ensemble adaptation. Our submission (entry 'plnet') is visible on the leaderboard and ranked in 2nd position for 'verb', and in 3rd position for both 'noun' and 'action'.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们描述了我们向 EPIC-Kitchens-100 无监督域适应 (UDA) 动作识别挑战赛提交的技术细节。为了解决 UDA 设置下存在的域转移问题，我们首先利用了最新的域泛化 (DG) 技术，称为相对范数对齐 (RNA)。其次，我们扩展了这种方法来处理未标记的目标数据，从而使模型能够以无监督的方式更简单地适应目标分布。为此，我们在框架中加入了 UDA 算法，例如多级对抗性对齐和注意力熵。通过分析挑战设置，我们注意到数据中存在二次并发变化，这通常称为环境偏差。这是由于不同环境（即厨房）的存在而造成的。为了应对这两个转变（环境和时间），我们扩展了我们的系统以执行多源多目标域适应。最后，我们在最终提案中采用了不同的模型来利用流行视频架构的潜力，并且我们为整体适应引入了另外两个损失。我们提交的内容（条目“plnet”）在排行榜上可见，“动词”排名第二，“名词”和“动作”排名第三。

AI.tldr: 该论文描述了针对EPIC-KITCHENS-100动作识别无监督域适应挑战赛的解决方案，通过结合域泛化和多源域适应技术提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 为了解决无监督域适应中的域偏移问题及厨房环境引起的次级环境偏差，需设计有效方法适应目标域数据分布。
AI.method: 融合相对范数对齐（RNA）技术、多级对抗对齐、注意力熵损失，扩展多源多目标域适应框架，并引入集成模型与额外损失函数。
AI.result: 提交方案'plnet'在动词识别中排名第二，在名词和动作识别中均排名第三。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过处理环境与时间域偏移，有效提升了模型在目标域上的适应能力，取得竞赛优异成绩。

To tackle the domain-shift which exists under the UDA setting, we first exploited a recent Domain Generalization (DG) technique, called Relative Norm Alignment (RNA). Secondly, we extended this approach to work on unlabelled target data, enabling a simpler adaptation of the model to the target distribution in an unsupervised fashion. To this purpose, we included in our framework UDA algorithms, such as multi-level adversarial alignment and attentive entropy. By analyzing the challenge setting, we notice the presence of a secondary concurrence shift in the data, which is usually called environmental bias. It is caused by the existence of different environments, i.e., kitchens. To deal with these two shifts (environmental and temporal), we extended our system to perform Multi-Source Multi-Target Domain Adaptation. Finally, we employed distinct models in our final proposal to leverage the potential of popular video architectures, and we introduced two more losses for the ensemble adaptation.
