title: Experiments and a User Study for Hierarchical Drawings of Graphs
title_zh: 层次图绘制的实验和用户研究
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2011.12155
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2011.12155
abstract: We present experimental results and a user study for hierarchical drawings of graphs. A detailed hierarchical graph drawing technique that is based on the Path Based Framework (PBF) is presented. Extensive edge bundling is applied to draw all edges of the graph and the height of the drawing is minimized using compaction. The drawings produced by this framework are compared to drawings produced by the well known Sugiyama framework in terms of area, number of bends, number of crossings, and execution time. The new algorithm runs very fast and produces drawings that are readable and efficient. Since there are advantages (and disadvantages) to both frameworks, we performed a user study and the results show that the drawings produced by the new framework are well received in terms of clarity, readability, and usability. Hence, the new technique offers an interesting alternative to drawing hierarchical graphs, and is especially useful in applications where user defined paths are important and need to be highlighted.
summary: We present experimental results and a user study for hierarchical drawings of graphs. A detailed hierarchical graph drawing technique that is based on the Path Based Framework (PBF) is presented. Extensive edge bundling is applied to draw all edges of the graph and the height of the drawing is minimized using compaction. The drawings produced by this framework are compared to drawings produced by the well known Sugiyama framework in terms of area, number of bends, number of crossings, and execution time. The new algorithm runs very fast and produces drawings that are readable and efficient. Since there are advantages (and disadvantages) to both frameworks, we performed a user study and the results show that the drawings produced by the new framework are well received in terms of clarity, readability, and usability. Hence, the new technique offers an interesting alternative to drawing hierarchical graphs, and is especially useful in applications where user defined paths are important and need to be highlighted.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了图形分层绘图的实验结果和用户研究。提出了一种基于路径框架（PBF）的详细层次图绘制技术。应用广泛的边缘捆绑来绘制图形的所有边缘，并使用压缩最小化绘图的高度。该框架生成的绘图与众所周知的 Sugiyama 框架生成的绘图在面积、弯曲数量、交叉数量和执行时间方面进行了比较。新算法运行速度非常快，生成的绘图可读且高效。由于这两个框架各有优点（和缺点），我们进行了用户研究，结果表明新框架生成的绘图在清晰度、可读性和可用性方面受到好评。因此，这项新技术为绘制分层图提供了一种有趣的替代方法，并且在用户定义的路径很重要且需要突出显示的应用程序中特别有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于路径框架（PBF）的分层图绘制技术，并通过实验和用户研究验证其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有分层图绘制方法（如Sugiyama框架）在可读性、执行效率及用户自定义路径突出显示方面存在不足，需探索更优方案。
AI.method: 采用PBF框架结合边缘捆绑技术与高度压缩算法生成分层图，并与Sugiyama框架从面积、弯折数、交叉数及运行时间维度对比，辅以用户研究评估可读性。
AI.result: 新算法运行速度快，生成图示在可读性、清晰度和可用性上获得用户较高评价，但存在特定场景下的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为分层图绘制提供了有效替代方案，尤其适用于需强调用户自定义路径的应用场景。

The new algorithm runs very fast and produces drawings that are readable and efficient. Since there are advantages (and disadvantages) to both frameworks, we performed a user study and the results show that the drawings produced by the new framework are well received in terms of clarity, readability, and usability. Hence, the new technique offers an interesting alternative to drawing hierarchical graphs, and is especially useful in applications where user defined paths are important and need to be highlighted. 我们展示了图形分层绘图的实验结果和用户研究。提出了一种基于路径框架（PBF）的详细层次图绘制技术。应用广泛的边缘捆绑来绘制图形的所有边缘，并使用压缩最小化绘图的高度。该框架生成的绘图与众所周知的 Sugiyama 框架生成的绘图在面积、弯曲数量、交叉数量和执行时间方面进行了比较。新算法运行速度非常快，生成的绘图可读且高效。由于这两个框架各有优点（和缺点），我们进行了用户研究，结果表明新框架生成的绘图在清晰度、可读性和可用性方面受到好评。因此，这项新技术为绘制分层图提供了一种有趣的替代方法，并且在用户定义的路径很重要且需要突出显示的应用程序中特别有用。 本文提出了一种基于路径框架（PBF）的分层图绘制技术，并通过实验和用户研究验证其效果。 Panagiotis Lionakis,Giorgos Kritikakis,Ioannis G. Tollis cs.HC,cs.DS

authors_text: Marjan Famili,Jola Mirecka,Camila Rangel Smith,Anna Kotańska,Nikolai Juraschko,Beatriz Costa-Gomes,Colin M. Palmer,Jeyan Thiyagalingam,Tom Burnley,Mark Basham,Alan R. Lowe
title: Affinity-VAE: incorporating prior knowledge in representation learning from scientific images
title_zh: Affinity-VAE：将先验知识纳入科学图像的表示学习中
abstract: Learning compact and interpretable representations of data is a critical challenge in scientific image analysis. Here, we introduce Affinity-VAE, a generative model that enables us to impose our scientific intuition about the similarity of instances in the dataset on the learned representation during training. We demonstrate the utility of the approach in the scientific domain of cryo-electron tomography (cryo-ET) where a significant current challenge is to identify similar molecules within a noisy and low contrast tomographic image volume. This task is distinct from classification in that, at inference time, it is unknown whether an instance is part of the training set or not. We trained affinity-VAE using prior knowledge of protein structure to inform the latent space. Our model is able to create rotationally-invariant, morphologically homogeneous clusters in the latent representation, with improved cluster separation compared to other approaches. It achieves competitive performance on protein classification with the added benefit of disentangling object pose, structural similarity and an interpretable latent representation. In the context of cryo-ET data, affinity-VAE captures the orientation of identified proteins in 3D which can be used as a prior for subsequent scientific experiments. Extracting physical principles from a trained network is of significant importance in scientific imaging where a ground truth training set is not always feasible.
summary: Learning compact and interpretable representations of data is a critical challenge in scientific image analysis. Here, we introduce Affinity-VAE, a generative model that enables us to impose our scientific intuition about the similarity of instances in the dataset on the learned representation during training. We demonstrate the utility of the approach in the scientific domain of cryo-electron tomography (cryo-ET) where a significant current challenge is to identify similar molecules within a noisy and low contrast tomographic image volume. This task is distinct from classification in that, at inference time, it is unknown whether an instance is part of the training set or not. We trained affinity-VAE using prior knowledge of protein structure to inform the latent space. Our model is able to create rotationally-invariant, morphologically homogeneous clusters in the latent representation, with improved cluster separation compared to other approaches. It achieves competitive performance on protein classification with the added benefit of disentangling object pose, structural similarity and an interpretable latent representation. In the context of cryo-ET data, affinity-VAE captures the orientation of identified proteins in 3D which can be used as a prior for subsequent scientific experiments. Extracting physical principles from a trained network is of significant importance in scientific imaging where a ground truth training set is not always feasible.
abstract_zh: 学习紧凑且可解释的数据表示是科学图像分析中的一个关键挑战。在这里，我们介绍 Affinity-VAE，这是一种生成模型，使我们能够将关于数据集中实例相似性的科学直觉强加到训练期间学习到的表示上。我们展示了该方法在冷冻电子断层扫描（cryo-ET）科学领域的实用性，其中当前的重大挑战是在嘈杂和低对比度的断层扫描图像体积中识别相似的分子。此任务与分类的不同之处在于，在推理时，未知实例是否是训练集的一部分。我们使用蛋白质结构的先验知识来训练亲和力-VAE，以告知潜在空间。我们的模型能够在潜在表示中创建旋转不变、形态均匀的簇，与其他方法相比，簇分离得到了改进。它在蛋白质分类方面取得了竞争性的表现，并具有解开物体姿态、结构相似性和可解释的潜在表示的额外优势。在冷冻 ET 数据的背景下，亲和 VAE 捕获已识别蛋白质的 3D 方向，可用作后续科学实验的先验。从经过训练的网络中提取物理原理在科学成像中非常重要，因为地面实况训练集并不总是可行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Affinity-VAE生成模型，通过整合科学先验知识提升科学图像的表征学习，特别针对低温电子断层扫描（cryo-ET）中分子识别的挑战。
AI.motivation: 科学图像分析需学习紧凑可解释的表示，而cryo-ET领域因图像噪声和低对比度，需识别未知实例的相似分子，传统分类方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 设计Affinity-VAE模型，在训练中引入蛋白质结构先验知识约束潜在空间，生成旋转不变且形态均一的聚类，解耦物体姿态与结构相似性。
AI.result: 模型在蛋白质分类任务中表现优异，聚类分离度优于其他方法，并能捕捉蛋白质3D方向信息，为后续科学实验提供先验依据。
AI.conclusion: Affinity-VAE通过整合先验知识提升科学图像分析的可解释性，在缺乏真实训练集的场景下可提取物理原理，具有重要应用价值。

We demonstrate the utility of the approach in the scientific domain of cryo-electron tomography (cryo-ET) where a significant current challenge is to identify similar molecules within a noisy and low contrast tomographic image volume. authors_text: Zhenghan Fang,Kuo-Wei Lai,Peter van Zijl,Xu Li,Jeremias Sulam
title: DeepSTI: Towards Tensor Reconstruction using Fewer Orientations in Susceptibility Tensor Imaging
title_zh: DeepSTI：在磁化率张量成像中使用更少的方向实现张量重建
abstract: Susceptibility tensor imaging (STI) is an emerging magnetic resonance imaging technique that characterizes the anisotropic tissue magnetic susceptibility with a second-order tensor model. STI has the potential to provide information for both the reconstruction of white matter fiber pathways and detection of myelin changes in the brain at mm resolution or less, which would be of great value for understanding brain structure and function in healthy and diseased brain. However, the application of STI in vivo has been hindered by its cumbersome and time-consuming acquisition requirement of measuring susceptibility induced MR phase changes at multiple (usually more than six) head orientations. This complexity is enhanced by the limitation in head rotation angles due to physical constraints of the head coil. As a result, STI has not yet been widely applied in human studies in vivo. In this work, we tackle these issues by proposing an image reconstruction algorithm for STI that leverages data-driven priors. Our method, called DeepSTI, learns the data prior implicitly via a deep neural network that approximates the proximal operator of a regularizer function for STI. The dipole inversion problem is then solved iteratively using the learned proximal network. Experimental results using both simulation and in vivo human data demonstrate great improvement over state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of the reconstructed tensor image, principal eigenvector maps and tractography results, while allowing for tensor reconstruction with MR phase measured at much less than six different orientations. Notably, promising reconstruction results are achieved by our method from only one orientation in human in vivo, and we demonstrate a potential application of this technique for estimating lesion susceptibility anisotropy in patients with multiple sclerosis.
summary: Susceptibility tensor imaging (STI) is an emerging magnetic resonance imaging technique that characterizes the anisotropic tissue magnetic susceptibility with a second-order tensor model. STI has the potential to provide information for both the reconstruction of white matter fiber pathways and detection of myelin changes in the brain at mm resolution or less, which would be of great value for understanding brain structure and function in healthy and diseased brain. However, the application of STI in vivo has been hindered by its cumbersome and time-consuming acquisition requirement of measuring susceptibility induced MR phase changes at multiple (usually more than six) head orientations. This complexity is enhanced by the limitation in head rotation angles due to physical constraints of the head coil. As a result, STI has not yet been widely applied in human studies in vivo. In this work, we tackle these issues by proposing an image reconstruction algorithm for STI that leverages data-driven priors. Our method, called DeepSTI, learns the data prior implicitly via a deep neural network that approximates the proximal operator of a regularizer function for STI. The dipole inversion problem is then solved iteratively using the learned proximal network. Experimental results using both simulation and in vivo human data demonstrate great improvement over state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of the reconstructed tensor image, principal eigenvector maps and tractography results, while allowing for tensor reconstruction with MR phase measured at much less than six different orientations. Notably, promising reconstruction results are achieved by our method from only one orientation in human in vivo, and we demonstrate a potential application of this technique for estimating lesion susceptibility anisotropy in patients with multiple sclerosis.
abstract_zh: 磁化率张量成像（STI）是一种新兴的磁共振成像技术，它利用二阶张量模型来表征各向异性组织磁化率。 STI 有潜力以毫米级或更小的分辨率为白质纤维通路的重建和大脑中髓磷脂变化的检测提供信息，这对于了解健康和患病大脑的大脑结构和功能具有重要价值。然而，STI 在体内的应用因其繁琐且耗时的采集要求（在多个（通常超过 6 个）头部方向测量磁化率引起的 MR 相位变化）而受到阻碍。由于头部线圈的物理约束而导致的头部旋转角度的限制加剧了这种复杂性。因此，STI尚未广泛应用于人体体内研究。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种利用数据驱动先验的 STI 图像重建算法来解决这些问题。我们的方法称为 DeepSTI，通过深度神经网络隐式先验数据，该网络近似 STI 正则化函数的近端算子。然后使用学习到的近端网络迭代地解决偶极子反转问题。使用模拟和体内人体数据的实验结果表明，在重建张量图像、主特征向量图和纤维束成像结果方面，比最先进的算法有很大改进，同时允许使用在远少于六个不同方向测量的 MR 相位进行张量重建。值得注意的是，通过我们的方法在人体体内仅从一个方向实现了有希望的重建结果，并且我们证明了该技术在估计多发性硬化症患者的病变易感性各向异性方面的潜在应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepSTI算法，通过更少的头部方向测量实现 susceptibility tensor imaging（STI）的张量重建。
AI.motivation: STI技术因需要测量多个头部方向的磁化率相位变化而存在采集复杂且耗时的问题，限制了其在活体中的应用。
AI.method: 设计深度神经网络隐式学习数据先验，通过近端算子逼近正则化函数，迭代求解偶极子反演问题实现张量重建。
AI.result: 在仿真和活体数据中均优于现有算法，仅需一个方向即可实现有效重建，并展示了多发性硬化症病灶磁化率各向异性估计的潜力。
AI.conclusion: DeepSTI显著减少STI方向需求，为活体研究和临床应用提供了可行方案，尤其适用于需要快速成像的场景。

The dipole inversion problem is then solved iteratively using the learned proximal network. Experimental results using both simulation and in vivo human data demonstrate great improvement over state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of the reconstructed tensor image, principal eigenvector maps and tractography results, while allowing for tensor reconstruction with MR phase measured at much less than six different orientations. Notably, promising reconstruction results are achieved by our method from only one orientation in human in vivo, and we demonstrate a potential application of this technique for estimating lesion susceptibility anisotropy in patients with multiple sclerosis. 磁化率张量成像（STI）是一种新兴的磁共振成像技术，它利用二阶张量模型来表征各向异性组织磁化率。 STI 有潜力以毫米级或更小的分辨率为白质纤维通路的重建和大脑中髓磷脂变化的检测提供信息，这对于了解健康和患病大脑的大脑结构和功能具有重要价值。然而，STI 在体内的应用因其繁琐且耗时的采集要求（在多个（通常超过 6 个）头部方向测量磁化率引起的 MR 相位变化）而受到阻碍。由于头部线圈的物理约束而导致的头部旋转角度的限制加剧了这种复杂性。因此，STI尚未广泛应用于人体体内研究。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种利用数据驱动先验的 STI 图像重建算法来解决这些问题。我们的方法称为 DeepSTI，通过深度神经网络隐式先验数据，该网络近似 STI 正则化函数的近端算子。然后使用学习到的近端网络迭代地解决偶极子反转问题。使用模拟和体内人体数据的实验结果表明，在重建张量图像、主特征向量图和纤维束成像结果方面，比最先进的算法有很大改进，同时允许使用在远少于六个不同方向测量的 MR 相位进行张量重建。值得注意的是，通过我们的方法在人体体内仅从一个方向实现了有希望的重建结果，并且我们证明了该技术在估计多发性硬化症患者的病变易感性各向异性方面的潜在应用。 本文提出DeepSTI算法，通过更少的头部方向测量实现 susceptibility tensor imaging（STI）的张量重建。 Zhenghan Fang,Kuo-Wei Lai,Peter van Zijl,Xu Li,Jeremias Sulam eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Peng Yin,Shiqi Zhao,Ivan Cisneros,Abulikemu Abuduweili,Guoquan Huang,Micheal Milford,Changliu Liu,Howie Choset,Sebastian Scherer
title: General Place Recognition Survey: Towards the Real-world Autonomy Age
title_zh: 一般地点认知度调查：迈向现实世界的自治时代
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures. Submitted to IEEE T-RO survey paper
comments: 20 pages, 10 figures. Submitted to IEEE T-RO survey paper
abstract: Place recognition is the fundamental module that can assist Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) in loop-closure detection and re-localization for long-term navigation. The place recognition community has made astonishing progress over the last $20$ years, and this has attracted widespread research interest and application in multiple fields such as computer vision and robotics. However, few methods have shown promising place recognition performance in complex real-world scenarios, where long-term and large-scale appearance changes usually result in failures. Additionally, there is a lack of an integrated framework amongst the state-of-the-art methods that can handle all of the challenges in place recognition, which include appearance changes, viewpoint differences, robustness to unknown areas, and efficiency in real-world applications. In this work, we survey the state-of-the-art methods that target long-term localization and discuss future directions and opportunities. We start by investigating the formulation of place recognition in long-term autonomy and the major challenges in real-world environments. We then review the recent works in place recognition for different sensor modalities and current strategies for dealing with various place recognition challenges. Finally, we review the existing datasets for long-term localization and introduce our datasets and evaluation API for different approaches. This paper can be a tutorial for researchers new to the place recognition community and those who care about long-term robotics autonomy. We also provide our opinion on the frequently asked question in robotics: Do robots need accurate localization for long-term autonomy? A summary of this work and our datasets and evaluation API is publicly available to the robotics community at: https://github.com/MetaSLAM/GPRS.

abstract_zh: 地点识别是辅助同步定位与建图（SLAM）进行闭环检测和重新定位以实现长期导航的基本模块。地点识别社区在过去 20 美元的年里取得了惊人的进展，这引起了计算机视觉和机器人等多个领域的广泛研究兴趣和应用。然而，很少有方法在复杂的现实场景中表现出有希望的位置识别性能，在这些场景中，长期和大规模的外观变化通常会导致失败。此外，最先进的方法中缺乏一个集成框架来应对地点识别中的所有挑战，包括外观变化、视点差异、对未知区域的鲁棒性以及实际应用中的效率。在这项工作中，我们调查了以长期本地化为目标的最先进方法，并讨论了未来的方向和机会。我们首先研究长期自治中地点识别的制定以及现实环境中的主要挑战。然后，我们回顾了不同传感器模式的地点识别的最新工作以及应对各种地点识别挑战的当前策略。最后，我们回顾了长期本地化的现有数据集，并介绍了我们的数据集和针对不同方法的评估 API。对于刚接触位置识别社区的研究人员和那些关心长期机器人自主性的人来说，本文可以作为教程。我们还就机器人技术中的常见问题提供了我们的意见：机器人是否需要精确定位才能实现长期自主？这项工作以及我们的数据集和评估 API 的摘要已向机器人社区公开提供，网址为：https://github.com/MetaSLAM/GPRS。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了面向长期自主性的通用场所识别方法，分析了现有技术的挑战并提出未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有场所识别方法在复杂真实场景中表现不足，缺乏应对外观变化、视角差异等挑战的统一框架，需系统性总结与改进。
AI.method: 通过分析长期自主定位的数学定义，回顾多模态传感器方法及应对策略，整理公开数据集并提供自研数据集与评估工具。
AI.result: 总结了场所识别技术现状，公开了数据集与评估API，回答了机器人长期自主性是否依赖精确定位的争议性问题。
AI.conclusion: 尽管技术取得进展，但真实场景下的鲁棒性与泛化能力仍是挑战，本文资源为后续研究提供支持，强调精确定位对长期自主性的重要性。

authors_text: Randolph Linderman,Jingyang Zhang,Nathan Inkawhich,Hai Li,Yiran Chen
title: Fine-grain Inference on Out-of-Distribution Data with Hierarchical Classification
title_zh: 具有层次分类的分布外数据的细粒度推理
abstract: Machine learning methods must be trusted to make appropriate decisions in real-world environments, even when faced with out-of-distribution (OOD) samples. Many current approaches simply aim to detect OOD examples and alert the user when an unrecognized input is given. However, when the OOD sample significantly overlaps with the training data, a binary anomaly detection is not interpretable or explainable, and provides little information to the user. We propose a new model for OOD detection that makes predictions at varying levels of granularity as the inputs become more ambiguous, the model predictions become coarser and more conservative. Consider an animal classifier that encounters an unknown bird species and a car. Both cases are OOD, but the user gains more information if the classifier recognizes that its uncertainty over the particular species is too large and predicts bird instead of detecting it as OOD. Furthermore, we diagnose the classifiers performance at each level of the hierarchy improving the explainability and interpretability of the models predictions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of hierarchical classifiers for both fine- and coarse-grained OOD tasks.
summary: Machine learning methods must be trusted to make appropriate decisions in real-world environments, even when faced with out-of-distribution (OOD) samples. Many current approaches simply aim to detect OOD examples and alert the user when an unrecognized input is given. However, when the OOD sample significantly overlaps with the training data, a binary anomaly detection is not interpretable or explainable, and provides little information to the user. We propose a new model for OOD detection that makes predictions at varying levels of granularity as the inputs become more ambiguous, the model predictions become coarser and more conservative. Consider an animal classifier that encounters an unknown bird species and a car. Both cases are OOD, but the user gains more information if the classifier recognizes that its uncertainty over the particular species is too large and predicts bird instead of detecting it as OOD. Furthermore, we diagnose the classifiers performance at each level of the hierarchy improving the explainability and interpretability of the models predictions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of hierarchical classifiers for both fine- and coarse-grained OOD tasks.
abstract_zh: 必须相信机器学习方法能够在现实环境中做出适当的决策，即使面对分布外 (OOD) 样本也是如此。当前的许多方法只是旨在检测 OOD 示例，并在给出无法识别的输入时提醒用户。然而，当 OOD 样本与训练数据显着重叠时，二进制异常检测无法解释或解释，并且向用户提供的信息很少。我们提出了一种用于 OOD 检测的新模型，随着输入变得更加模糊，模型预测变得更加粗略和更加保守，该模型可以在不同的粒度级别进行预测。考虑一个动物分类器遇到一种未知的鸟类和一辆汽车。这两种情况都是 OOD，但是如果分类器认识到其对特定物种的不确定性太大并预测鸟类而不是将其检测为 OOD，则用户会获得更多信息。此外，我们诊断层次结构每个级别的分类器性能，提高模型预测的可解释性和可解释性。我们证明了分层分类器对于细粒度和粗粒度 OOD 任务的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层次分类的模型，用于在分布外数据上进行细粒度推理，通过多粒度预测提升可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法在样本与训练数据高度重叠时无法提供有效解释，用户难以理解模型不确定性。
AI.method: 设计分层分类架构，使模型在输入模糊时逐步降低预测粒度，并通过层次化性能诊断增强解释性。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在细粒度和粗粒度分布外检测任务中的有效性，显著提升模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 层次分类方法为分布外检测提供了更细粒度的解释框架，为模型设计与应用提供了新思路。

title: Reconstructing the Dynamic Directivity of Unconstrained Speech
title_zh: 重建无约束语音的动态指向性
comment: In proceedings of I3DA 2023 - The 2023 International Conference on Immersive and 3D Audio. DOI coming soon
comments: In proceedings of I3DA 2023 - The 2023 International Conference on Immersive and 3D Audio. DOI coming soon
abstract: This article presents a method for estimating and reconstructing the spatial energy distribution pattern of natural speech, which is crucial for achieving realistic vocal presence in virtual communication settings. The method comprises two stages. First, recordings of speech captured by a real, static microphone array are used to create an egocentric virtual array that tracks the movement of the speaker over time. This virtual array is used to measure and encode the high-resolution directivity pattern of the speech signal as it evolves dynamically with natural speech and movement. In the second stage, the encoded directivity representation is utilized to train a machine learning model that can estimate the full, dynamic directivity pattern given a limited set of speech signals, such as those recorded using the microphones on a head-mounted display. Our results show that neural networks can accurately estimate the full directivity pattern of natural, unconstrained speech from limited information. The proposed method for estimating and reconstructing the spatial energy distribution pattern of natural speech, along with the evaluation of various machine learning models and training paradigms, provides an important contribution to the development of realistic vocal presence in virtual communication settings.
summary: This article presents a method for estimating and reconstructing the spatial energy distribution pattern of natural speech, which is crucial for achieving realistic vocal presence in virtual communication settings. The method comprises two stages. First, recordings of speech captured by a real, static microphone array are used to create an egocentric virtual array that tracks the movement of the speaker over time. This virtual array is used to measure and encode the high-resolution directivity pattern of the speech signal as it evolves dynamically with natural speech and movement. In the second stage, the encoded directivity representation is utilized to train a machine learning model that can estimate the full, dynamic directivity pattern given a limited set of speech signals, such as those recorded using the microphones on a head-mounted display. Our results show that neural networks can accurately estimate the full directivity pattern of natural, unconstrained speech from limited information. The proposed method for estimating and reconstructing the spatial energy distribution pattern of natural speech, along with the evaluation of various machine learning models and training paradigms, provides an important contribution to the development of realistic vocal presence in virtual communication settings.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种估计和重建自然语音空间能量分布模式的方法，这对于在虚拟通信环境中实现真实的声音呈现至关重要。该方法包括两个阶段。首先，使用真实的静态麦克风阵列捕获的语音录音来创建一个以自我为中心的虚拟阵列，该阵列可以跟踪说话者随时间的移动。该虚拟阵列用于测量和编码语音信号的高分辨率方向性模式，因为它随着自然语音和运动而动态变化。在第二阶段，编码的方向性表示用于训练机器学习模型，该模型可以在给定一组有限的语音信号（例如使用头戴式显示器上的麦克风记录的语音信号）的情况下估计完整的动态方向性模式。我们的结果表明，神经网络可以根据有限的信息准确地估计自然、不受约束的语音的完整方向性模式。所提出的估计和重建自然语音空间能量分布模式的方法，以及对各种机器学习模型和训练范式的评估，为虚拟通信环境中真实声音存在的发展做出了重要贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，用于估计和重建自然语音的动态空间能量分布模式，以提升虚拟通信环境中的真实语音存在感。
AI.motivation: 实现虚拟通信中逼真的语音存在感需要准确还原语音的动态方向性特征，而传统方法难以处理自然无约束语音的复杂空间分布。
AI.method: 分两阶段实现：1）利用静态麦克风阵列录音构建跟踪说话人运动的虚拟阵列，编码语音动态方向性；2）训练机器学习模型，从有限语音信号（如头显麦克风）估计完整方向性模式。
AI.result: 实验表明神经网络能准确从有限信息中重建自然无约束语音的完整动态方向性模式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法及模型评估为虚拟通信中真实语音存在感的技术发展提供了重要参考。

search_text: Reconstructing the Dynamic Directivity of Unconstrained Speech 重建无约束语音的动态指向性 This article presents a method for estimating and reconstructing the spatial energy distribution pattern of natural speech, which is crucial for achieving realistic vocal presence in virtual communication settings. The method comprises two stages. First, recordings of speech captured by a real, static microphone array are used to create an egocentric virtual array that tracks the movement of the speaker over time. This virtual array is used to measure and encode the high-resolution directivity pattern of the speech signal as it evolves dynamically with natural speech and movement. In the second stage, the encoded directivity representation is utilized to train a machine learning model that can estimate the full, dynamic directivity pattern given a limited set of speech signals, such as those recorded using the microphones on a head-mounted display. Our results show that neural networks can accurately estimate the full directivity pattern of natural, unconstrained speech from limited information. The proposed method for estimating and reconstructing the spatial energy distribution pattern of natural speech, along with the evaluation of various machine learning models and training paradigms, provides an important contribution to the development of realistic vocal presence in virtual communication settings. 本文提出了一种估计和重建自然语音空间能量分布模式的方法，这对于在虚拟通信环境中实现真实的声音呈现至关重要。该方法包括两个阶段。首先，使用真实的静态麦克风阵列捕获的语音录音来创建一个以自我为中心的虚拟阵列，该阵列可以跟踪说话者随时间的移动。该虚拟阵列用于测量和编码语音信号的高分辨率方向性模式，因为它随着自然语音和运动而动态变化。在第二阶段，编码的方向性表示用于训练机器学习模型，该模型可以在给定一组有限的语音信号（例如使用头戴式显示器上的麦克风记录的语音信号）的情况下估计完整的动态方向性模式。我们的结果表明，神经网络可以根据有限的信息准确地估计自然、不受约束的语音的完整方向性模式。所提出的估计和重建自然语音空间能量分布模式的方法，以及对各种机器学习模型和训练范式的评估，为虚拟通信环境中真实声音存在的发展做出了重要贡献。 本文提出一种方法，用于估计和重建自然语音的动态空间能量分布模式，以提升虚拟通信环境中的真实语音存在感。 Camille Noufi,Dejan Markovic,Peter Dodds eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

title: MCIBI++: Soft Mining Contextual Information Beyond Image for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: MCIBI++：软挖掘图像之外的上下文信息以进行语义分割
comment: Accepted by TPAMI, codes are available at https://github.com/SegmentationBLWX/sssegmentation
comments: Accepted by TPAMI, codes are available at https://github.com/SegmentationBLWX/sssegmentation
abstract: Co-occurrent visual pattern makes context aggregation become an essential paradigm for semantic segmentation.The existing studies focus on modeling the contexts within image while neglecting the valuable semantics of the corresponding category beyond image. To this end, we propose a novel soft mining contextual information beyond image paradigm named MCIBI++ to further boost the pixel-level representations. Specifically, we first set up a dynamically updated memory module to store the dataset-level distribution information of various categories and then leverage the information to yield the dataset-level category representations during network forward. After that, we generate a class probability distribution for each pixel representation and conduct the dataset-level context aggregation with the class probability distribution as weights. Finally, the original pixel representations are augmented with the aggregated dataset-level and the conventional image-level contextual information. Moreover, in the inference phase, we additionally design a coarse-to-fine iterative inference strategy to further boost the segmentation results. MCIBI++ can be effortlessly incorporated into the existing segmentation frameworks and bring consistent performance improvements. Also, MCIBI++ can be extended into the video semantic segmentation framework with considerable improvements over the baseline. Equipped with MCIBI++, we achieved the state-of-the-art performance on seven challenging image or video semantic segmentation benchmarks.
summary: Co-occurrent visual pattern makes context aggregation become an essential paradigm for semantic segmentation.The existing studies focus on modeling the contexts within image while neglecting the valuable semantics of the corresponding category beyond image. To this end, we propose a novel soft mining contextual information beyond image paradigm named MCIBI++ to further boost the pixel-level representations. Specifically, we first set up a dynamically updated memory module to store the dataset-level distribution information of various categories and then leverage the information to yield the dataset-level category representations during network forward. After that, we generate a class probability distribution for each pixel representation and conduct the dataset-level context aggregation with the class probability distribution as weights. Finally, the original pixel representations are augmented with the aggregated dataset-level and the conventional image-level contextual information. Moreover, in the inference phase, we additionally design a coarse-to-fine iterative inference strategy to further boost the segmentation results. MCIBI++ can be effortlessly incorporated into the existing segmentation frameworks and bring consistent performance improvements. Also, MCIBI++ can be extended into the video semantic segmentation framework with considerable improvements over the baseline. Equipped with MCIBI++, we achieved the state-of-the-art performance on seven challenging image or video semantic segmentation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 共现视觉模式使得上下文聚合成为语义分割的重要范式。现有研究侧重于对图像内的上下文进行建模，而忽略了图像之外相应类别的有价值的语义。为此，我们提出了一种超越图像范式的新型软挖掘上下文信息，名为 MCIBI++，以进一步提升像素级表示。具体来说，我们首先设置一个动态更新的内存模块来存储各种类别的数据集级分布信息，然后利用这些信息在网络转发过程中生成数据集级类别表示。之后，我们为每个像素表示生成类别概率分布，并以类别概率分布作为权重进行数据集级上下文聚合。最后，原始像素表示通过聚合数据集级别和传统图像级别上下文信息进行增强。此外，在推理阶段，我们还设计了从粗到细的迭代推理策略，以进一步提高分割结果。 MCIBI++ 可以毫不费力地整合到现有的分段框架中，并带来一致的性能改进。此外，MCIBI++ 可以扩展到视频语义分割框架中，与基线相比有相当大的改进。配备 MCIBI++，我们在七个具有挑战性的图像或视频语义分割基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MCIBI++方法，通过挖掘图像外的上下文信息提升语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注图像内部上下文建模，忽视了图像外类别语义信息的价值，限制了像素级表示的学习效果。
AI.method: 构建动态更新的记忆模块存储数据集级类别分布，生成像素级类别概率分布作为权重进行上下文聚合，并结合图像级与数据集级信息增强原始表示；推理阶段采用粗到细的迭代策略。
AI.result: 在七个图像和视频语义分割基准测试中达到最先进水平，且可无缝集成到现有框架并提升视频分割性能。
AI.conclusion: MCIBI++通过有效利用图像外上下文信息，显著提升了语义分割精度，展示了方法的通用性与有效性。

title: Learning sparse auto-encoders for green AI image coding
title_zh: 学习稀疏自动编码器进行绿色人工智能图像编码
abstract: Recently, convolutional auto-encoders (CAE) were introduced for image coding. They achieved performance improvements over the state-of-the-art JPEG2000 method. However, these performances were obtained using massive CAEs featuring a large number of parameters and whose training required heavy computational power.\\ In this paper, we address the problem of lossy image compression using a CAE with a small memory footprint and low computational power usage. In order to overcome the computational cost issue, the majority of the literature uses Lagrangian proximal regularization methods, which are time consuming themselves.\\ In this work, we propose a constrained approach and a new structured sparse learning method. We design an algorithm and test it on three constraints: the classical $\ell_1$ constraint, the $\ell_{1,\infty}$ and the new $\ell_{1,1}$ constraint. Experimental results show that the $\ell_{1,1}$ constraint provides the best structured sparsity, resulting in a high reduction of memory and computational cost, with similar rate-distortion performance as with dense networks.
summary: Recently, convolutional auto-encoders (CAE) were introduced for image coding. They achieved performance improvements over the state-of-the-art JPEG2000 method. However, these performances were obtained using massive CAEs featuring a large number of parameters and whose training required heavy computational power.\\ In this paper, we address the problem of lossy image compression using a CAE with a small memory footprint and low computational power usage. In order to overcome the computational cost issue, the majority of the literature uses Lagrangian proximal regularization methods, which are time consuming themselves.\\ In this work, we propose a constrained approach and a new structured sparse learning method. We design an algorithm and test it on three constraints: the classical $\ell_1$ constraint, the $\ell_{1,\infty}$ and the new $\ell_{1,1}$ constraint. Experimental results show that the $\ell_{1,1}$ constraint provides the best structured sparsity, resulting in a high reduction of memory and computational cost, with similar rate-distortion performance as with dense networks.
abstract_zh: 最近，卷积自动编码器（CAE）被引入图像编码。与最先进的 JPEG2000 方法相比，他们实现了性能改进。然而，这些性能是使用具有大量参数的大量 CAE 获得的，其训练需要大量计算能力。\\在本文中，我们使用内存占用小和计算能力使用率低的 CAE 解决有损图像压缩问题。为了克服计算成本问题，大多数文献使用拉格朗日近端正则化方法，这些方法本身很耗时。\\在这项工作中，我们提出了一种约束方法和一种新的结构化稀疏学习方法。我们设计一个算法并在三个约束上对其进行测试：经典的 $\ell_1$ 约束、$\ell_{1,\infty}$ 和新的 $\ell_{1,1}$ 约束。实验结果表明，$\ell_{1,1}$ 约束提供了最佳的结构化稀疏性，从而大大减少了内存和计算成本，并具有与密集网络相似的率失真性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化稀疏学习方法，用于设计低计算量和内存占用的卷积自编码器（CAE），以实现高效的绿色AI图像编码。
AI.motivation: 现有的CAE图像编码方法虽性能优于JPEG2000，但参数量大且训练计算成本高，难以满足绿色AI对低资源消耗的需求。
AI.method: 提出约束优化方法与新型ℓ₁,₁稀疏正则化技术，设计适用于三种约束条件（ℓ₁、ℓ₁,∞、ℓ₁,₁）的结构化稀疏学习算法。

search_text: Learning sparse auto-encoders for green AI image coding 学习稀疏自动编码器进行绿色人工智能图像编码 Recently, convolutional auto-encoders (CAE) were introduced for image coding. They achieved performance improvements over the state-of-the-art JPEG2000 method. However, these performances were obtained using massive CAEs featuring a large number of parameters and whose training required heavy computational power.\\ In this paper, we address the problem of lossy image compression using a CAE with a small memory footprint and low computational power usage. In order to overcome the computational cost issue, the majority of the literature uses Lagrangian proximal regularization methods, which are time consuming themselves.\\ In this work, we propose a constrained approach and a new structured sparse learning method. We design an algorithm and test it on three constraints: the classical $\ell_1$ constraint, the $\ell_{1,\infty}$ and the new $\ell_{1,1}$ constraint. Experimental results show that the $\ell_{1,1}$ constraint provides the best structured sparsity, resulting in a high reduction of memory and computational cost, with similar rate-distortion performance as with dense networks. 最近，卷积自动编码器（CAE）被引入图像编码。与最先进的 JPEG2000 方法相比，他们实现了性能改进。然而，这些性能是使用具有大量参数的大量 CAE 获得的，其训练需要大量计算能力。\\在本文中，我们使用内存占用小和计算能力使用率低的 CAE 解决有损图像压缩问题。为了克服计算成本问题，大多数文献使用拉格朗日近端正则化方法，这些方法本身很耗时。\\在这项工作中，我们提出了一种约束方法和一种新的结构化稀疏学习方法。我们设计一个算法并在三个约束上对其进行测试：经典的 $\ell_1$ 约束、$\ell_{1,\infty}$ 和新的 $\ell_{1,1}$ 约束。实验结果表明，$\ell_{1,1}$ 约束提供了最佳的结构化稀疏性，从而大大减少了内存和计算成本，并具有与密集网络相似的率失真性能。 本文提出了一种结构化稀疏学习方法，用于设计低计算量和内存占用的卷积自编码器（CAE），以实现高效的绿色AI图像编码。 Cyprien Gille,Frédéric Guyard,Marc Antonini,Michel Barlaud eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Vijay Srinivas Tida Sai Venkatesh Chilukoti,Sonya Hsu,Xiali Hei
title: Privacy-Preserving Deep Learning Model for Covid-19 Disease Detection
title_zh: 用于 Covid-19 疾病检测的隐私保护深度学习模型
abstract: Recent studies demonstrated that X-ray radiography showed higher accuracy than Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR) testing for COVID-19 detection. Therefore, applying deep learning models to X-rays and radiography images increases the speed and accuracy of determining COVID-19 cases. However, due to Health Insurance Portability and Accountability (HIPAA) compliance, the hospitals were unwilling to share patient data due to privacy concerns. To maintain privacy, we propose differential private deep learning models to secure the patients' private information. The dataset from the Kaggle website is used to evaluate the designed model for COVID-19 detection. The EfficientNet model version was selected according to its highest test accuracy. The injection of differential privacy constraints into the best-obtained model was made to evaluate performance. The accuracy is noted by varying the trainable layers, privacy loss, and limiting information from each sample. We obtained 84\% accuracy with a privacy loss of 10 during the fine-tuning process.
summary: Recent studies demonstrated that X-ray radiography showed higher accuracy than Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR) testing for COVID-19 detection. Therefore, applying deep learning models to X-rays and radiography images increases the speed and accuracy of determining COVID-19 cases. However, due to Health Insurance Portability and Accountability (HIPAA) compliance, the hospitals were unwilling to share patient data due to privacy concerns. To maintain privacy, we propose differential private deep learning models to secure the patients' private information. The dataset from the Kaggle website is used to evaluate the designed model for COVID-19 detection. The EfficientNet model version was selected according to its highest test accuracy. The injection of differential privacy constraints into the best-obtained model was made to evaluate performance. The accuracy is noted by varying the trainable layers, privacy loss, and limiting information from each sample. We obtained 84\% accuracy with a privacy loss of 10 during the fine-tuning process.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，对于 COVID-19 检测，X 射线照相术比聚合酶链反应 (PCR) 检测具有更高的准确性。因此，将深度学习模型应用于 X 射线和放射线图像可以提高确定 COVID-19 病例的速度和准确性。然而，由于健康保险流通与责任 (HIPAA) 合规性，医院出于隐私考虑不愿共享患者数据。为了保护隐私，我们提出了差异化的私人深度学习模型来保护患者的私人信息。 Kaggle 网站的数据集用于评估设计的 COVID-19 检测模型。 EfficientNet模型版本是根据其最高测试精度来选择的。将差异隐私约束注入最佳模型中以评估性能。通过改变可训练层、隐私损失和每个样本的限制信息来记录准确性。在微调过程中，我们获得了 84% 的准确率，隐私损失为 10。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于差分隐私的深度学习模型，用于在保护患者隐私的前提下检测COVID-19疾病。
AI.motivation: 由于HIPAA法规限制，医院不愿共享患者X光数据，而传统深度学习模型需依赖大量数据。需在隐私保护与检测准确性间取得平衡。
AI.method: 选用EfficientNet模型并注入差分隐私约束，通过调整可训练层、隐私损失及样本信息限制进行评估，使用Kaggle数据集验证模型性能。
AI.result: 在隐私损失为10的条件下，模型在微调过程中达到84%的检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私机制可有效保护患者数据隐私，同时保持较高检测准确率，为医疗AI应用提供合规解决方案。

motivation: 由于HIPAA法规限制，医院不愿共享患者X光数据，而传统深度学习模型需依赖大量数据。需在隐私保护与检测准确性间取得平衡。

result: 在隐私损失为10的条件下，模型在微调过程中达到84%的检测准确率。

title: Monkeypox virus detection using pre-trained deep learning-based approaches
title_zh: 使用预先训练的基于深度学习的方法检测猴痘病毒
comment: Under consideration in Journal of Medical Systems
comments: Under consideration in Journal of Medical Systems
abstract: Monkeypox virus is emerging slowly with the decline of COVID-19 virus infections around the world. People are afraid of it, thinking that it would appear as a pandemic like COVID-19. As such, it is crucial to detect them earlier before widespread community transmission. AI-based detection could help identify them at the early stage. In this paper, we aim to compare 13 different pre-trained deep learning (DL) models for the Monkeypox virus detection. For this, we initially fine-tune them with the addition of universal custom layers for all of them and analyse the results using four well-established measures: Precision, Recall, F1-score, and Accuracy. After the identification of the best-performing DL models, we ensemble them to improve the overall performance using a majority voting over the probabilistic outputs obtained from them. We perform our experiments on a publicly available dataset, which results in average Precision, Recall, F1-score, and Accuracy of 85.44\%, 85.47\%, 85.40\%, and 87.13\%, respectively with the help of our proposed ensemble approach. These encouraging results, which outperform the state-of-the-art methods, suggest that the proposed approach is applicable to health practitioners for mass screening.
summary: Monkeypox virus is emerging slowly with the decline of COVID-19 virus infections around the world. People are afraid of it, thinking that it would appear as a pandemic like COVID-19. As such, it is crucial to detect them earlier before widespread community transmission. AI-based detection could help identify them at the early stage. In this paper, we aim to compare 13 different pre-trained deep learning (DL) models for the Monkeypox virus detection. For this, we initially fine-tune them with the addition of universal custom layers for all of them and analyse the results using four well-established measures: Precision, Recall, F1-score, and Accuracy. After the identification of the best-performing DL models, we ensemble them to improve the overall performance using a majority voting over the probabilistic outputs obtained from them. We perform our experiments on a publicly available dataset, which results in average Precision, Recall, F1-score, and Accuracy of 85.44\%, 85.47\%, 85.40\%, and 87.13\%, respectively with the help of our proposed ensemble approach. These encouraging results, which outperform the state-of-the-art methods, suggest that the proposed approach is applicable to health practitioners for mass screening.
abstract_zh: 随着世界各地 COVID-19 病毒感染的减少，猴痘病毒正在缓慢出现。人们害怕它，认为它会像 COVID-19 一样表现为流行病。因此，在广泛的社区传播之前尽早发现它们至关重要。基于人工智能的检测可以帮助在早期阶段识别它们。在本文中，我们的目标是比较 13 种不同的用于猴痘病毒检测的预训练深度学习 (DL) 模型。为此，我们首先通过为所有这些添加通用自定义层来对它们进行微调，并使用四种行之有效的衡量标准来分析结果：精确度、召回率、F1 分数和准确度。在识别出性能最佳的深度学习模型后，我们将它们集成起来，通过对从它们获得的概率输出进行多数投票来提高整体性能。我们在公开可用的数据集上进行实验，借助我们提出的集成方法，平均精度、召回率、F1 分数和准确度分别为 85.44\%、85.47\%、85.40\% 和 87.13\%。这些令人鼓舞的结果优于最先进的方法，表明所提出的方法适用于健康从业人员进行大规模筛查。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在比较13种预训练深度学习模型在猴痘病毒检测中的表现，并通过集成方法提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 随着全球新冠状病毒病例的减少，猴痘病毒逐渐成为关注焦点，人们担心其可能引发类似新冠的疫情，因此需要早期检测手段以防止社区传播。
AI.method: 作者对13种预训练深度学习模型进行微调，并添加通用自定义层。随后，使用精确率、召回率、F1分数和准确率四种指标分析结果，并通过集成最佳模型的多数投票方法提升整体性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用集成方法后，平均精确率、召回率、F1分数和准确率分别为85.44%、85.47%、85.40%和87.13%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在猴痘病毒检测中表现出色，适用于大规模筛查，为医疗工作者提供了一种有效的辅助工具。

search_text: Monkeypox virus detection using pre-trained deep learning-based approaches 使用预先训练的基于深度学习的方法检测猴痘病毒 Monkeypox virus is emerging slowly with the decline of COVID-19 virus infections around the world. People are afraid of it, thinking that it would appear as a pandemic like COVID-19. As such, it is crucial to detect them earlier before widespread community transmission. AI-based detection could help identify them at the early stage. In this paper, we aim to compare 13 different pre-trained deep learning (DL) models for the Monkeypox virus detection. For this, we initially fine-tune them with the addition of universal custom layers for all of them and analyse the results using four well-established measures: Precision, Recall, F1-score, and Accuracy. After the identification of the best-performing DL models, we ensemble them to improve the overall performance using a majority voting over the probabilistic outputs obtained from them. We perform our experiments on a publicly available dataset, which results in average Precision, Recall, F1-score, and Accuracy of 85.44\%, 85.47\%, 85.40\%, and 87.13\%, respectively with the help of our proposed ensemble approach. These encouraging results, which outperform the state-of-the-art methods, suggest that the proposed approach is applicable to health practitioners for mass screening. 随着世界各地 COVID-19 病毒感染的减少，猴痘病毒正在缓慢出现。人们害怕它，认为它会像 COVID-19 一样表现为流行病。因此，在广泛的社区传播之前尽早发现它们至关重要。基于人工智能的检测可以帮助在早期阶段识别它们。在本文中，我们的目标是比较 13 种不同的用于猴痘病毒检测的预训练深度学习 (DL) 模型。为此，我们首先通过为所有这些添加通用自定义层来对它们进行微调，并使用四种行之有效的衡量标准来分析结果：精确度、召回率、F1 分数和准确度。在识别出性能最佳的深度学习模型后，我们将它们集成起来，通过对从它们获得的概率输出进行多数投票来提高整体性能。我们在公开可用的数据集上进行实验，借助我们提出的集成方法，平均精度、召回率、F1 分数和准确度分别为 85.44\%、85.47\%、85.40\% 和 87.13\%。这些令人鼓舞的结果优于最先进的方法，表明所提出的方法适用于健康从业人员进行大规模筛查。 本文旨在比较13种预训练深度学习模型在猴痘病毒检测中的表现，并通过集成方法提升检测性能。 Chiranjibi Sitaula,Tej Bahadur Shahi eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Improved Masked Image Generation with Token-Critic
title_zh: 使用 Token-Critic 改进蒙版图像生成
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022
abstract: Non-autoregressive generative transformers recently demonstrated impressive image generation performance, and orders of magnitude faster sampling than their autoregressive counterparts. However, optimal parallel sampling from the true joint distribution of visual tokens remains an open challenge. In this paper we introduce Token-Critic, an auxiliary model to guide the sampling of a non-autoregressive generative transformer. Given a masked-and-reconstructed real image, the Token-Critic model is trained to distinguish which visual tokens belong to the original image and which were sampled by the generative transformer. During non-autoregressive iterative sampling, Token-Critic is used to select which tokens to accept and which to reject and resample. Coupled with Token-Critic, a state-of-the-art generative transformer significantly improves its performance, and outperforms recent diffusion models and GANs in terms of the trade-off between generated image quality and diversity, in the challenging class-conditional ImageNet generation.
summary: Non-autoregressive generative transformers recently demonstrated impressive image generation performance, and orders of magnitude faster sampling than their autoregressive counterparts. However, optimal parallel sampling from the true joint distribution of visual tokens remains an open challenge. In this paper we introduce Token-Critic, an auxiliary model to guide the sampling of a non-autoregressive generative transformer. Given a masked-and-reconstructed real image, the Token-Critic model is trained to distinguish which visual tokens belong to the original image and which were sampled by the generative transformer. During non-autoregressive iterative sampling, Token-Critic is used to select which tokens to accept and which to reject and resample. Coupled with Token-Critic, a state-of-the-art generative transformer significantly improves its performance, and outperforms recent diffusion models and GANs in terms of the trade-off between generated image quality and diversity, in the challenging class-conditional ImageNet generation.
abstract_zh: 非自回归生成变压器最近表现出了令人印象深刻的图像生成性能，并且采样速度比自回归同类产品快几个数量级。然而，从视觉标记的真实联合分布中进行最佳并行采样仍然是一个开放的挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 Token-Critic，这是一种指导非自回归生成变压器采样的辅助模型。给定一个经过掩模和重建的真实图像，训练 Token-Critic 模型来区分哪些视觉标记属于原始图像，哪些视觉标记是由生成转换器采样的。在非自回归迭代采样期间，Token-Critic 用于选择接受哪些 token 以及拒绝哪些 token 并重新采样。与 Token-Critic 相结合，最先进的生成变压器显着提高了其性能，并且在具有挑战性的类条件 ImageNet 生成中，在生成图像质量和多样性之间的权衡方面优于最近的扩散模型和 GAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Token-Critic的辅助模型，用于改进非自回归生成变压器在掩码图像生成中的性能。
AI.motivation: 非自回归生成模型虽然采样速度快，但难以从真实视觉标记的联合分布中进行最优并行采样，存在生成质量与多样性之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 通过训练Token-Critic模型区分原始图像标记与生成器采样的标记，在非自回归迭代采样过程中动态选择接受或拒绝并重新采样标记。
AI.result: 结合Token-Critic的生成变压器在ImageNet条件下生成的图像质量与多样性均优于最新扩散模型和GANs。
AI.conclusion: Token-Critic有效解决了非自回归模型的采样优化问题，为高质量图像生成提供了新方法。

authors_text: Egor Burkov,Ruslan Rakhimov,Aleksandr Safin,Evgeny Burnaev,Victor Lempitsky
title: Multi-NeuS: 3D Head Portraits from Single Image with Neural Implicit Functions
title_zh: Multi-NeuS：具有神经隐式功能的单图像 3D 头像
abstract: We present an approach for the reconstruction of textured 3D meshes of human heads from one or few views. Since such few-shot reconstruction is underconstrained, it requires prior knowledge which is hard to impose on traditional 3D reconstruction algorithms. In this work, we rely on the recently introduced 3D representation $\unicode{x2013}$ neural implicit functions $\unicode{x2013}$ which, being based on neural networks, allows to naturally learn priors about human heads from data, and is directly convertible to textured mesh. Namely, we extend NeuS, a state-of-the-art neural implicit function formulation, to represent multiple objects of a class (human heads in our case) simultaneously. The underlying neural net architecture is designed to learn the commonalities among these objects and to generalize to unseen ones. Our model is trained on just a hundred smartphone videos and does not require any scanned 3D data. Afterwards, the model can fit novel heads in the few-shot or one-shot modes with good results.
summary: We present an approach for the reconstruction of textured 3D meshes of human heads from one or few views. Since such few-shot reconstruction is underconstrained, it requires prior knowledge which is hard to impose on traditional 3D reconstruction algorithms. In this work, we rely on the recently introduced 3D representation $\unicode{x2013}$ neural implicit functions $\unicode{x2013}$ which, being based on neural networks, allows to naturally learn priors about human heads from data, and is directly convertible to textured mesh. Namely, we extend NeuS, a state-of-the-art neural implicit function formulation, to represent multiple objects of a class (human heads in our case) simultaneously. The underlying neural net architecture is designed to learn the commonalities among these objects and to generalize to unseen ones. Our model is trained on just a hundred smartphone videos and does not require any scanned 3D data. Afterwards, the model can fit novel heads in the few-shot or one-shot modes with good results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从一个或几个视图重建人体头部纹理 3D 网格的方法。由于这种少镜头重建受到约束，因此需要先验知识，而这很难强加于传统的 3D 重建算法。在这项工作中，我们依赖于最近引入的 3D 表示 $\unicode{x2013}$ 神经隐式函数 $\unicode{x2013}$，它基于神经网络，允许从数据中自然地学习有关人体头部的先验，并且可以直接转换为纹理网格。也就是说，我们扩展了 NeuS（一种最先进的神经隐式函数公式）来同时表示一个类的多个对象（在我们的例子中是人头）。底层神经网络架构旨在学习这些对象之间的共性并推广到看不见的对象。我们的模型仅使用一百个智能手机视频进行训练，不需要任何扫描的 3D 数据。之后，该模型可以在少发或单发模式下安装新颖的头部，并取得良好的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经隐式函数的方法，从单张图像生成高质量的3D人头模型，无需3D扫描数据。
AI.motivation: 传统3D重建算法在少样本情况下难以施加有效先验知识，而神经隐式函数能从数据中学习人类头部的先验特征并直接生成纹理网格。
AI.method: 扩展NeuS模型以同时表示多个人头，设计神经网络学习同类对象共性，仅使用智能手机视频训练，无需3D扫描数据。
AI.result: 模型可在少样本/单样本模式下生成高质量3D人头网格，训练数据仅来自视频，未使用任何扫描的3D数据。
AI.conclusion: Multi-NeuS通过神经隐式函数有效解决少样本3D重建问题，证明了从视频数据学习先验知识的可行性，为后续研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Shashank Sanjay Bhat,Thiagaraj Prabu,Ben Stappers,Atul Ghalame,Snehanshu Saha,T. S. B Sudarshan,Zafiirah Hosenie
title: Investigation of a Machine learning methodology for the SKA pulsar search pipeline
title_zh: SKA 脉冲星搜索管道的机器学习方法研究
comment: ef:Journal of Astronomy and Astrophysics SKA special issue 2022-23 (Under review)
comments: ef:Journal of Astronomy and Astrophysics SKA special issue 2022-23 (Under review)
abstract: The SKA pulsar search pipeline will be used for real time detection of pulsars. Modern radio telescopes such as SKA will be generating petabytes of data in their full scale of operation. Hence experience-based and data-driven algorithms become indispensable for applications such as candidate detection. Here we describe our findings from testing a state of the art object detection algorithm called Mask R-CNN to detect candidate signatures in the SKA pulsar search pipeline. We have trained the Mask R-CNN model to detect candidate images. A custom annotation tool was developed to mark the regions of interest in large datasets efficiently. We have successfully demonstrated this algorithm by detecting candidate signatures on a simulation dataset. The paper presents details of this work with a highlight on the future prospects.
summary: The SKA pulsar search pipeline will be used for real time detection of pulsars. Modern radio telescopes such as SKA will be generating petabytes of data in their full scale of operation. Hence experience-based and data-driven algorithms become indispensable for applications such as candidate detection. Here we describe our findings from testing a state of the art object detection algorithm called Mask R-CNN to detect candidate signatures in the SKA pulsar search pipeline. We have trained the Mask R-CNN model to detect candidate images. A custom annotation tool was developed to mark the regions of interest in large datasets efficiently. We have successfully demonstrated this algorithm by detecting candidate signatures on a simulation dataset. The paper presents details of this work with a highlight on the future prospects.
abstract_zh: SKA脉冲星搜索管道将用于脉冲星的实时探测。 SKA 等现代射电望远镜在全面运行时将产生 PB 级的数据。因此，基于经验和数据驱动的算法对于候选检测等应用变得不可或缺。在这里，我们描述了我们测试最先进的对象检测算法（称为 Mask R-CNN）以检测 SKA 脉冲星搜索管道中的候选签名的结果。我们训练了 Mask R-CNN 模型来检测候选图像。开发了自定义注释工具来有效地标记大型数据集中的感兴趣区域。我们通过检测模拟数据集上的候选签名成功地演示了该算法。本文介绍了这项工作的细节，并重点介绍了未来的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨将Mask R-CNN机器学习算法应用于SKA脉冲星搜索流程，用于实时检测脉冲星候选信号。
AI.motivation: SKA望远镜将产生海量数据，传统方法难以高效处理，需借助数据驱动算法提升候选信号检测效率。
AI.method: 采用Mask R-CNN模型进行目标检测，开发自定义标注工具标记数据集中的感兴趣区域，并在模拟数据集上验证算法有效性。
AI.result: 成功在模拟数据集上检测到脉冲星候选信号，证明该方法在SKA搜索流程中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法为SKA脉冲星搜索提供了新思路，未来需进一步优化模型以适应实际观测数据的复杂性。

search_text: Investigation of a Machine learning methodology for the SKA pulsar search pipeline SKA 脉冲星搜索管道的机器学习方法研究 The SKA pulsar search pipeline will be used for real time detection of pulsars. Modern radio telescopes such as SKA will be generating petabytes of data in their full scale of operation. Hence experience-based and data-driven algorithms become indispensable for applications such as candidate detection. Here we describe our findings from testing a state of the art object detection algorithm called Mask R-CNN to detect candidate signatures in the SKA pulsar search pipeline. We have trained the Mask R-CNN model to detect candidate images. A custom annotation tool was developed to mark the regions of interest in large datasets efficiently. We have successfully demonstrated this algorithm by detecting candidate signatures on a simulation dataset. The paper presents details of this work with a highlight on the future prospects. SKA脉冲星搜索管道将用于脉冲星的实时探测。 SKA 等现代射电望远镜在全面运行时将产生 PB 级的数据。因此，基于经验和数据驱动的算法对于候选检测等应用变得不可或缺。在这里，我们描述了我们测试最先进的对象检测算法（称为 Mask R-CNN）以检测 SKA 脉冲星搜索管道中的候选签名的结果。我们训练了 Mask R-CNN 模型来检测候选图像。开发了自定义注释工具来有效地标记大型数据集中的感兴趣区域。我们通过检测模拟数据集上的候选签名成功地演示了该算法。本文介绍了这项工作的细节，并重点介绍了未来的前景。 本文探讨将Mask R-CNN机器学习算法应用于SKA脉冲星搜索流程，用于实时检测脉冲星候选信号。 Shashank Sanjay Bhat,Thiagaraj Prabu,Ben Stappers,Atul Ghalame,Snehanshu Saha,T. S. B Sudarshan,Zafiirah Hosenie astro-ph.IM,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Zydeco-Style Spike Sorting Low Power VLSI Architecture for IoT BCI Implants
title_zh: 适用于物联网 BCI 植入物的 Zydeco 式 Spike Sorting 低功耗 VLSI 架构
comment: 6 pages, 7 Figures
comments: 6 pages, 7 Figures
abstract: Brain Computer Interface (BCI) has great potential for solving many brain signal analysis limitations, mental disorder resolutions, and restoring missing limb functionality via neural-controlled implants. However, there is no single available, and safe implant for daily life usage exists yet. Most of the proposed implants have several implementation issues, such as infection hazards and heat dissipation, which limits their usability and makes it more challenging to pass regulations and quality control production. The wireless implant does not require a chronic wound in the skull. However, the current complex clustering neuron identification algorithms inside the implant chip consume a lot of power and bandwidth, causing higher heat dissipation issues and draining the implant's battery. The spike sorting is the core unit of an invasive BCI chip, which plays a significant role in power consumption, accuracy, and area. Therefore, in this study, we propose a low-power adaptive simplified VLSI architecture, "Zydeco-Style," for BCI spike sorting that is computationally less complex with higher accuracy that performs up to 93.5% in the worst-case scenario. The architecture uses a low-power Bluetooth Wireless communication module with external IoT medical ICU devices. The proposed architecture was implemented and simulated in Verilog. In addition, we are proposing an implant conceptual design.
summary: Brain Computer Interface (BCI) has great potential for solving many brain signal analysis limitations, mental disorder resolutions, and restoring missing limb functionality via neural-controlled implants. However, there is no single available, and safe implant for daily life usage exists yet. Most of the proposed implants have several implementation issues, such as infection hazards and heat dissipation, which limits their usability and makes it more challenging to pass regulations and quality control production. However, the current complex clustering neuron identification algorithms inside the implant chip consume a lot of power and bandwidth, causing higher heat dissipation issues and draining the implant's battery. The spike sorting is the core unit of an invasive BCI chip, which plays a significant role in power consumption, accuracy, and area. Therefore, in this study, we propose a low-power adaptive simplified VLSI architecture, "Zydeco-Style," for BCI spike sorting that is computationally less complex with higher accuracy that performs up to 93.5% in the worst-case scenario. The architecture uses a low-power Bluetooth Wireless communication module with external IoT medical ICU devices. The proposed architecture was implemented and simulated in Verilog. In addition, we are proposing an implant conceptual design.
abstract_zh: 脑机接口（BCI）在解决许多大脑信号分析限制、解决精神障碍以及通过神经控制植入物恢复缺失的肢体功能方面具有巨大的潜力。然而，目前还没有一种可供日常生活使用的安全植入物。大多数拟议的植入物都存在一些实施问题，例如感染危险和散热，这限制了它们的可用性，并使通过法规和质量控制生产变得更具挑战性。无线植入物不需要颅骨上有慢性伤口。然而，当前植入芯片内复杂的聚类神经元识别算法消耗大量功率和带宽，导致更高的散热问题并耗尽植入设备的电池。尖峰分选是侵入式BCI芯片的核心单元，在功耗、精度、面积等方面发挥着重要作用。因此，在本研究中，我们提出了一种用于 BCI 尖峰排序的低功耗自适应简化 VLSI 架构“Zydeco 式”，该架构计算复杂度较低，准确度较高，在最坏情况下的执行率高达 93.5%。该架构使用低功耗蓝牙无线通信模块与外部物联网医疗 ICU 设备。所提出的架构在 Verilog 中实现和仿真。此外，我们还提出了植入物概念设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低功耗的Zydeco-Style VLSI架构，用于物联网脑机接口（BCI）植入设备的尖峰排序，以解决现有植入设备的高功耗和热耗散问题。
AI.motivation: 现有BCI植入设备存在感染风险、高功耗导致的热耗散问题以及复杂算法对电池寿命的影响，限制了其在日常生活中的应用。
AI.method: 设计一种计算复杂度低且精度高的自适应简化VLSI架构，结合低功耗蓝牙模块与外部物联网医疗设备，并通过Verilog实现和仿真验证。
AI.result: 该架构在最坏情况下达到93.5%的尖峰排序精度，成功实现植入设备概念设计，并降低功耗和带宽需求。
AI.conclusion: Zydeco-Style架构通过优化计算复杂度和集成无线通信模块，显著提升BCI植入设备的能效与安全性，为日常应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Zhengzhe Liu,Peng Dai,Ruihui Li,Xiaojuan Qi,Chi-Wing Fu
title: ISS: Image as Stepping Stone for Text-Guided 3D Shape Generation
title_zh: ISS：图像作为文本引导 3D 形状生成的垫脚石
comment: ICLR 2023 spotlight
comments: ICLR 2023 spotlight
abstract: Text-guided 3D shape generation remains challenging due to the absence of large paired text-shape data, the substantial semantic gap between these two modalities, and the structural complexity of 3D shapes. This paper presents a new framework called Image as Stepping Stone (ISS) for the task by introducing 2D image as a stepping stone to connect the two modalities and to eliminate the need for paired text-shape data. Our key contribution is a two-stage feature-space-alignment approach that maps CLIP features to shapes by harnessing a pre-trained single-view reconstruction (SVR) model with multi-view supervisions: first map the CLIP image feature to the detail-rich shape space in the SVR model, then map the CLIP text feature to the shape space and optimize the mapping by encouraging CLIP consistency between the input text and the rendered images. Further, we formulate a text-guided shape stylization module to dress up the output shapes with novel textures. Beyond existing works on 3D shape generation from text, our new approach is general for creating shapes in a broad range of categories, without requiring paired text-shape data. Experimental results manifest that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-arts and our baselines in terms of fidelity and consistency with text. Further, our approach can stylize the generated shapes with both realistic and fantasy structures and textures.
summary: Text-guided 3D shape generation remains challenging due to the absence of large paired text-shape data, the substantial semantic gap between these two modalities, and the structural complexity of 3D shapes. This paper presents a new framework called Image as Stepping Stone (ISS) for the task by introducing 2D image as a stepping stone to connect the two modalities and to eliminate the need for paired text-shape data. Our key contribution is a two-stage feature-space-alignment approach that maps CLIP features to shapes by harnessing a pre-trained single-view reconstruction (SVR) model with multi-view supervisions: first map the CLIP image feature to the detail-rich shape space in the SVR model, then map the CLIP text feature to the shape space and optimize the mapping by encouraging CLIP consistency between the input text and the rendered images. Further, we formulate a text-guided shape stylization module to dress up the output shapes with novel textures. Beyond existing works on 3D shape generation from text, our new approach is general for creating shapes in a broad range of categories, without requiring paired text-shape data. Experimental results manifest that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-arts and our baselines in terms of fidelity and consistency with text. Further, our approach can stylize the generated shapes with both realistic and fantasy structures and textures.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏大量的成对文本形状数据、这两种模式之间存在巨大的语义差距以及 3D 形状的结构复杂性，文本引导的 3D 形状生成仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种称为图像作为垫脚石（ISS）的新框架，通过引入 2D 图像作为垫脚石来连接两种模式并消除对配对文本形状数据的需要。我们的主要贡献是一种两阶段特征空间对齐方法，通过利用具有多视图监督的预训练单视图重建（SVR）模型将 CLIP 特征映射到形状：首先将 CLIP 图像特征映射到 SVR 模型中细节丰富的形状空间，然后将 CLIP 文本特征映射到形状空间，并通过鼓励输入文本和渲染图像之间的 CLIP 一致性来优化映射。此外，我们制定了一个文本引导的形状风格化模块，用新颖的纹理来装饰输出形状。除了从文本生成 3D 形状的现有工作之外，我们的新方法适用于创建各种类别的形状，而不需要配对的文本形状数据。实验结果表明，我们的方法在文本的保真度和一致性方面优于最先进的方法和我们的基线。此外，我们的方法可以使用现实和幻想的结构和纹理来风格化生成的形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ISS的框架，通过将2D图像作为中介，解决文本引导的3D形状生成问题，无需依赖配对的文本-形状数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于缺乏大规模文本-形状配对数据、文本与3D形状的语义鸿沟及3D结构复杂性，需探索新途径突破瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用两阶段特征空间对齐方法：首先通过预训练单视角重建模型（SVR）将CLIP图像特征映射到细节丰富的形状空间，再通过多视角监督将CLIP文本特征映射至形状空间并优化一致性；附加文本引导的风格化模块实现纹理多样化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在形状保真度和文本一致性上优于现有SOTA方法，可生成具有真实感与幻想风格的多样化结构及纹理。
AI.conclusion: ISS框架通过图像作为桥梁，无需配对数据即可生成广泛类别的高质量3D形状，为文本到3D生成任务提供了通用且高效的新解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明该方法在形状保真度和文本一致性上优于现有SOTA方法，可生成具有真实感与幻想风格的多样化结构及纹理。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为ISS的框架，通过将2D图像作为中介，解决文本引导的3D形状生成问题，无需依赖配对的文本-形状数据。
motivation: 现有方法受限于缺乏大规模文本-形状配对数据、文本与3D形状的语义鸿沟及3D结构复杂性，需探索新途径突破瓶颈。
method: 采用两阶段特征空间对齐方法：首先通过预训练单视角重建模型（SVR）将CLIP图像特征映射到细节丰富的形状空间，再通过多视角监督将CLIP文本特征映射至形状空间并优化一致性；附加文本引导的风格化模块实现纹理多样化。
result: 实验表明该方法在形状保真度和文本一致性上优于现有SOTA方法，可生成具有真实感与幻想风格的多样化结构及纹理。
conclusion: ISS框架通过图像作为桥梁，无需配对数据即可生成广泛类别的高质量3D形状，为文本到3D生成任务提供了通用且高效的新解决方案。
search_text: ISS: Image as Stepping Stone for Text-Guided 3D Shape Generation ISS：图像作为文本引导 3D 形状生成的垫脚石 Text-guided 3D shape generation remains challenging due to the absence of large paired text-shape data, the substantial semantic gap between these two modalities, and the structural complexity of 3D shapes. This paper presents a new framework called Image as Stepping Stone (ISS) for the task by introducing 2D image as a stepping stone to connect the two modalities and to eliminate the need for paired text-shape data. Our key contribution is a two-stage feature-space-alignment approach that maps CLIP features to shapes by harnessing a pre-trained single-view reconstruction (SVR) model with multi-view supervisions: first map the CLIP image feature to the detail-rich shape space in the SVR model, then map the CLIP text feature to the shape space and optimize the mapping by encouraging CLIP consistency between the input text and the rendered images. Further, we formulate a text-guided shape stylization module to dress up the output shapes with novel textures. Beyond existing works on 3D shape generation from text, our new approach is general for creating shapes in a broad range of categories, without requiring paired text-shape data. Experimental results manifest that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-arts and our baselines in terms of fidelity and consistency with text. Further, our approach can stylize the generated shapes with both realistic and fantasy structures and textures. 由于缺乏大量的成对文本形状数据、这两种模式之间存在巨大的语义差距以及 3D 形状的结构复杂性，文本引导的 3D 形状生成仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种称为图像作为垫脚石（ISS）的新框架，通过引入 2D 图像作为垫脚石来连接两种模式并消除对配对文本形状数据的需要。我们的主要贡献是一种两阶段特征空间对齐方法，通过利用具有多视图监督的预训练单视图重建（SVR）模型将 CLIP 特征映射到形状：首先将 CLIP 图像特征映射到 SVR 模型中细节丰富的形状空间，然后将 CLIP 文本特征映射到形状空间，并通过鼓励输入文本和渲染图像之间的 CLIP 一致性来优化映射。此外，我们制定了一个文本引导的形状风格化模块，用新颖的纹理来装饰输出形状。除了从文本生成 3D 形状的现有工作之外，我们的新方法适用于创建各种类别的形状，而不需要配对的文本形状数据。实验结果表明，我们的方法在文本的保真度和一致性方面优于最先进的方法和我们的基线。此外，我们的方法可以使用现实和幻想的结构和纹理来风格化生成的形状。 本文提出一种名为ISS的框架，通过将2D图像作为中介，解决文本引导的3D形状生成问题，无需依赖配对的文本-形状数据。 Zhengzhe Liu,Peng Dai,Ruihui Li,Xiaojuan Qi,Chi-Wing Fu cs.CV

title: Multi-level Adaptation for Automatic Landing with Engine Failure under Turbulent Weather
title_zh: 湍流天气下发动机故障自动着陆的多级自适应
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the 2023 AIAA Guidance, Navigation, and Control Conference, National Harbor, MD
comments: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the 2023 AIAA Guidance, Navigation, and Control Conference, National Harbor, MD
abstract: This paper addresses efficient feasibility evaluation of possible emergency landing sites, online navigation, and path following for automatic landing under engine-out failure subject to turbulent weather. The proposed Multi-level Adaptive Safety Control framework enables unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) under large uncertainties to perform safety maneuvers traditionally reserved for human pilots with sufficient experience. In this framework, a simplified flight model is first used for time-efficient feasibility evaluation of a set of landing sites and trajectory generation. Then, an online path following controller is employed to track the selected landing trajectory. We used a high-fidelity simulation environment for a fixed-wing aircraft to test and validate the proposed approach under various weather uncertainties. For the case of emergency landing due to engine failure under severe weather conditions, the simulation results show that the proposed automatic landing framework is robust to uncertainties and adaptable at different landing stages while being computationally inexpensive for planning and tracking tasks.
summary: This paper addresses efficient feasibility evaluation of possible emergency landing sites, online navigation, and path following for automatic landing under engine-out failure subject to turbulent weather. The proposed Multi-level Adaptive Safety Control framework enables unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) under large uncertainties to perform safety maneuvers traditionally reserved for human pilots with sufficient experience. In this framework, a simplified flight model is first used for time-efficient feasibility evaluation of a set of landing sites and trajectory generation. Then, an online path following controller is employed to track the selected landing trajectory. We used a high-fidelity simulation environment for a fixed-wing aircraft to test and validate the proposed approach under various weather uncertainties. For the case of emergency landing due to engine failure under severe weather conditions, the simulation results show that the proposed automatic landing framework is robust to uncertainties and adaptable at different landing stages while being computationally inexpensive for planning and tracking tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了对可能的紧急着陆地点、在线导航和在湍流天气下发动机故障时自动着陆的路径跟踪进行有效的可行性评估。所提出的多级自适应安全控制框架使无人机（UAV）能够在很大的不确定性下执行传统上为具有足够经验的人类飞行员保留的安全操作。在此框架中，首先使用简化的飞行模型对一组着陆点和轨迹生成进行省时的可行性评估。然后，采用在线路径跟踪控制器来跟踪选定的着陆轨迹。我们使用固定翼飞机的高保真模拟环境来测试和验证各种天气不确定性下所提出的方法。对于恶劣天气条件下由于发动机故障而紧急着陆的情况，仿真结果表明，所提出的自动着陆框架对不确定性具有鲁棒性，并且能够适应不同的着陆阶段，同时对于规划和跟踪任务而言计算成本低廉。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多级自适应安全控制框架，解决发动机故障下湍流天气中无人机自动着陆的可行性评估与轨迹跟踪问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在发动机故障和恶劣天气下难以高效评估着陆可行性，且需要依赖经验丰富的飞行员操作，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用简化飞行模型快速评估着陆点可行性并生成轨迹，结合在线路径跟踪控制器实现轨迹跟踪，通过高保真仿真验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 仿真表明框架在严重天气不确定性下具有鲁棒性，能适应不同着陆阶段，且计算成本低。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为无人机在复杂天气下的自动着陆提供了高效、安全的解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Reza Arablouei,Liang Wang,Caitlin Phillips,Lachlan Currie,Jordan Yates,Greg Bishop-Hurley
title: In-situ animal behavior classification using knowledge distillation and fixed-point quantization
title_zh: 使用知识蒸馏和定点量化进行原位动物行为分类
abstract: We explore the use of knowledge distillation (KD) for learning compact and accurate models that enable classification of animal behavior from accelerometry data on wearable devices. To this end, we take a deep and complex convolutional neural network, known as residual neural network (ResNet), as the teacher model. ResNet is specifically designed for multivariate time-series classification. We use ResNet to distill the knowledge of animal behavior classification datasets into soft labels, which consist of the predicted pseudo-probabilities of every class for each datapoint. We then use the soft labels to train our significantly less complex student models, which are based on the gated recurrent unit (GRU) and multilayer perceptron (MLP). The evaluation results using two real-world animal behavior classification datasets show that the classification accuracy of the student GRU-MLP models improves appreciably through KD, approaching that of the teacher ResNet model. To further reduce the computational and memory requirements of performing inference using the student models trained via KD, we utilize dynamic fixed-point quantization (DQ) through an appropriate modification of the computational graph of the considered models. We implement both unquantized and quantized versions of the developed KD-based models on the embedded systems of our purpose-built collar and ear tag devices to classify animal behavior in situ and in real time. Our evaluations corroborate the effectiveness of KD and DQ in improving the accuracy and efficiency of in-situ animal behavior classification.
summary: We explore the use of knowledge distillation (KD) for learning compact and accurate models that enable classification of animal behavior from accelerometry data on wearable devices. To this end, we take a deep and complex convolutional neural network, known as residual neural network (ResNet), as the teacher model. ResNet is specifically designed for multivariate time-series classification. We use ResNet to distill the knowledge of animal behavior classification datasets into soft labels, which consist of the predicted pseudo-probabilities of every class for each datapoint. We then use the soft labels to train our significantly less complex student models, which are based on the gated recurrent unit (GRU) and multilayer perceptron (MLP). The evaluation results using two real-world animal behavior classification datasets show that the classification accuracy of the student GRU-MLP models improves appreciably through KD, approaching that of the teacher ResNet model. To further reduce the computational and memory requirements of performing inference using the student models trained via KD, we utilize dynamic fixed-point quantization (DQ) through an appropriate modification of the computational graph of the considered models. We implement both unquantized and quantized versions of the developed KD-based models on the embedded systems of our purpose-built collar and ear tag devices to classify animal behavior in situ and in real time. Our evaluations corroborate the effectiveness of KD and DQ in improving the accuracy and efficiency of in-situ animal behavior classification.
abstract_zh: 我们探索使用知识蒸馏（KD）来学习紧凑而准确的模型，从而能够根据可穿戴设备上的加速度数据对动物行为进行分类。为此，我们采用深度复杂的卷积神经网络，称为残差神经网络（ResNet），作为教师模型。 ResNet 专为多元时间序列分类而设计。我们使用 ResNet 将动物行为分类数据集的知识提炼为软标签，其中包含每个数据点的每个类别的预测伪概率。然后，我们使用软标签来训练复杂度明显较低的学生模型，该模型基于门控循环单元 (GRU) 和多层感知器 (MLP)。使用两个真实动物行为分类数据集的评估结果表明，通过 KD，学生 GRU-MLP 模型的分类精度明显提高，接近教师 ResNet 模型。为了进一步减少使用通过 KD 训练的学生模型执行推理的计算和内存要求，我们通过适当修改所考虑模型的计算图来利用动态定点量化 (DQ)。我们在专用项圈和耳标设备的嵌入式系统上实现了已开发的基于 KD 的模型的非量化和量化版本，以对动物行为进行原位实时分类。我们的评估证实了 KD 和 DQ 在提高原位动物行为分类的准确性和效率方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用知识蒸馏和定点量化技术，在可穿戴设备上实现动物行为分类的高效模型。
AI.motivation: 动物行为分类需要在资源受限的可穿戴设备上实时运行，传统复杂模型（如ResNet）难以满足计算和存储需求。
AI.method: 以ResNet为教师模型生成软标签，训练轻量级学生模型（GRU和MLP）；通过动态定点量化优化模型效率，并在嵌入式设备上部署验证。
AI.result: 知识蒸馏使学生模型准确率接近教师模型，定点量化显著降低计算和内存需求，实测验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏与定点量化结合可有效提升动物行为分类的准确率与效率，适用于边缘设备实时部署。

To further reduce the computational and memory requirements of performing inference using the student models trained via KD, we utilize dynamic fixed-point quantization (DQ) through an appropriate modification of the computational graph of the considered models. Our evaluations corroborate the effectiveness of KD and DQ in improving the accuracy and efficiency of in-situ animal behavior classification. 我们探索使用知识蒸馏（KD）来学习紧凑而准确的模型，从而能够根据可穿戴设备上的加速度数据对动物行为进行分类。为此，我们采用深度复杂的卷积神经网络，称为残差神经网络（ResNet），作为教师模型。 ResNet 专为多元时间序列分类而设计。我们使用 ResNet 将动物行为分类数据集的知识提炼为软标签，其中包含每个数据点的每个类别的预测伪概率。然后，我们使用软标签来训练复杂度明显较低的学生模型，该模型基于门控循环单元 (GRU) 和多层感知器 (MLP)。使用两个真实动物行为分类数据集的评估结果表明，通过 KD，学生 GRU-MLP 模型的分类精度明显提高，接近教师 ResNet 模型。为了进一步减少使用通过 KD 训练的学生模型执行推理的计算和内存要求，我们通过适当修改所考虑模型的计算图来利用动态定点量化 (DQ)。我们在专用项圈和耳标设备的嵌入式系统上实现了已开发的基于 KD 的模型的非量化和量化版本，以对动物行为进行原位实时分类。我们的评估证实了 KD 和 DQ 在提高原位动物行为分类的准确性和效率方面的有效性。 本文研究利用知识蒸馏和定点量化技术，在可穿戴设备上实现动物行为分类的高效模型。 Reza Arablouei,Liang Wang,Caitlin Phillips,Lachlan Currie,Jordan Yates,Greg Bishop-Hurley cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SP

title: Modelling Power Consumptions for Multi-rotor UAVs
title_zh: 多旋翼无人机功耗建模
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have various advantages, but their practical applications are influenced by their limited energy. Therefore, it is important to manage their power consumption and also important to establish corresponding power consumption models. However, most of existing works either establish theoretical power consumption models for fixed-wing UAVs and single-rotor UAVs, or provide heuristic power consumption models for multi-rotor UAVs without rigorous mathematical derivations. This paper aims to establish theoretical power consumption models for multi-rotor UAVs. To be specific, the closed-form power consumption models for a multi-rotor UAV in three flight statuses, i.e., forward flight, vertical ascent and vertical descent, are derived by leveraging the relationship between single-rotor UAVs and multi-rotor UAVs in terms of power consumptions. On this basis, a generic flight power consumption model for the UAV in a three-dimensional (3-D) scenario is obtained. Extensive experiments are conducted by using DJI M210 and a mobile app made by DJI Mobile SDK in real scenarios, and confirm the correctness and effectiveness of these models; in addition, simulations are performed to further investigate the effect of the rotor numbers on the power consumption for the UAV. The proposed power consumption models not only reveal how the power consumption of multi-rotor UAVs are affected by various factors, but also pave the way for introducing other novel applications.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have various advantages, but their practical applications are influenced by their limited energy. Therefore, it is important to manage their power consumption and also important to establish corresponding power consumption models. However, most of existing works either establish theoretical power consumption models for fixed-wing UAVs and single-rotor UAVs, or provide heuristic power consumption models for multi-rotor UAVs without rigorous mathematical derivations. To be specific, the closed-form power consumption models for a multi-rotor UAV in three flight statuses, i.e., forward flight, vertical ascent and vertical descent, are derived by leveraging the relationship between single-rotor UAVs and multi-rotor UAVs in terms of power consumptions. On this basis, a generic flight power consumption model for the UAV in a three-dimensional (3-D) scenario is obtained. Extensive experiments are conducted by using DJI M210 and a mobile app made by DJI Mobile SDK in real scenarios, and confirm the correctness and effectiveness of these models; in addition, simulations are performed to further investigate the effect of the rotor numbers on the power consumption for the UAV. The proposed power consumption models not only reveal how the power consumption of multi-rotor UAVs are affected by various factors, but also pave the way for introducing other novel applications.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）具有多种优点，但其实际应用受到其有限能量的影响。因此，对其功耗进行管理非常重要，建立相应的功耗模型也很重要。然而，现有的大多数工作要么建立固定翼无人机和单旋翼无人机的理论功耗模型，要么为多旋翼无人机提供启发式功耗模型，而没有严格的数学推导。本文旨在建立多旋翼无人机的理论功耗模型。具体而言，利用单旋翼无人机和多旋翼无人机的功耗关系，推导出多旋翼无人机在前飞、垂直上升和垂直下降三种飞行状态下的闭合功耗模型。在此基础上，得到了无人机在三维（3-D）场景下的通用飞行功耗模型。使用DJI M210和DJI Mobile SDK制作的移动应用程序在真实场景中进行了大量的实验，并验证了这些模型的正确性和有效性；此外，还进行了仿真，以进一步研究旋翼数量对无人机功耗的影响。所提出的功耗模型不仅揭示了多旋翼无人机的功耗如何受到各种因素的影响，而且为引入其他新颖的应用铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立多旋翼无人机在三种飞行状态下的理论功耗模型，并推导出三维场景下的通用功耗模型。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对多旋翼无人机的理论功耗模型，多数为启发式模型或仅适用于固定翼/单旋翼无人机，需建立严谨理论模型以优化能量管理并推动应用创新。
AI.method: 通过分析单旋翼与多旋翼无人机功耗关系，推导出前飞、垂直上升和垂直下降的闭式模型，并构建三维通用模型；结合DJI M210实测数据与仿真验证模型有效性，分析旋翼数量对功耗的影响。
AI.result: 实验验证了模型的正确性与有效性，仿真表明旋翼数量显著影响功耗，模型揭示了多旋翼无人机功耗与各因素的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的理论模型为多旋翼无人机功耗分析提供了理论依据，有助于优化飞行控制与能量管理，并为新型应用场景奠定基础。

authors_text: Insu Han,Amir Zandieh,Jaehoon Lee,Roman Novak,Lechao Xiao,Amin Karbasi
title: Fast Neural Kernel Embeddings for General Activations
title_zh: 用于一般激活的快速神经内核嵌入
abstract: Infinite width limit has shed light on generalization and optimization aspects of deep learning by establishing connections between neural networks and kernel methods. Despite their importance, the utility of these kernel methods was limited in large-scale learning settings due to their (super-)quadratic runtime and memory complexities. Moreover, most prior works on neural kernels have focused on the ReLU activation, mainly due to its popularity but also due to the difficulty of computing such kernels for general activations. In this work, we overcome such difficulties by providing methods to work with general activations. First, we compile and expand the list of activation functions admitting exact dual activation expressions to compute neural kernels. When the exact computation is unknown, we present methods to effectively approximate them. We propose a fast sketching method that approximates any multi-layered Neural Network Gaussian Process (NNGP) kernel and Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) matrices for a wide range of activation functions, going beyond the commonly analyzed ReLU activation. This is done by showing how to approximate the neural kernels using the truncated Hermite expansion of any desired activation functions. While most prior works require data points on the unit sphere, our methods do not suffer from such limitations and are applicable to any dataset of points in $\mathbb{R}^d$. Furthermore, we provide a subspace embedding for NNGP and NTK matrices with near input-sparsity runtime and near-optimal target dimension which applies to any \emph{homogeneous} dual activation functions with rapidly convergent Taylor expansion. Empirically, with respect to exact convolutional NTK (CNTK) computation, our method achieves $106\times$ speedup for approximate CNTK of a 5-layer Myrtle network on CIFAR-10 dataset.
